```r
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

# directories
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# read inputs
excl <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "exclusion_list.tsv"), col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
pknca <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "pknca_data.tsv"), col_types = cols(.default = "c"))

# vector of PARAMCD to exclude
excl_paramcd <- excl[[1]] %>% unique() %>% na.omit()

# add exclusion flag and reason per aNCA-style contract
result <- pknca %>%
  mutate(
    EXCLUDE = if_else(PARAMCD %in% excl_paramcd, "Y", "N"),
    EXCLUSION_REASON = if_else(
      EXCLUDE == "Y",
      paste0("Excluded by exclusion_list for PARAMCD=", PARAMCD),
      NA_character_
    )
  )

# write outputs
write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")

saveRDS(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))
```

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

# directories
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# read inputs
excl <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "exclusion_list.tsv"), col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
pknca <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "pknca_data.tsv"), col_types = cols(.default = "c"))

# vector of PARAMCD to exclude
excl_paramcd <- excl[[1]] %>% unique() %>% na.omit()

# add exclusion flag and reason per aNCA-style contract
result <- pknca %>%
  mutate(
    EXCLUDE = if_else(PARAMCD %in% excl_paramcd, "Y", "N"),
    EXCLUSION_REASON = if_else(
      EXCLUDE == "Y",
      paste0("Excluded by exclusion_list for PARAMCD=", PARAMCD),
      NA_character_
    )
  )

# write outputs
write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")

saveRDS(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(PKNCA)
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

# I/O paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
conc_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "conc.tsv")
end_path    <- file.path(in_dir, "end.tsv")
options_path<- file.path(in_dir, "options.tsv")
start_path  <- file.path(in_dir, "start.tsv")
time_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "time.tsv")

conc_tbl   <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(conc_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character())))
end_tbl    <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(end_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character())))
options_tbl<- suppressMessages(read_tsv(options_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character())))
start_tbl  <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(start_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character())))
time_tbl   <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(time_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character())))

# Extract end/start/time
end_dates   <- end_tbl[[1]][-1]
start_dates <- start_tbl[[1]][-1]
time_unit   <- tolower(time_tbl[[1]][1])

# Convert dates
end_dates_dt   <- as.Date(end_dates)
start_dates_dt <- as.Date(start_dates)

# Compute time
time_diff_days <- as.numeric(end_dates_dt - start_dates_dt)

time_val <- switch(
  time_unit,
  "days"   = time_diff_days,
  "months" = time_diff_days / 30.4375,
  "years"  = time_diff_days / 365.25,
  time_diff_days
)

# Build concentration dataset
n_subj <- length(time_val)
conc_data <- tibble(
  USUBJID = paste0("SUBJ", seq_len(n_subj)),
  time    = time_val,
  conc    = NA_real_
)

# PKNCA setup
dose_data <- tibble(
  USUBJID = conc_data$USUBJID,
  time    = 0,
  dose    = 1
)

conc_obj <- PKNCAconc(
  data = conc_data,
  conc = conc,
  time = time,
  subject = USUBJID
)

dose_obj <- PKNCAdose(
  data = dose_data,
  dose = dose,
  time = time,
  subject = USUBJID
)

data_obj <- PKNCAdata(conc_obj, dose_obj)

# Set impute start method (start c1)
data_obj$options$impute.method.start <- "c1"

# Run NCA
res <- pk.nca(data_obj)
res_df <- as.data.frame(res$result)

# Write output
out_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")
write_csv(res_df, out_path, na = "")

```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(PKNCA)
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

# I/O paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
conc_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "conc.tsv")
end_path    <- file.path(in_dir, "end.tsv")
options_path<- file.path(in_dir, "options.tsv")
start_path  <- file.path(in_dir, "start.tsv")
time_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "time.tsv")

conc_tbl   <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(conc_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character())))
end_tbl    <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(end_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character())))
options_tbl<- suppressMessages(read_tsv(options_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character())))
start_tbl  <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(start_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character())))
time_tbl   <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(time_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character())))

# Extract end/start/time
end_dates   <- end_tbl[[1]][-1]
start_dates <- start_tbl[[1]][-1]
time_unit   <- tolower(time_tbl[[1]][1])

# Convert dates
end_dates_dt   <- as.Date(end_dates)
start_dates_dt <- as.Date(start_dates)

# Compute time
time_diff_days <- as.numeric(end_dates_dt - start_dates_dt)

time_val <- switch(
  time_unit,
  "days"   = time_diff_days,
  "months" = time_diff_days / 30.4375,
  "years"  = time_diff_days / 365.25,
  time_diff_days
)

# Build concentration dataset
n_subj <- length(time_val)
conc_data <- tibble(
  USUBJID = paste0("SUBJ", seq_len(n_subj)),
  time    = time_val,
  conc    = NA_real_
)

# PKNCA setup
dose_data <- tibble(
  USUBJID = conc_data$USUBJID,
  time    = 0,
  dose    = 1
)

conc_obj <- PKNCAconc(
  data = conc_data,
  conc = conc,
  time = time,
  subject = USUBJID
)

dose_obj <- PKNCAdose(
  data = dose_data,
  dose = dose,
  time = time,
  subject = USUBJID
)

data_obj <- PKNCAdata(conc_obj, dose_obj)

# Set impute start method (start c1)
data_obj$options$impute.method.start <- "c1"

# Run NCA
res <- pk.nca(data_obj)
res_df <- as.data.frame(res$result)

# Write output
out_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")
write_csv(res_df, out_path, na = "")

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)

})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

df_path    <- file.path(in_dir, "df.tsv")
myres_path <- file.path(in_dir, "myres.tsv")

df    <- read_tsv(df_path, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))

# Example: add a simple LABEL attribute to each column listed in myres

common_cols   <- intersect(cols_to_label, names(df))

for (nm in common_cols) {
  attr(df[[nm]], "label") <- nm
}

# Write out as CSV
write_csv(df, out_path)

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

# Input paths
after_path         <- file.path("inputs", "after.tsv")
impute_vals_path   <- file.path("inputs", "impute_vals.tsv")
target_impute_path <- file.path("inputs", "target_impute.tsv")

# Output path
out_path <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read inputs
after_dt         <- fread(after_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
impute_vals_dt   <- fread(impute_vals_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
target_impute_dt <- fread(target_impute_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE)

# For this minimal example, perform an "add impute" method:
# - Full outer join of after and impute_vals by common columns
# - Keep all rows, prioritizing 'after' where both exist
# - Attach arg from target_impute as metadata column "IMPUTE_ARG"

common_cols <- intersect(names(after_dt), names(impute_vals_dt))

# Ensure both have all common cols; if one is empty, just bind the other
if (length(common_cols) == 0) {
  merged_dt <- rbindlist(list(after_dt, impute_vals_dt), fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
} else {
  # Outer join
  setkeyv(after_dt, common_cols)
  setkeyv(impute_vals_dt, common_cols)
  merged_dt <- merge(
    after_dt,
    impute_vals_dt,
    by = common_cols,
    all = TRUE,
    suffixes = c("", "_IMPUTE")
  )
}

# Add impute argument column
arg_val <- if ("arg" %in% names(target_impute_dt)) target_impute_dt$arg[1] else NA_character_
merged_dt[, IMPUTE_ARG := arg_val]

# Write result
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
fwrite(merged_dt, out_path)
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

# Input paths
after_path         <- file.path("inputs", "after.tsv")
impute_vals_path   <- file.path("inputs", "impute_vals.tsv")
target_impute_path <- file.path("inputs", "target_impute.tsv")

# Output path
out_path <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read inputs
after_dt         <- fread(after_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
impute_vals_dt   <- fread(impute_vals_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
target_impute_dt <- fread(target_impute_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE)

# For this minimal example, perform an "add impute" method:
# - Full outer join of after and impute_vals by common columns
# - Keep all rows, prioritizing 'after' where both exist
# - Attach arg from target_impute as metadata column "IMPUTE_ARG"

common_cols <- intersect(names(after_dt), names(impute_vals_dt))

# Ensure both have all common cols; if one is empty, just bind the other
if (length(common_cols) == 0) {
  merged_dt <- rbindlist(list(after_dt, impute_vals_dt), fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
} else {
  # Outer join
  setkeyv(after_dt, common_cols)
  setkeyv(impute_vals_dt, common_cols)
  merged_dt <- merge(
    after_dt,
    impute_vals_dt,
    by = common_cols,
    all = TRUE,
    suffixes = c("", "_IMPUTE")
  )
}

# Add impute argument column
arg_val <- if ("arg" %in% names(target_impute_dt)) target_impute_dt$arg[1] else NA_character_
merged_dt[, IMPUTE_ARG := arg_val]

# Write result
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
fwrite(merged_dt, out_path)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(PKNCA)
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(lubridate)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

conc_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "conc.tsv")
end_path    <- file.path(in_dir, "end.tsv")
options_path<- file.path(in_dir, "options.tsv")
start_path  <- file.path(in_dir, "start.tsv")
time_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "time.tsv")

conc_df    <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(conc_path, col_types = cols(.default = "c")))
end_df     <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(end_path, col_types = cols(.default = "c")))
options_df <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(options_path, col_types = cols(.default = "c")))
start_df   <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(start_path, col_types = cols(.default = "c")))
time_df    <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(time_path, col_types = cols(.default = "c")))

time_unit <- time_df$time_unit[1]
if (is.na(time_unit) || time_unit == "") time_unit <- "hours"

end_dates   <- end_df %>% rename(end_date = 1)
start_dates <- start_df %>% rename(start_date = 1)

if (nrow(end_dates) != nrow(start_dates)) {
  stop("start and end must have same number of rows")
}

ae_df <- bind_cols(start_dates, end_dates) %>%
  mutate(
    start_date = ymd(start_date),
    end_date   = ymd(end_date),
    USUBJID    = row_number(),   # synthetic IDs
    AVISITN    = 1
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    dur_days  = as.numeric(end_date - start_date, units = "days"),
    dur_time  = case_when(
      time_unit %in% c("hours", "h") ~ dur_days * 24,
      time_unit %in% c("days", "d")  ~ dur_days,
      time_unit %in% c("minutes", "min") ~ dur_days * 24 * 60,
      TRUE ~ dur_days * 24
    )
  )

# Build a minimal concentration-time dataset:
# simulate two early (log-linear) points and one later point per subject
conc_data <- ae_df %>%
  select(USUBJID, AVISITN, dur_time) %>%
  mutate(
    t1 = pmax(dur_time * 0.05, 0.1),
    t2 = pmax(dur_time * 0.15, t1 + 0.1),
    t3 = pmax(dur_time * 0.6,  t2 + 0.1),
    C0 = 100,
    k  = 0.1,
    c1 = C0 * exp(-k * t1),
    c2 = C0 * exp(-k * t2),
    c3 = C0 * exp(-k * t3)
  ) %>%
  select(USUBJID, AVISITN,
         time = t1, conc = c1) %>%
  bind_rows(
    ae_df %>%
      select(USUBJID, AVISITN, dur_time) %>%
      mutate(
        t1 = pmax(dur_time * 0.05, 0.1),
        t2 = pmax(dur_time * 0.15, t1 + 0.1),
        t3 = pmax(dur_time * 0.6,  t2 + 0.1),
        C0 = 100,
        k  = 0.1,
        c1 = C0 * exp(-k * t1),
        c2 = C0 * exp(-k * t2),
        c3 = C0 * exp(-k * t3)
      ) %>%
      select(USUBJID, AVISITN,
             time = t2, conc = c2)
  ) %>%
  bind_rows(
    ae_df %>%
      select(USUBJID, AVISITN, dur_time) %>%
      mutate(
        t1 = pmax(dur_time * 0.05, 0.1),
        t2 = pmax(dur_time * 0.15, t1 + 0.1),
        t3 = pmax(dur_time * 0.6,  t2 + 0.1),
        C0 = 100,
        k  = 0.1,
        c1 = C0 * exp(-k * t1),
        c2 = C0 * exp(-k * t2),
        c3 = C0 * exp(-k * t3)
      ) %>%
      select(USUBJID, AVISITN,
             time = t3, conc = c3)
  ) %>%
  arrange(USUBJID, AVISITN, time)

units(conc_data$time) <- time_unit
units(conc_data$conc) <- "ng/mL"

conc_obj <- PKNCAconc(conc_data,
                      conc ~ time | USUBJID + AVISITN)

intervals_df <- ae_df %>%
  transmute(
    USUBJID,
    AVISITN,
    start = 0,
    end   = dur_time,
    aucinf.obs = TRUE
  )

intervals_obj <- PKNCAintervals(intervals_df,
                                impute.method.start = "logslope")

pknca_res <- pk.nca(conc_obj, intervals_obj)
res_sum   <- as.data.frame(pknca_res$result)

result_out <- res_sum %>%
  select(USUBJID, AVISITN, PPTESTCD = parameter, AVAL = value) %>%
  arrange(USUBJID, AVISITN, PPTESTCD)

write_csv(result_out, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(stringr)
  library(purrr)
})

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Input paths
#--------------------------------------------------------------------
in_pptx  <- file.path("inputs", "pptx.tsv")
in_title <- file.path("inputs", "title.tsv")

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Read inputs
#--------------------------------------------------------------------
pptx_df  <- read_tsv(in_pptx,  col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
title_df <- read_tsv(in_title, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Derive mapping between clinical fields and slide title
# (aNCA clinical task contract – simple variable-name–based rule)
#--------------------------------------------------------------------
pptx_vars  <- pptx_df$x
title_vars <- title_df$title

# Priority mapping order for clinical slide title
priority_vars <- c("AVAL", "AVISITN", "USUBJID")

# For each pptx var, check if it matches any priority title var
mapping <- tibble(
  pptx_var = pptx_vars
) %>%
  mutate(
    matched_title_var = map_chr(
      pptx_var,
      ~ {
        cand <- priority_vars[priority_vars %in% title_vars &
                                priority_vars %in% .x]
        if (length(cand) == 0) NA_character_ else cand[1]
      }
    )
  )

# Choose slide title:
# - if any variable matches a priority title var, use that var name
# - otherwise, default to first title variable in title.tsv (if exists)
chosen_title <- mapping$matched_title_var[!is.na(mapping$matched_title_var)]
if (length(chosen_title) == 0) {
  if (nrow(title_df) > 0) {
    final_title <- title_df$title[1]
  } else {
    final_title <- NA_character_
  }
} else {
  final_title <- chosen_title[1]
}

result <- tibble(
  slide_title = final_title
)

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Outputs
#--------------------------------------------------------------------
out_csv <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
out_rds <- file.path("outputs", "result.rds")

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

write_csv(result, out_csv)
saveRDS(result, out_rds)
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)

})

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Input paths
#--------------------------------------------------------------------
in_pptx  <- file.path("inputs", "pptx.tsv")
in_title <- file.path("inputs", "title.tsv")

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
pptx_df  <- read_tsv(in_pptx,  col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
title_df <- read_tsv(in_title, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Derive mapping between clinical fields and slide title
# (aNCA clinical task contract – simple variable-name–based rule)
#--------------------------------------------------------------------
pptx_vars  <- pptx_df$x
title_vars <- title_df$title

# Priority mapping order for clinical slide title
priority_vars <- c("AVAL", "AVISITN", "USUBJID")

# For each pptx var, check if it matches any priority title var
mapping <- tibble(
  pptx_var = pptx_vars
) %>%
  mutate(
    matched_title_var = map_chr(
      pptx_var,
      ~ {
        cand <- priority_vars[priority_vars %in% title_vars &
                                priority_vars %in% .x]
        if (length(cand) == 0) NA_character_ else cand[1]
      }
    )
  )

# Choose slide title:
# - if any variable matches a priority title var, use that var name
# - otherwise, default to first title variable in title.tsv (if exists)
chosen_title <- mapping$matched_title_var[!is.na(mapping$matched_title_var)]
if (length(chosen_title) == 0) {
  if (nrow(title_df) > 0) {
    final_title <- title_df$title[1]
  } else {
    final_title <- NA_character_
  }
} else {
  final_title <- chosen_title[1]
}

result <- tibble(
  slide_title = final_title
)

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Outputs
#--------------------------------------------------------------------

out_rds <- file.path("outputs", "result.rds")

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

write_csv(result, out_csv)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
})

# Directories
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Read inputs
plot_df       <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "plot.tsv"), col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
quarto_df     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "quarto_path.tsv"), col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
use_plotly_df <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "use_plotly.tsv"), col_types = cols(.default = "c"))

# Harmonize column name for joining
colnames(plot_df)       <- "key"
colnames(quarto_df)     <- "key"
colnames(use_plotly_df) <- "key"

# Combine to create a clinical task contract for an SL plot Quarto markdown
result <- plot_df %>%
  full_join(quarto_df,  by = "key") %>%
  full_join(use_plotly_df, by = "key") %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(key) %>%
  mutate(
    field_type = case_when(
      key %in% c("AVAL")   ~ "numeric",
      key %in% c("AVISITN") ~ "integer",
      key %in% c("USUBJID") ~ "string",
      TRUE ~ "string"
    ),
    role = case_when(
      key == "AVAL"    ~ "y",
      key == "AVISITN" ~ "x",
      key == "USUBJID" ~ "id",
      TRUE ~ "meta"
    ),
    use_plotly = if_else(key %in% use_plotly_df$key, TRUE, FALSE),
    quarto_path = if_else(key %in% quarto_df$key, "sl_plot.qmd", NA_character_)
  )

# Write output
write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

# Load required packages
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
})

# Input paths
plot_expr_path  <- file.path("inputs", "plot_expr.tsv")
use_plotly_path <- file.path("inputs", "use_plotly.tsv")

# Output path
out_path <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read inputs
plot_expr  <- read_tsv(plot_expr_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
use_plotly <- read_tsv(use_plotly_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Construct Quarto markdown chunk for the aNCA clinical task contract
# Here we:
#  - create a code chunk header with optional Plotly use
#  - add aesthetics mapping referencing AVAL, AVISITN, USUBJID
#  - add geom points tied to the requested clinical variables
use_plotly_flag <- TRUE
if ("use_plotly" %in% names(use_plotly)) {
  # use_plotly.tsv: single column listing fields to include;
  # if "use_plotly" is present as a field name, we interpret as TRUE
  use_plotly_flag <- TRUE
}

plot_vars <- plot_expr$x

chunk_header <- if (use_plotly_flag) {
  "```{r aNCA_clinical_plot, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}\n"
} else {
  "```{r aNCA_clinical_plot, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}\n"
}

chunk_body <- c(
  "library(ggplot2)",
  "library(dplyr)",
  "",
  "# aNCA clinical task contract: expects AVAL, AVISITN, USUBJID in dataset `adnca`",
  "p <- ggplot(adnca, aes(x = AVISITN, y = AVAL, color = USUBJID)) +",
  "  geom_line(alpha = 0.6) +",
  "  geom_point() +",
  sprintf("  labs(x = 'Visit (AVISITN)', y = 'Endpoint (AVAL)', color = 'Subject (USUBJID)')"),
  "p"
)

if (use_plotly_flag) {
  chunk_body <- c(
    chunk_body,
    "",
    "if (requireNamespace('plotly', quietly = TRUE)) {",
    "  p <- plotly::ggplotly(p)",
    "}",
    "p"
  )
}

chunk_footer <- "```"

quarto_chunk <- c(
  chunk_header,
  paste0("# Clinical parameters: ", paste(plot_vars, collapse = ", ")),
  chunk_body,
  chunk_footer
)

# Prepare output as simple CSV with one column 'quarto_markdown'
result <- tibble(quarto_markdown = quarto_chunk)

# Ensure outputs directory exists
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Write result
write_csv(result, out_path)
```

# Read inputs
plot_expr  <- read_tsv(plot_expr_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
use_plotly <- read_tsv(use_plotly_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Construct Quarto markdown chunk for the aNCA clinical task contract
# Here we:
#  - create a code chunk header with optional Plotly use
#  - add aesthetics mapping referencing AVAL, AVISITN, USUBJID
#  - add geom points tied to the requested clinical variables
use_plotly_flag <- TRUE
if ("use_plotly" %in% names(use_plotly)) {
  # use_plotly.tsv: single column listing fields to include;
  # if "use_plotly" is present as a field name, we interpret as TRUE
  use_plotly_flag <- TRUE
}

plot_vars <- plot_expr$x

chunk_header <- if (use_plotly_flag) {
  "```{r aNCA_clinical_plot, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}\n"
} else {
  "```{r aNCA_clinical_plot, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}\n"
}

chunk_body <- c(
  "library(ggplot2)",
  "library(dplyr)",
  "",
  "# aNCA clinical task contract: expects AVAL, AVISITN, USUBJID in dataset `adnca`",
  "p <- ggplot(adnca, aes(x = AVISITN, y = AVAL, color = USUBJID)) +",
  "  geom_line(alpha = 0.6) +",
  "  geom_point() +",
  sprintf("  labs(x = 'Visit (AVISITN)', y = 'Endpoint (AVAL)', color = 'Subject (USUBJID)')"),
  "p"
)

if (use_plotly_flag) {
  chunk_body <- c(
    chunk_body,
    "",
    "if (requireNamespace('plotly', quietly = TRUE)) {",
    "  p <- plotly::ggplotly(p)",
    "}",
    "p"
  )
}

chunk_footer <- "```"

quarto_chunk <- c(
  chunk_header,
  paste0("# Clinical parameters: ", paste(plot_vars, collapse = ", ")),
  chunk_body,
  chunk_footer
)

# Prepare output as simple CSV with one column 'quarto_markdown'
result <- tibble(quarto_markdown = quarto_chunk)

# Ensure outputs directory exists
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Write result
write_csv(result, out_path)

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(stringr)
})

# Paths
data_path    <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
filters_path <- file.path("inputs", "filters.tsv")
out_dir      <- "outputs"
out_path     <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) {
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

# Read data
data <- read_tsv(
  data_path,
  col_types = cols(.default = col_guess())
)

# Read filters (skip header, concatenate into single expression)
filters_tbl <- read_tsv(
  filters_path,
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

filter_expr <- filters_tbl$filter
filter_expr <- filter_expr[!is.na(filter_expr) & nzchar(filter_expr)]
filter_expr <- paste(filter_expr, collapse = " & ")

# If there is a non-empty filter, apply it; otherwise keep all
if (!is.null(filter_expr) && nzchar(filter_expr)) {
  data_filtered <- data %>% filter(!!rlang::parse_expr(filter_expr))
} else {
  data_filtered <- data
}

# Write output
write_csv(data_filtered, out_path, na = "")
```

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
})

# Input paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

df1_path        <- file.path(in_dir, "df1.tsv")
df2_path        <- file.path(in_dir, "df2.tsv")
plot_path       <- file.path(in_dir, "plot.tsv")
quarto_path_in  <- file.path(in_dir, "quarto_path.tsv")
use_plotly_path <- file.path(in_dir, "use_plotly.tsv")

# Read TSVs (first column is a dummy header per preview)
read_single_col <- function(path, colname) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(NA_character_)
  x <- read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  if (!colname %in% names(x)) return(NA_character_)
  x[[colname]][1]
}

df1_name        <- read_single_col(df1_path, "df1")
df2_name        <- read_single_col(df2_path, "df2")
plot_name       <- read_single_col(plot_path, "plot")
quarto_path_val <- read_single_col(quarto_path_in, "quarto_path")
use_plotly_val  <- read_single_col(use_plotly_path, "use_plotly")

# Default / normalize values
if (is.na(df1_name))        df1_name        <- "df1"
if (is.na(df2_name))        df2_name        <- "df2"
if (is.na(plot_name))       plot_name       <- "plot"
if (is.na(quarto_path_val)) quarto_path_val <- "report.qmd"
if (is.na(use_plotly_val))  use_plotly_val  <- "FALSE"

use_plotly_flag <- tolower(use_plotly_val) %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y")

# Build Quarto YAML and body
yaml_lines <- c(
  "---",
  "title: \"aNCA Clinical Task Contract Report\"",
  "format:",
  "  html:",
  paste0("    df-print: ", if (use_plotly_flag) "paged" else "kable"),
  "---",
  ""
)

# Chunk for libraries and data
setup_chunk <- c(
  "```{r setup, include=FALSE}",
  "library(dplyr)",
  "library(ggplot2)",
  if (use_plotly_flag) "library(plotly)" else NULL,
  "",
  "# Placeholder data frames (replace with real data loading as needed)",
  paste0(df1_name, " <- data.frame(USUBJID = character(), AVISITN = numeric(), AVAL = numeric())"),
  paste0(df2_name, " <- data.frame(USUBJID = character(), AVISITN = numeric(), AVAL = numeric())"),
  paste0(plot_name, " <- data.frame(USUBJID = character(), AVISITN = numeric(), AVAL = numeric())"),
  "```",
  ""
)

# Plottable table chunk
table_chunk <- c(
  "## Plottable Table",
  "",
  "```{r plottable-table}",
  paste0("tbl <- ", df1_name, " %>%",
         " dplyr::inner_join(", df2_name, ", by = c(\"USUBJID\", \"AVISITN\", \"AVAL\"))"),
  "tbl",
  "```",
  ""
)

# Plot chunk
plot_chunk <- c(
  "## Plot",
  "",
  if (use_plotly_flag) {
    c(
      "```{r interactive-plot}",
      paste0("p <- ggplot(", plot_name, ", aes(x = AVISITN, y = AVAL, group = USUBJID, color = USUBJID)) +"),
      "  geom_line() +",
      "  geom_point() +",
      "  theme_minimal()",
      "plotly::ggplotly(p)",
      "```",
      ""
    )
  } else {
    c(
      "```{r static-plot}",
      paste0("ggplot(", plot_name, ", aes(x = AVISITN, y = AVAL, group = USUBJID, color = USUBJID)) +"),
      "  geom_line() +",
      "  geom_point() +",
      "  theme_minimal()",
      "```",
      ""
    )
  }
)

# Write Quarto file
quarto_out_path <- file.path(out_dir, basename(quarto_path_val))
writeLines(c(yaml_lines, setup_chunk, table_chunk, plot_chunk), quarto_out_path)

# Prepare result.csv summary
result_df <- tibble::tibble(
  key   = c("df1_name", "df2_name", "plot_name", "quarto_path", "use_plotly", "quarto_generated"),
  value = c(df1_name,
            df2_name,
            plot_name,
            quarto_out_path,
            as.character(use_plotly_flag),
            if (file.exists(quarto_out_path)) "TRUE" else "FALSE")
)

write_csv(result_df, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))

solution:
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
})

# Input paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

df1_path        <- file.path(in_dir, "df1.tsv")
df2_path        <- file.path(in_dir, "df2.tsv")
plot_path       <- file.path(in_dir, "plot.tsv")
quarto_path_in  <- file.path(in_dir, "quarto_path.tsv")
use_plotly_path <- file.path(in_dir, "use_plotly.tsv")

# Read TSVs (first column is a dummy header per preview)
read_single_col <- function(path, colname) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(NA_character_)
  x <- read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  if (!colname %in% names(x)) return(NA_character_)
  x[[colname]][1]
}

df1_name        <- read_single_col(df1_path, "df1")
df2_name        <- read_single_col(df2_path, "df2")
plot_name       <- read_single_col(plot_path, "plot")
quarto_path_val <- read_single_col(quarto_path_in, "quarto_path")
use_plotly_val  <- read_single_col(use_plotly_path, "use_plotly")

# Default / normalize values
if (is.na(df1_name))        df1_name        <- "df1"
if (is.na(df2_name))        df2_name        <- "df2"
if (is.na(plot_name))       plot_name       <- "plot"
if (is.na(quarto_path_val)) quarto_path_val <- "report.qmd"
if (is.na(use_plotly_val))  use_plotly_val  <- "FALSE"

use_plotly_flag <- tolower(use_plotly_val) %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y")

# Build Quarto YAML and body
yaml_lines <- c(
  "---",
  "title: \"aNCA Clinical Task Contract Report\"",
  "format:",
  "  html:",
  paste0("    df-print: ", if (use_plotly_flag) "paged" else "kable"),
  "---",
  ""
)

# Chunk for libraries and data
setup_chunk <- c(
  "```{r setup, include=FALSE}",
  "library(dplyr)",
  "library(ggplot2)",
  if (use_plotly_flag) "library(plotly)" else NULL,
  "",
  "# Placeholder data frames (replace with real data loading as needed)",
  paste0(df1_name, " <- data.frame(USUBJID = character(), AVISITN = numeric(), AVAL = numeric())"),
  paste0(df2_name, " <- data.frame(USUBJID = character(), AVISITN = numeric(), AVAL = numeric())"),
  paste0(plot_name, " <- data.frame(USUBJID = character(), AVISITN = numeric(), AVAL = numeric())"),
  "```",
  ""
)

# Plottable table chunk
table_chunk <- c(
  "## Plottable Table",
  "",
  "```{r plottable-table}",
  paste0("tbl <- ", df1_name, " %>%",
         " dplyr::inner_join(", df2_name, ", by = c(\"USUBJID\", \"AVISITN\", \"AVAL\"))"),
  "tbl",
  "```",
  ""
)

# Plot chunk
plot_chunk <- c(
  "## Plot",
  "",
  if (use_plotly_flag) {
    c(
      "```{r interactive-plot}",
      paste0("p <- ggplot(", plot_name, ", aes(x = AVISITN, y = AVAL, group = USUBJID, color = USUBJID)) +"),
      "  geom_line() +",
      "  geom_point() +",
      "  theme_minimal()",
      "plotly::ggplotly(p)",
      "```",
      ""
    )
  } else {
    c(
      "```{r static-plot}",
      paste0("ggplot(", plot_name, ", aes(x = AVISITN, y = AVAL, group = USUBJID, color = USUBJID)) +"),
      "  geom_line() +",
      "  geom_point() +",
      "  theme_minimal()",
      "```",
      ""
    )
  }
)

# Write Quarto file
quarto_out_path <- file.path(out_dir, basename(quarto_path_val))
writeLines(c(yaml_lines, setup_chunk, table_chunk, plot_chunk), quarto_out_path)

# Prepare result.csv summary
result_df <- tibble::tibble(
  key   = c("df1_name", "df2_name", "plot_name", "quarto_path", "use_plotly", "quarto_generated"),
  value = c(df1_name,
            df2_name,
            plot_name,
            quarto_out_path,
            as.character(use_plotly_flag),
            if (file.exists(quarto_out_path)) "TRUE" else "FALSE")
)

write_csv(result_df, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

# Directories
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
data_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "data.tsv")
labels_path <- file.path(in_dir, "labels_df.tsv")
type_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "type.tsv")

dat   <- read_tsv(data_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_guess()))
labels_df <- read_tsv(labels_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
types <- read_tsv(type_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))

# Prepare label list: each id is both name and label
label_ids <- labels_df$id
label_list <- as.list(label_ids)
names(label_list) <- label_ids

# Apply labels via attributes
for (nm in names(label_list)) {
  if (nm %in% names(dat)) {
    attr(dat[[nm]], "label") <- label_list[[nm]]
  }
}

# Apply overall type if provided (single row, single column "type")
if ("type" %in% names(types) && nrow(types) == 1) {
  target_type <- types$type[[1]]
  if (!is.na(target_type) && target_type != "") {
    # Convert all columns to the requested type where reasonable
    conv_fun <- switch(
      target_type,
      "character" = as.character,
      "numeric"   = as.numeric,
      "integer"   = as.integer,
      "logical"   = as.logical,
      NULL
    )
    if (!is.null(conv_fun)) {
      dat <- dat %>%
        mutate(across(everything(), ~ conv_fun(.x)))
    }
  }
}

# Write outputs
result_csv_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")
result_rds_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.rds")

write_csv(dat, result_csv_path)
saveRDS(dat, result_rds_path)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

# Directories
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
data_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "data.tsv")
labels_path <- file.path(in_dir, "labels_df.tsv")
type_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "type.tsv")

dat   <- read_tsv(data_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_guess()))
labels_df <- read_tsv(labels_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
types <- read_tsv(type_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))

# Prepare label list: each id is both name and label
label_ids <- labels_df$id
label_list <- as.list(label_ids)
names(label_list) <- label_ids

# Apply labels via attributes
for (nm in names(label_list)) {
  if (nm %in% names(dat)) {
    attr(dat[[nm]], "label") <- label_list[[nm]]
  }
}

# Apply overall type if provided (single row, single column "type")
if ("type" %in% names(types) && nrow(types) == 1) {
  target_type <- types$type[[1]]
  if (!is.na(target_type) && target_type != "") {
    # Convert all columns to the requested type where reasonable
    conv_fun <- switch(
      target_type,
      "character" = as.character,
      "numeric"   = as.numeric,
      "integer"   = as.integer,
      "logical"   = as.logical,
      NULL
    )
    if (!is.null(conv_fun)) {
      dat <- dat %>%
        mutate(across(everything(), ~ conv_fun(.x)))
    }
  }
}

# Write outputs
result_csv_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")
result_rds_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.rds")

write_csv(dat, result_csv_path)
saveRDS(dat, result_rds_path)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

# Directories
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read input files
f_aucs_path  <- file.path(in_dir, "f_aucs.tsv")
res_nca_path <- file.path(in_dir, "res_nca.tsv")

f_aucs  <- read_tsv(f_aucs_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
res_nca <- read_tsv(res_nca_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))

# Select common columns between res_nca and f_aucs header
common_cols <- intersect(names(res_nca), names(f_aucs))
result <- res_nca %>% select(all_of(common_cols))

# Write output
out_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")
write_csv(result, out_path)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

# Directories
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

# Read inputs
dataset_path       <- file.path(in_dir, "dataset.tsv")
desired_order_path <- file.path(in_dir, "desired_order.tsv")
mapping_path       <- file.path(in_dir, "mapping.tsv")
req_map_path       <- file.path(in_dir, "req_mappings.tsv")
silent_path        <- file.path(in_dir, "silent.tsv")

dataset       <- fread(dataset_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"))
desired_order <- fread(desired_order_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"))
mapping       <- fread(mapping_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"))
req_mapping   <- fread(req_map_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"))
silent        <- fread(silent_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"))

# Extract vectors
desired_cols <- na.omit(desired_order[[1]])
map_cols     <- na.omit(mapping[[1]])
req_cols     <- na.omit(req_mapping[[1]])
silent_cols  <- na.omit(silent[[1]])

# Ensure required mappings are present
missing_req <- setdiff(req_cols, names(dataset))
if (length(missing_req) > 0) {
  stop("Missing required mapping columns in dataset: ", paste(missing_req, collapse = ", "))
}

# Subset to mapping columns (keep only those present)
present_map_cols <- intersect(map_cols, names(dataset))
mapped_dt <- dataset[, ..present_map_cols]

# Apply desired order: first desired columns (if present), then remaining mapped columns
ordered_cols <- c(
  intersect(desired_cols, names(mapped_dt)),
  setdiff(names(mapped_dt), desired_cols)
)
mapped_dt <- mapped_dt[, ..ordered_cols]

# Optionally drop silent columns (if they exist in current table)
drop_silent <- intersect(silent_cols, names(mapped_dt))
if (length(drop_silent) > 0) {
  mapped_dt[, (drop_silent) := NULL]
}

# Write result
fwrite(mapped_dt, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), sep = ",", quote = TRUE, na = "")

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

# Directories
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
dataset_path       <- file.path(in_dir, "dataset.tsv")
desired_order_path <- file.path(in_dir, "desired_order.tsv")
mapping_path       <- file.path(in_dir, "mapping.tsv")
req_map_path       <- file.path(in_dir, "req_mappings.tsv")
silent_path        <- file.path(in_dir, "silent.tsv")

dataset       <- fread(dataset_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"))
desired_order <- fread(desired_order_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"))
mapping       <- fread(mapping_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"))
req_mapping   <- fread(req_map_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"))
silent        <- fread(silent_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"))

# Extract vectors
desired_cols <- na.omit(desired_order[[1]])
map_cols     <- na.omit(mapping[[1]])
req_cols     <- na.omit(req_mapping[[1]])
silent_cols  <- na.omit(silent[[1]])

# Ensure required mappings are present
missing_req <- setdiff(req_cols, names(dataset))
if (length(missing_req) > 0) {
  stop("Missing required mapping columns in dataset: ", paste(missing_req, collapse = ", "))
}

# Subset to mapping columns (keep only those present)
present_map_cols <- intersect(map_cols, names(dataset))
mapped_dt <- dataset[, ..present_map_cols]

# Apply desired order: first desired columns (if present), then remaining mapped columns
ordered_cols <- c(
  intersect(desired_cols, names(mapped_dt)),
  setdiff(names(mapped_dt), desired_cols)
)
mapped_dt <- mapped_dt[, ..ordered_cols]

# Optionally drop silent columns (if they exist in current table)
drop_silent <- intersect(silent_cols, names(mapped_dt))
if (length(drop_silent) > 0) {
  mapped_dt[, (drop_silent) := NULL]
}

# Write result
fwrite(mapped_dt, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), sep = ",", quote = TRUE, na = "")

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)

# Input paths
a_path <- file.path("inputs", "a.tsv")
b_path <- file.path("inputs", "b.tsv")

# Output path
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)
out_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")

# Read inputs
a <- read_tsv(a_path, col_types = cols())
b <- read_tsv(b_path, col_types = cols())

# Extract by-vars as character vector
by_vars <- b %>%
  pull(by_vars) %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  as.character()

# Check that all by_vars exist in a
missing_vars <- setdiff(by_vars, names(a))
if (length(missing_vars) > 0) {
  stop("Variables listed in b.tsv not found in a.tsv: ",
       paste(missing_vars, collapse = ", "))
}

# For aNCA "assert subset", create all combinations of by_vars from a
# and flag which exist. This is a minimal generic implementation.
# Get distinct rows for by_vars present in a
distinct_comb <- a %>%
  distinct(across(all_of(by_vars)))

# Cross join of observed combinations with themselves as "expected"
expected_comb <- distinct_comb

# Left join to verify subset relationship (a ⊆ expected)
check_tbl <- distinct_comb %>%
  left_join(expected_comb,
            by = by_vars,
            suffix = c("_a", "_exp")) %>%
  mutate(
    ASSERTION = if_else(
      if_all(all_of(by_vars), ~ !is.na(.x)),
      "PASS",
      "FAIL"
    )
  )

# Summarize assertion at dataset level
assert_summary <- tibble(
  ASSERTION_TYPE = "subset",
  BY_VARS = paste(by_vars, collapse = ","),
  STATUS = if (all(check_tbl$ASSERTION == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
  N_COMBINATIONS = nrow(distinct_comb)
)

# Write result
write_csv(assert_summary, out_path)
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)

# Input paths
a_path <- file.path("inputs", "a.tsv")
b_path <- file.path("inputs", "b.tsv")

# Output path
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)
out_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")

# Read inputs
a <- read_tsv(a_path, col_types = cols())
b <- read_tsv(b_path, col_types = cols())

# Extract by-vars as character vector
by_vars <- b %>%
  pull(by_vars) %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  as.character()

# Check that all by_vars exist in a
missing_vars <- setdiff(by_vars, names(a))
if (length(missing_vars) > 0) {
  stop("Variables listed in b.tsv not found in a.tsv: ",
       paste(missing_vars, collapse = ", "))
}

# For aNCA "assert subset", create all combinations of by_vars from a
# and flag which exist. This is a minimal generic implementation.
# Get distinct rows for by_vars present in a
distinct_comb <- a %>%
  distinct(across(all_of(by_vars)))

# Cross join of observed combinations with themselves as "expected"
expected_comb <- distinct_comb

# Left join to verify subset relationship (a ⊆ expected)
check_tbl <- distinct_comb %>%
  left_join(expected_comb,
            by = by_vars,
            suffix = c("_a", "_exp")) %>%
  mutate(
    ASSERTION = if_else(
      if_all(all_of(by_vars), ~ !is.na(.x)),
      "PASS",
      "FAIL"
    )
  )

# Summarize assertion at dataset level
assert_summary <- tibble(
  ASSERTION_TYPE = "subset",
  BY_VARS = paste(by_vars, collapse = ","),
  STATUS = if (all(check_tbl$ASSERTION == "PASS")) "PASS" else "FAIL",
  N_COMBINATIONS = nrow(distinct_comb)
)

# Write result
write_csv(assert_summary, out_path)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

# Directories
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
indent      <- fread(file.path(in_dir, "indent.tsv"), header = TRUE)$indent
max_per     <- fread(file.path(in_dir, "max_per_line.tsv"), header = TRUE)$x
min_to_rep  <- fread(file.path(in_dir, "min_to_rep.tsv"), header = TRUE)$min_to_rep
obj         <- fread(file.path(in_dir, "obj.tsv"), header = TRUE)$obj

# Build call
call_list <- list(
  indent      = indent,
  max_per_line = max_per,
  min_to_rep  = min_to_rep,
  obj         = obj
)

# Clean deparse: single-line, no quotes, controlled spacing
# Here we collapse vectors by space, and use named arguments
fmt_vec <- function(x) paste(x, collapse = " ")

call_str <- sprintf(
  "aNCA_task(indent = %s, max_per_line = %s, min_to_rep = %s, obj = %s)",
  fmt_vec(indent),
  fmt_vec(max_per),
  fmt_vec(min_to_rep),
  fmt_vec(obj)
)

# Write result
fwrite(
  data.table(result = call_str),
  file = file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")
)

  library(dplyr)
})

# Paths
input_dir  <- "inputs"
output_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
format_path  <- file.path(input_dir, "format.tsv")
library_path <- file.path(input_dir, "library.tsv")

format_df <- read_tsv(format_path, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
library_df <- read_tsv(library_path, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))

# Extract variable lists
format_vars  <- format_df[[1]] %>% unique() %>% na.omit()
library_vars <- library_df[[1]] %>% unique() %>% na.omit()

# Determine missing and extra dependencies
missing_in_library <- setdiff(format_vars, library_vars)
extra_in_library   <- setdiff(library_vars, format_vars)

# Build result data frame following aNCA clinical task contract style
result <- bind_rows(
  tibble(
    type    = if (length(missing_in_library) > 0) "ERROR" else "INFO",
    code    = if (length(missing_in_library) > 0) "MISSING_DEPENDENCY" else "ALL_DEPENDENCIES_PRESENT",
    message = if (length(missing_in_library) > 0) {
      paste0("Dependencies required by format but missing in library: ",
             paste(missing_in_library, collapse = ", "))
    } else {
      "All dependencies required by format are present in library."
    },
    detail  = NA_character_
  ),
  if (length(extra_in_library) > 0) {
    tibble(
      type    = "WARNING",
      code    = "EXTRA_DEPENDENCY",
      message = "Dependencies present in library but not required by format.",
      detail  = paste(extra_in_library, collapse = ", ")
    )
  } else {
    tibble(
      type    = "INFO",
      code    = "NO_EXTRA_DEPENDENCY",
      message = "No extra dependencies found in library.",
      detail  = NA_character_
    )
  }
)

# Write result
out_path <- file.path(output_dir, "result.csv")
write_csv(result, out_path, na = "")
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(stringr)
})

# Directories
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
unit_df  <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "unit.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
value_df <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "value.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# Extract unit and expression
time_unit <- unit_df$time_unit[1]
set_expr  <- value_df$set_values_to[1]

# Map time unit to ISO 8601 duration designator
iso_dur <- tolower(time_unit) %>%
  str_trim()

iso_dur <- dplyr::case_when(
  iso_dur %in% c("minute", "minutes", "min", "mins") ~ "PT1M",
  iso_dur %in% c("hour", "hours", "hr", "hrs")       ~ "PT1H",
  iso_dur %in% c("second", "seconds", "sec", "secs") ~ "PT1S",
  iso_dur %in% c("day", "days", "d")                 ~ "P1D",
  iso_dur %in% c("week", "weeks", "wk", "wks")       ~ "P1W",
  iso_dur %in% c("month", "months", "mo", "mos")     ~ "P1M",
  iso_dur %in% c("year", "years", "yr", "yrs")       ~ "P1Y",
  TRUE                                               ~ NA_character_
)

result <- tibble::tibble(
  time_unit          = time_unit,
  iso_8601_duration  = iso_dur,
  set_values_to      = set_expr
)

write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(PKNCA)
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

dir_inputs  <- "inputs"
dir_outputs <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(dir_outputs)) dir.create(dir_outputs, recursive = TRUE)

excl_file  <- file.path(dir_inputs,  "check_exclusion_has_reason.tsv")
pknca_file <- file.path(dir_inputs,  "processed_pknca_data.tsv")

check_excl <- read_tsv(excl_file, show_col_types = FALSE, col_names = TRUE)
pknca_raw  <- read_tsv(pknca_file,  show_col_types = FALSE, col_names = TRUE)

vars_to_check <- check_excl[[1]]

pknca_filtered <- pknca_raw %>%
  filter(PARAMCD %in% vars_to_check)

## Build a minimal concentration-time like dataset for PKNCA validation
## Use ADT as time, AVAL as concentration; USUBJID as subject, PARAMCD as analyte
## PKNCA check is mainly structure/required columns; values are placeholders.
pknca_data <- pknca_filtered %>%
  mutate(
    TIME = as.numeric(as.Date(ADT) - min(as.Date(ADT), na.rm = TRUE)),
    CONC = AVAL
  ) %>%
  select(USUBJID, PARAMCD, TIME, CONC)

colnames(pknca_data) <- c("subject", "analyte", "time", "conc")

pknca_obj <- PKNCAconc(pknca_data, conc ~ time | subject/analyte)

chk <- check.pkdata(pknca_obj)

res_df <- tibble(
  check_name = names(chk),
  passed     = vapply(chk, function(x) isTRUE(attr(x, "passed")), logical(1)),
  message    = vapply(chk, function(x) paste0(x, collapse = "; "), character(1))
)

write_csv(res_df, file.path(dir_outputs, "result.csv"))
saveRDS(list(
  checks      = chk,
  summary_tbl = res_df,
  data_used   = pknca_data
), file.path(dir_outputs, "result.rds"))
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(PKNCA)
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

dir_inputs  <- "inputs"
dir_outputs <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(dir_outputs)) dir.create(dir_outputs, recursive = TRUE)

excl_file  <- file.path(dir_inputs,  "check_exclusion_has_reason.tsv")
pknca_file <- file.path(dir_inputs,  "processed_pknca_data.tsv")

check_excl <- read_tsv(excl_file, show_col_types = FALSE, col_names = TRUE)
pknca_raw  <- read_tsv(pknca_file,  show_col_types = FALSE, col_names = TRUE)

vars_to_check <- check_excl[[1]]

pknca_filtered <- pknca_raw %>%
  filter(PARAMCD %in% vars_to_check)

## Build a minimal concentration-time like dataset for PKNCA validation
## Use ADT as time, AVAL as concentration; USUBJID as subject, PARAMCD as analyte
## PKNCA check is mainly structure/required columns; values are placeholders.
pknca_data <- pknca_filtered %>%
  mutate(
    TIME = as.numeric(as.Date(ADT) - min(as.Date(ADT), na.rm = TRUE)),
    CONC = AVAL
  ) %>%
  select(USUBJID, PARAMCD, TIME, CONC)

colnames(pknca_data) <- c("subject", "analyte", "time", "conc")

pknca_obj <- PKNCAconc(pknca_data, conc ~ time | subject/analyte)

chk <- check.pkdata(pknca_obj)

res_df <- tibble(
  check_name = names(chk),
  passed     = vapply(chk, function(x) isTRUE(attr(x, "passed")), logical(1)),
  message    = vapply(chk, function(x) paste0(x, collapse = "; "), character(1))
)

write_csv(res_df, file.path(dir_outputs, "result.csv"))
saveRDS(list(
  checks      = chk,
  summary_tbl = res_df,
  data_used   = pknca_data
), file.path(dir_outputs, "result.rds"))

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(data.table)

# Paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
dataset     <- fread(file.path(in_dir, "dataset.tsv"), sep = "\t", header = TRUE, na.strings = c("", "NA"))
metab_spec  <- fread(file.path(in_dir, "metabolites.tsv"), sep = "\t", header = TRUE)

# Get metabolite variable names (excluding header column name 'metabolites')
metab_vars <- metab_spec$metabolites
metab_vars <- metab_vars[metab_vars != "metabolites" & metab_vars != ""]

# Keep only specified metabolite variables that exist in dataset
keep_vars <- intersect(metab_vars, names(dataset))

# Also keep identifiers needed for contract
id_vars <- c("USUBJID", "STUDYID", "PARAMCD", "PARAM", "ADT", "AVISIT", "AVISITN")
id_vars <- id_vars[id_vars %in% names(dataset)]

result <- dataset[, c(id_vars, keep_vars), with = FALSE]

# Write result
fwrite(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(stringr)
  library(tidyr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
avalu   <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "avalu.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
df      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "df.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
volume  <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "volume.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
volumeu <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "volumeu.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# Ensure common keys exist
common_keys <- intersect(intersect(colnames(avalu), colnames(volume)),
                         colnames(volumeu))
if (!("USUBJID" %in% common_keys)) {
  stop("USUBJID must be present in all input tables for merging.")
}

# Basic join of value, unit and original volume metadata
res <- avalu %>%
  rename(AVAL_VOL = AVAL) %>%
  inner_join(volume,  by = common_keys, suffix = c("_VAL", "_VOL")) %>%
  inner_join(volumeu, by = common_keys, suffix = c("", "_U")) %>%
  rename(AVALU = AVAL)   # assume unit column name in volumeu is AVAL

# Parse df.tsv for set_values_to and expressions (aNCA-style contract)
# Here we just carry DTYPE (if given) and any other metadata in df
if ("set_values_to" %in% names(df)) {
  # Very minimal parser: look for exprs(DTYPE = 'XXX')
  expr_row <- df$set_values_to[grepl("exprs", df$set_values_to)]
  if (length(expr_row) > 0) {
    m <- str_match(expr_row, "DTYPE\\s*=\\s*'([^']+)'")
    if (!is.na(m[1, 2])) {
      res$DTYPE <- m[1, 2]
    }
  }
}

# For this skeleton, we do not know actual unit conversion mapping.
# Preserve the numeric volume in AVAL and unit in AVALU from joined tables.
# If AVAL_VOL exists (from avalu), prefer that as clinical AVAL, otherwise use AVAL from volume.
if ("AVAL_VOL" %in% names(res) && is.numeric(res$AVAL_VOL)) {
  res$AVAL <- res$AVAL_VOL
} else if ("AVAL_VAL" %in% names(res) && is.numeric(res$AVAL_VAL)) {
  res$AVAL <- res$AVAL_VAL
}

# Keep a simple, clinical-like output
out <- res %>%
  select(any_of(c(common_keys, "AVAL", "AVALU", "DTYPE"))) %>%
  distinct()

write_csv(out, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(officer)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

path_df     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "path.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
template_df <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "template.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
title_df    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "title.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# Harmonize column names
names(path_df)     <- tolower(names(path_df))
names(template_df) <- tolower(names(template_df))
names(title_df)    <- tolower(names(title_df))

# Assume each file has a single column describing clinical task contract fields
col_path     <- names(path_df)[1]
col_template <- names(template_df)[1]
col_title    <- names(title_df)[1]

df <- full_join(
  full_join(
    path_df  %>% mutate(source_path = !!sym(col_path)),
    template_df %>% mutate(source_template = !!sym(col_template)),
    by = setNames(col_template, col_path)
  ),
  title_df %>% mutate(source_title = !!sym(col_title)),
  by = setNames(col_title, col_path)
)

df <- df %>%
  rename(field = !!sym(col_path)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))

# Dummy metadata columns to mimic a clinical task contract mapping
result <- df %>%
  mutate(
    in_path     = !is.na(source_path),
    in_template = !is.na(source_template),
    in_title    = !is.na(source_title),
    status      = case_when(
      in_path & in_template & in_title ~ "OK",
      in_path & in_template & !in_title ~ "MISSING_TITLE",
      in_path & !in_template & in_title ~ "MISSING_TEMPLATE",
      !in_path & in_template & in_title ~ "MISSING_PATH",
      TRUE ~ "PARTIAL"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(field)

write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))
saveRDS(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))

# Create a simple PowerPoint summarizing the contract
ppt <- read_pptx()

ppt <- add_slide(ppt, layout = "Title Slide", master = "Office Theme")
ppt <- ph_with(ppt, value = "aNCA Clinical Task Contract", location = ph_location_type(type = "ctrTitle"))
ppt <- ph_with(ppt, value = format(Sys.Date()), location = ph_location_type(type = "subTitle"))

ppt <- add_slide(ppt, layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme")
ppt <- ph_with(ppt, value = "Field Summary", location = ph_location_type(type = "title"))

tbl <- result %>%
  select(field, in_path, in_template, in_title, status)

ppt <- ph_with(
  ppt,
  value = flextable::flextable(tbl),
  location = ph_location_type(type = "body")
)

print(ppt, target = file.path(out_dir, "aNCA_clinical_task_contract.pptx"))

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(officer)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

path_df     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "path.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
template_df <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "template.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
title_df    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "title.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# Harmonize column names
names(path_df)     <- tolower(names(path_df))
names(template_df) <- tolower(names(template_df))
names(title_df)    <- tolower(names(title_df))

# Assume each file has a single column describing clinical task contract fields
col_path     <- names(path_df)[1]
col_template <- names(template_df)[1]
col_title    <- names(title_df)[1]

df <- full_join(
  full_join(
    path_df  %>% mutate(source_path = !!sym(col_path)),
    template_df %>% mutate(source_template = !!sym(col_template)),
    by = setNames(col_template, col_path)
  ),
  title_df %>% mutate(source_title = !!sym(col_title)),
  by = setNames(col_title, col_path)
)

df <- df %>%
  rename(field = !!sym(col_path)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))

# Dummy metadata columns to mimic a clinical task contract mapping
result <- df %>%
  mutate(
    in_path     = !is.na(source_path),
    in_template = !is.na(source_template),
    in_title    = !is.na(source_title),
    status      = case_when(
      in_path & in_template & in_title ~ "OK",
      in_path & in_template & !in_title ~ "MISSING_TITLE",
      in_path & !in_template & in_title ~ "MISSING_TEMPLATE",
      !in_path & in_template & in_title ~ "MISSING_PATH",
      TRUE ~ "PARTIAL"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(field)

write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))
saveRDS(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))

# Create a simple PowerPoint summarizing the contract
ppt <- read_pptx()

ppt <- add_slide(ppt, layout = "Title Slide", master = "Office Theme")
ppt <- ph_with(ppt, value = "aNCA Clinical Task Contract", location = ph_location_type(type = "ctrTitle"))
ppt <- ph_with(ppt, value = format(Sys.Date()), location = ph_location_type(type = "subTitle"))

ppt <- add_slide(ppt, layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme")
ppt <- ph_with(ppt, value = "Field Summary", location = ph_location_type(type = "title"))

tbl <- result %>%
  select(field, in_path, in_template, in_title, status)

ppt <- ph_with(
  ppt,
  value = flextable::flextable(tbl),
  location = ph_location_type(type = "body")
)

print(ppt, target = file.path(out_dir, "aNCA_clinical_task_contract.pptx"))

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

# Create output directory if it does not exist
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Read input
inp_file <- file.path("inputs", "pknca_data.tsv")
dat <- read_tsv(inp_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

# ---- START IMPUTE (aNCA clinical task contract style) -----------------
# For each USUBJID, PARAMCD, AVISITN:
# - If AVAL is missing, impute using median AVAL across subjects
#   at same PARAMCD and AVISITN.
# - If still missing (all missing for that cell), use overall median
#   for that PARAMCD across visits.
# Preserve original rows and add IMPFL flag and IMPAVAL value.

dat_imputed <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    AVAL      = as.numeric(AVAL),
    AVISITN   = as.numeric(AVISITN)
  )

# Median by PARAMCD + AVISITN
med_by_visit <- dat_imputed %>%
  group_by(PARAMCD, AVISITN) %>%
  summarise(MED_AVAL_VIS = median(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(MED_AVAL_VIS = ifelse(is.nan(MED_AVAL_VIS), NA_real_, MED_AVAL_VIS))

# Overall median by PARAMCD
med_by_param <- dat_imputed %>%
  group_by(PARAMCD) %>%
  summarise(MED_AVAL_PAR = median(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(MED_AVAL_PAR = ifelse(is.nan(MED_AVAL_PAR), NA_real_, MED_AVAL_PAR))

dat_imputed <- dat_imputed %>%
  left_join(med_by_visit, by = c("PARAMCD", "AVISITN")) %>%
  left_join(med_by_param, by = "PARAMCD") %>%
  mutate(
    IMPAVAL = case_when(
      !is.na(AVAL) ~ AVAL,
      is.na(AVAL) & !is.na(MED_AVAL_VIS) ~ MED_AVAL_VIS,
      is.na(AVAL) & is.na(MED_AVAL_VIS) & !is.na(MED_AVAL_PAR) ~ MED_AVAL_PAR,
      TRUE ~ AVAL
    ),
    IMPFL = if_else(is.na(AVAL) & !is.na(IMPAVAL), "Y", "N")
  ) %>%
  select(-MED_AVAL_VIS, -MED_AVAL_PAR)

# Write outputs
out_csv <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
out_rds <- file.path("outputs", "result.rds")

write_csv(dat_imputed, out_csv, na = "")
saveRDS(dat_imputed, out_rds)

})

if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Read input
inp_file <- file.path("inputs", "pknca_data.tsv")
dat <- read_tsv(inp_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

# ---- START IMPUTE (aNCA clinical task contract style) -----------------
# For each USUBJID, PARAMCD, AVISITN:
# - If AVAL is missing, impute using median AVAL across subjects
#   at same PARAMCD and AVISITN.
# - If still missing (all missing for that cell), use overall median
#   for that PARAMCD across visits.
# Preserve original rows and add IMPFL flag and IMPAVAL value.

dat_imputed <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    AVAL      = as.numeric(AVAL),
    AVISITN   = as.numeric(AVISITN)
  )

# Median by PARAMCD + AVISITN
med_by_visit <- dat_imputed %>%
  group_by(PARAMCD, AVISITN) %>%
  summarise(MED_AVAL_VIS = median(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(MED_AVAL_VIS = ifelse(is.nan(MED_AVAL_VIS), NA_real_, MED_AVAL_VIS))

# Overall median by PARAMCD
med_by_param <- dat_imputed %>%
  group_by(PARAMCD) %>%
  summarise(MED_AVAL_PAR = median(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(MED_AVAL_PAR = ifelse(is.nan(MED_AVAL_PAR), NA_real_, MED_AVAL_PAR))

dat_imputed <- dat_imputed %>%
  left_join(med_by_visit, by = c("PARAMCD", "AVISITN")) %>%
  left_join(med_by_param, by = "PARAMCD") %>%
  mutate(
    IMPAVAL = case_when(
      !is.na(AVAL) ~ AVAL,
      is.na(AVAL) & !is.na(MED_AVAL_VIS) ~ MED_AVAL_VIS,
      is.na(AVAL) & is.na(MED_AVAL_VIS) & !is.na(MED_AVAL_PAR) ~ MED_AVAL_PAR,
      TRUE ~ AVAL
    ),
    IMPFL = if_else(is.na(AVAL) & !is.na(IMPAVAL), "Y", "N")
  ) %>%
  select(-MED_AVAL_VIS, -MED_AVAL_PAR)

# Write outputs
out_csv <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
out_rds <- file.path("outputs", "result.rds")

write_csv(dat_imputed, out_csv, na = "")
saveRDS(dat_imputed, out_rds)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

afrlt_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "afrlt.tsv")
arrlt_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "arrlt.tsv")
conc_path    <- file.path(in_dir, "conc_data.tsv")
dosno_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "dosno.tsv")
groups_path  <- file.path(in_dir, "groups.tsv")
nfrlt_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "nfrlt.tsv")
nrrlt_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "nrrlt.tsv")

afrlt  <- read_tsv(afrlt_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
arrlt  <- read_tsv(arrlt_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_double()))

dosno  <- read_tsv(dosno_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
groups <- read_tsv(groups_path,col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
nfrlt  <- read_tsv(nfrlt_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
nrrlt  <- read_tsv(nrrlt_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_double()))

conc_num <- conc %>%

    N_RECORDS = n(),

    RR   = arrlt$rr[(seq_len(dp_len) - 1) %% rr_len + 1],

  )

result <- dose_profile %>%
  arrange(USUBJID, AVISITN)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(tidyr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

afrlt_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "afrlt.tsv")
arrlt_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "arrlt.tsv")
conc_path    <- file.path(in_dir, "conc_data.tsv")
dosno_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "dosno.tsv")
groups_path  <- file.path(in_dir, "groups.tsv")
nfrlt_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "nfrlt.tsv")
nrrlt_path   <- file.path(in_dir, "nrrlt.tsv")

afrlt  <- read_tsv(afrlt_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
arrlt  <- read_tsv(arrlt_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_double()))
conc   <- read_tsv(conc_path,  col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
dosno  <- read_tsv(dosno_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
groups <- read_tsv(groups_path,col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
nfrlt  <- read_tsv(nfrlt_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
nrrlt  <- read_tsv(nrrlt_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_double()))

conc_num <- conc %>%
  mutate(
    AVAL    = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(AVAL)),
    AVISITN = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(AVISITN))
  )

# simple placeholder: compute mean concentration per subject/visit
dose_profile <- conc_num %>%
  group_by(USUBJID, AVISITN) %>%
  summarise(
    MEAN_CONC = mean(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    N_RECORDS = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# attach rr from arrlt and nrrlt as example duplicate dose profiles
rr_len   <- nrow(arrlt)
nrr_len  <- nrow(nrrlt)
dp_len   <- nrow(dose_profile)

dose_profile <- dose_profile %>%
  mutate(
    RR   = arrlt$rr[(seq_len(dp_len) - 1) %% rr_len + 1],
    NRR  = nrrlt$rr[(seq_len(dp_len) - 1) %% nrr_len + 1]
  )

result <- dose_profile %>%
  arrange(USUBJID, AVISITN)

write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(stringr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

data_path      <- file.path(in_dir, "data.tsv")
groups_path    <- file.path(in_dir, "groups.tsv")
metab_path     <- file.path(in_dir, "metabfl_column.tsv")
route_path     <- file.path(in_dir, "route_column.tsv")
volume_path    <- file.path(in_dir, "volume_column.tsv")
result_path    <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")

data <- read_tsv(data_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

groups <- read_tsv(groups_path, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  pull(1) |>
  discard(~ .x == "groups")

metab_cols <- read_tsv(metab_path, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  pull(1) |>
  discard(~ .x == "metabfl_column")

route_cols <- read_tsv(route_path, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  pull(1) |>
  discard(~ .x == "route_column")

volume_cols <- read_tsv(volume_path, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  pull(1) |>
  discard(~ .x == "volume_column")

cols_exist <- function(df, cols) cols[cols %in% names(df)]

group_cols  <- cols_exist(data, groups)
metab_cols  <- cols_exist(data, metab_cols)
route_cols  <- cols_exist(data, route_cols)
volume_cols <- cols_exist(data, volume_cols)

has_longitudinal_time <-
  ("AVISITN" %in% names(data) && n_distinct(data$AVISITN) > 2) ||
  ("AVISIT"  %in% names(data) && n_distinct(data$AVISIT)  > 2)

has_subjects <- "USUBJID" %in% names(data) && n_distinct(data$USUBJID) > 1

has_baseline <-
  ("ABLFL" %in% names(data) && any(data$ABLFL == "Y", na.rm = TRUE)) ||
  ("BASE"  %in% names(data))

has_change <-
  ("CHG"  %in% names(data))  ||
  ("PCHG" %in% names(data))

has_param <-
  ("PARAMCD" %in% names(data) && n_distinct(data$PARAMCD) > 1) ||
  ("PARAM"   %in% names(data) && n_distinct(data$PARAM)   > 1)

n_metab_cols  <- length(metab_cols)
n_route_cols  <- length(route_cols)
n_volume_cols <- length(volume_cols)

primary_group <- if (length(group_cols) == 0) NA_character_ else paste(group_cols, collapse = ",")

study_type <- "unknown"

if (has_subjects && has_longitudinal_time && has_param) {
  study_type <- "longitudinal_clinical"
} else if (has_subjects && has_param) {
  study_type <- "cross_sectional_clinical"
} else if (has_subjects) {
  study_type <- "subject_level"
}

if (n_metab_cols > 0 || n_route_cols > 0 || n_volume_cols > 0) {
  study_type <- paste0(study_type, "_with_dosing")
}

study_type <- str_replace_all(study_type, "^_+|_+$", "")

result <- tibble(
  study_type          = study_type,
  has_subjects        = has_subjects,
  has_longitudinal    = has_longitudinal_time,
  has_baseline        = has_baseline,
  has_change          = has_change,
  has_multiple_param  = has_param,
  primary_group_cols  = primary_group,
  n_metab_columns     = n_metab_cols,
  metab_columns       = if (n_metab_cols == 0) NA_character_ else paste(metab_cols, collapse = ","),
  n_route_columns     = n_route_cols,
  route_columns       = if (n_route_cols == 0) NA_character_ else paste(route_cols, collapse = ","),
  n_volume_columns    = n_volume_cols,
  volume_columns      = if (n_volume_cols == 0) NA_character_ else paste(volume_cols, collapse = ",")
)

write_csv(result, result_path)
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(stringr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

data_path      <- file.path(in_dir, "data.tsv")
groups_path    <- file.path(in_dir, "groups.tsv")
metab_path     <- file.path(in_dir, "metabfl_column.tsv")
route_path     <- file.path(in_dir, "route_column.tsv")
volume_path    <- file.path(in_dir, "volume_column.tsv")
result_path    <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")

data <- read_tsv(data_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

groups <- read_tsv(groups_path, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  pull(1) |>
  discard(~ .x == "groups")

metab_cols <- read_tsv(metab_path, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  pull(1) |>
  discard(~ .x == "metabfl_column")

route_cols <- read_tsv(route_path, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  pull(1) |>
  discard(~ .x == "route_column")

volume_cols <- read_tsv(volume_path, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  pull(1) |>
  discard(~ .x == "volume_column")

cols_exist <- function(df, cols) cols[cols %in% names(df)]

group_cols  <- cols_exist(data, groups)
metab_cols  <- cols_exist(data, metab_cols)
route_cols  <- cols_exist(data, route_cols)
volume_cols <- cols_exist(data, volume_cols)

has_longitudinal_time <-
  ("AVISITN" %in% names(data) && n_distinct(data$AVISITN) > 2) ||
  ("AVISIT"  %in% names(data) && n_distinct(data$AVISIT)  > 2)

has_subjects <- "USUBJID" %in% names(data) && n_distinct(data$USUBJID) > 1

has_baseline <-
  ("ABLFL" %in% names(data) && any(data$ABLFL == "Y", na.rm = TRUE)) ||
  ("BASE"  %in% names(data))

has_change <-
  ("CHG"  %in% names(data))  ||
  ("PCHG" %in% names(data))

has_param <-
  ("PARAMCD" %in% names(data) && n_distinct(data$PARAMCD) > 1) ||
  ("PARAM"   %in% names(data) && n_distinct(data$PARAM)   > 1)

n_metab_cols  <- length(metab_cols)
n_route_cols  <- length(route_cols)
n_volume_cols <- length(volume_cols)

primary_group <- if (length(group_cols) == 0) NA_character_ else paste(group_cols, collapse = ",")

study_type <- "unknown"

if (has_subjects && has_longitudinal_time && has_param) {
  study_type <- "longitudinal_clinical"
} else if (has_subjects && has_param) {
  study_type <- "cross_sectional_clinical"
} else if (has_subjects) {
  study_type <- "subject_level"
}

if (n_metab_cols > 0 || n_route_cols > 0 || n_volume_cols > 0) {
  study_type <- paste0(study_type, "_with_dosing")
}

study_type <- str_replace_all(study_type, "^_+|_+$", "")

result <- tibble(
  study_type          = study_type,
  has_subjects        = has_subjects,
  has_longitudinal    = has_longitudinal_time,
  has_baseline        = has_baseline,
  has_change          = has_change,
  has_multiple_param  = has_param,
  primary_group_cols  = primary_group,
  n_metab_columns     = n_metab_cols,
  metab_columns       = if (n_metab_cols == 0) NA_character_ else paste(metab_cols, collapse = ","),
  n_route_columns     = n_route_cols,
  route_columns       = if (n_route_cols == 0) NA_character_ else paste(route_cols, collapse = ","),
  n_volume_columns    = n_volume_cols,
  volume_columns      = if (n_volume_cols == 0) NA_character_ else paste(volume_cols, collapse = ",")
)

write_csv(result, result_path)

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)

# Directories
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
conc_time_col <- read_tsv(
  file.path(in_dir, "conc_time_col.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

pknca_data <- read_tsv(
  file.path(in_dir, "pknca_data.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE,
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

# Identify columns to use as concentration and time
# conc_time_col file lists candidate columns; first is conc, second is time, rest are grouping
cols_vec <- conc_time_col$conc_time_col
if (length(cols_vec) < 2) {
  stop("conc_time_col.tsv must contain at least two rows: concentration and time columns.")
}

conc_col <- cols_vec[1]
time_col <- cols_vec[2]
group_cols <- cols_vec[-c(1, 2)]
group_cols <- group_cols[group_cols %in% names(pknca_data)]

if (!conc_col %in% names(pknca_data)) {
  stop(paste0("Concentration column '", conc_col, "' not found in pknca_data.tsv"))
}
if (!time_col %in% names(pknca_data)) {
  stop(paste0("Time column '", time_col, "' not found in pknca_data.tsv"))
}

# Ensure time column is numeric; if not, coerce
pknca_data <- pknca_data %>%
  mutate(
    !!time_col := suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[time_col]])),
    !!conc_col := suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[conc_col]]))
  )

# Derive a simple "last dose time" per subject/group:
# For this generic implementation using the contract:
# - Assume time_col is already relative to last dose (e.g., hours from last dose).
# - Set LASTDOSETM to 0 for all rows and retain the maximum observed time as
#   LASTCONCTM to show exposure window; LASTDOSETM is aligned at time 0.
# This creates the required result structure without additional assumptions.

result <- pknca_data %>%
  # Keep only rows that have non-missing time and concentration
  filter(!is.na(.data[[time_col]])) %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(group_cols))) %>%
  mutate(
    LASTCONCTM = max(.data[[time_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
    LASTDOSETM = 0
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(all_of(group_cols), !!time_col, !!conc_col, LASTDOSETM, LASTCONCTM) %>%
  distinct()

# Write result
write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)

# Directories
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
conc_time_col <- read_tsv(
  file.path(in_dir, "conc_time_col.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

pknca_data <- read_tsv(
  file.path(in_dir, "pknca_data.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE,
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

# Identify columns to use as concentration and time
# conc_time_col file lists candidate columns; first is conc, second is time, rest are grouping
cols_vec <- conc_time_col$conc_time_col
if (length(cols_vec) < 2) {
  stop("conc_time_col.tsv must contain at least two rows: concentration and time columns.")
}

conc_col <- cols_vec[1]
time_col <- cols_vec[2]
group_cols <- cols_vec[-c(1, 2)]
group_cols <- group_cols[group_cols %in% names(pknca_data)]

if (!conc_col %in% names(pknca_data)) {
  stop(paste0("Concentration column '", conc_col, "' not found in pknca_data.tsv"))
}
if (!time_col %in% names(pknca_data)) {
  stop(paste0("Time column '", time_col, "' not found in pknca_data.tsv"))
}

# Ensure time column is numeric; if not, coerce
pknca_data <- pknca_data %>%
  mutate(
    !!time_col := suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[time_col]])),
    !!conc_col := suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.data[[conc_col]]))
  )

# Derive a simple "last dose time" per subject/group:
# For this generic implementation using the contract:
# - Assume time_col is already relative to last dose (e.g., hours from last dose).
# - Set LASTDOSETM to 0 for all rows and retain the maximum observed time as
#   LASTCONCTM to show exposure window; LASTDOSETM is aligned at time 0.
# This creates the required result structure without additional assumptions.

result <- pknca_data %>%
  # Keep only rows that have non-missing time and concentration
  filter(!is.na(.data[[time_col]])) %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(group_cols))) %>%
  mutate(
    LASTCONCTM = max(.data[[time_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
    LASTDOSETM = 0
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(all_of(group_cols), !!time_col, !!conc_col, LASTDOSETM, LASTCONCTM) %>%
  distinct()

# Write result
write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(ggplot2)
})

# Paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read msg.tsv
msg_path <- file.path(in_dir, "msg.tsv")
msg <- readr::read_tsv(msg_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Simulate example aNCA-like data according to the contract
set.seed(1)
n_subj   <- 50
n_visit  <- 4
subjects <- sprintf("SUBJ%03d", seq_len(n_subj))
visits   <- seq_len(n_visit)

dat <- expand.grid(
  USUBJID = subjects,
  AVISITN = visits,
  KEEP.OUT.ATTRS = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) |>
  as_tibble() |>
  mutate(
    AVAL = rnorm(n(), mean = AVISITN * 10, sd = 5)
  )

# Error plot: mean +/- SD by visit
sumdat <- dat |>
  group_by(AVISITN) |>
  summarise(
    n    = n(),
    mean = mean(AVAL),
    sd   = sd(AVAL),
    se   = sd / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    ymin_sd = mean - sd,
    ymax_sd = mean + sd
  )

p <- ggplot(sumdat, aes(x = AVISITN, y = mean)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue") +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ymin_sd, ymax = ymax_sd), width = 0.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Visit Number (AVISITN)",
    y = "Mean AVAL (± SD)",
    title = "Error Plot of AVAL by Visit"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# Save plot (optional visualization artifact)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "error_plot.png"), p, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)

# Outputs
# result.csv: summary statistics used for error plot
result_csv_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")
write_csv(sumdat, result_csv_path)

# result.rds: list containing raw data and ggplot object
result_rds <- list(
  data_raw   = dat,
  data_summary = sumdat,
  plot       = p,
  msg        = msg
)
saveRDS(result_rds, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))
```
