#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(ggplot2)
})

# Paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read msg.tsv
msg_path <- file.path(in_dir, "msg.tsv")
msg <- readr::read_tsv(msg_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Simulate example aNCA-like data according to the contract
set.seed(1)
n_subj   <- 50
n_visit  <- 4
subjects <- sprintf("SUBJ%03d", seq_len(n_subj))
visits   <- seq_len(n_visit)

dat <- expand.grid(
  USUBJID = subjects,
  AVISITN = visits,
  KEEP.OUT.ATTRS = FALSE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) |>
  as_tibble() |>
  mutate(
    AVAL = rnorm(n(), mean = AVISITN * 10, sd = 5)
  )

# Error plot: mean +/- SD by visit
sumdat <- dat |>
  group_by(AVISITN) |>
  summarise(
    n    = n(),
    mean = mean(AVAL),
    sd   = sd(AVAL),
    se   = sd / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    ymin_sd = mean - sd,
    ymax_sd = mean + sd
  )

p <- ggplot(sumdat, aes(x = AVISITN, y = mean)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue") +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ymin_sd, ymax = ymax_sd), width = 0.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Visit Number (AVISITN)",
    y = "Mean AVAL (± SD)",
    title = "Error Plot of AVAL by Visit"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# Save plot (optional visualization artifact)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "error_plot.png"), p, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)

# Outputs
# result.csv: summary statistics used for error plot
result_csv_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")
write_csv(sumdat, result_csv_path)

# result.rds: list containing raw data and ggplot object
result_rds <- list(
  data_raw   = dat,
  data_summary = sumdat,
  plot       = p,
  msg        = msg
)
saveRDS(result_rds, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
})

inputs_dir  <- "inputs"
outputs_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(outputs_dir)) dir.create(outputs_dir, recursive = TRUE)

axis_path    <- file.path(inputs_dir, "axis.tsv")
breaks_path  <- file.path(inputs_dir, "breaks.tsv")
mincm_path   <- file.path(inputs_dir, "min_cm_distance.tsv")
plot_path    <- file.path(inputs_dir, "plot.tsv")

axis_df   <- read_tsv(axis_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
breaks_df <- read_tsv(breaks_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
mincm_df  <- read_tsv(mincm_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
plot_df   <- read_tsv(plot_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

axis_val   <- axis_df$axis[1]
break_vals <- breaks_df$breaks
min_cm     <- mincm_df$min_cm_distance[1]
plot_expr  <- plot_df$plot[1]

filtered_breaks <- sort(unique(break_vals[break_vals >= min_cm]))

if (length(filtered_breaks) == 0) {
  result_df <- tibble(
    axis  = character(0),
    break = numeric(0)
  )
} else {
  result_df <- tibble(
    axis  = axis_val,
    break = filtered_breaks
  )
}

write_csv(result_df, file.path(outputs_dir, "result.csv"))

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
})

inputs_dir  <- "inputs"
outputs_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(outputs_dir)) dir.create(outputs_dir, recursive = TRUE)

axis_path    <- file.path(inputs_dir, "axis.tsv")
breaks_path  <- file.path(inputs_dir, "breaks.tsv")
mincm_path   <- file.path(inputs_dir, "min_cm_distance.tsv")
plot_path    <- file.path(inputs_dir, "plot.tsv")

axis_df   <- read_tsv(axis_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
breaks_df <- read_tsv(breaks_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
mincm_df  <- read_tsv(mincm_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
plot_df   <- read_tsv(plot_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

axis_val   <- axis_df$axis[1]
break_vals <- breaks_df$breaks
min_cm     <- mincm_df$min_cm_distance[1]
plot_expr  <- plot_df$plot[1]

filtered_breaks <- sort(unique(break_vals[break_vals >= min_cm]))

if (length(filtered_breaks) == 0) {
  result_df <- tibble(
    axis  = character(0),
    break = numeric(0)
  )
} else {
  result_df <- tibble(
    axis  = axis_val,
    break = filtered_breaks
  )
}

write_csv(result_df, file.path(outputs_dir, "result.csv"))

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

ci          <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "ci.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
pknca_data  <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "pknca_data.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
sd_max      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "sd_max.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
sd_min      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "sd_min.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
tooltip_vars <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "tooltip_vars.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
x_limits    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "x_limits.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
y_limits    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "y_limits.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

vars_ci         <- ci$ci
vars_sd_min     <- sd_min$sd_min
vars_tooltip    <- tooltip_vars$tooltip_vars
vars_y_limits   <- y_limits$y_limits

# Use PARAMCD as x grouping variable if available
if ("PARAMCD" %in% names(pknca_data)) {
  x_var <- "PARAMCD"
} else if ("PARAM" %in% names(pknca_data)) {
  x_var <- "PARAM"
} else {
  stop("No PARAMCD or PARAM column found for x variable.")
}

# Ensure required columns exist
needed_cols <- unique(c(vars_ci, vars_sd_min, vars_tooltip, vars_y_limits, x_var))
missing_cols <- setdiff(needed_cols, names(pknca_data))
if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop("Missing columns in pknca_data: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
}

df <- pknca_data %>%
  select(all_of(needed_cols))

# For meanplot exploration: compute mean and CI (mean ± 1.96*sd/sqrt(n)) by x_var and AVISITN
if (!"AVISITN" %in% names(df)) {
  stop("AVISITN must be present for meanplot.")
}

summary_df <- df %>%
  group_by(.data[[x_var]], AVISITN) %>%
  summarise(
    n        = n(),
    mean_AVAL = mean(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_AVAL   = sd(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_AVAL   = sd_AVAL / sqrt(n),
    ci_lower  = mean_AVAL - 1.96 * se_AVAL,
    ci_upper  = mean_AVAL + 1.96 * se_AVAL,
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

# Add simple x/y limits columns for downstream plotting if desired
summary_df <- summary_df %>%
  mutate(
    x_var     = .data[[x_var]],
    x_limits  = NA_real_,
    y_limits  = NA_real_
  )

# Export
write_csv(summary_df, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))
saveRDS(summary_df, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

ci          <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "ci.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
pknca_data  <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "pknca_data.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
sd_max      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "sd_max.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
sd_min      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "sd_min.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
tooltip_vars <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "tooltip_vars.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
x_limits    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "x_limits.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
y_limits    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "y_limits.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

vars_ci         <- ci$ci
vars_sd_min     <- sd_min$sd_min
vars_tooltip    <- tooltip_vars$tooltip_vars
vars_y_limits   <- y_limits$y_limits

# Use PARAMCD as x grouping variable if available
if ("PARAMCD" %in% names(pknca_data)) {
  x_var <- "PARAMCD"
} else if ("PARAM" %in% names(pknca_data)) {
  x_var <- "PARAM"
} else {
  stop("No PARAMCD or PARAM column found for x variable.")
}

# Ensure required columns exist
needed_cols <- unique(c(vars_ci, vars_sd_min, vars_tooltip, vars_y_limits, x_var))
missing_cols <- setdiff(needed_cols, names(pknca_data))
if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop("Missing columns in pknca_data: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
}

df <- pknca_data %>%
  select(all_of(needed_cols))

# For meanplot exploration: compute mean and CI (mean ± 1.96*sd/sqrt(n)) by x_var and AVISITN
if (!"AVISITN" %in% names(df)) {
  stop("AVISITN must be present for meanplot.")
}

summary_df <- df %>%
  group_by(.data[[x_var]], AVISITN) %>%
  summarise(
    n        = n(),
    mean_AVAL = mean(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_AVAL   = sd(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_AVAL   = sd_AVAL / sqrt(n),
    ci_lower  = mean_AVAL - 1.96 * se_AVAL,
    ci_upper  = mean_AVAL + 1.96 * se_AVAL,
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

# Add simple x/y limits columns for downstream plotting if desired
summary_df <- summary_df %>%
  mutate(
    x_var     = .data[[x_var]],
    x_limits  = NA_real_,
    y_limits  = NA_real_
  )

# Export
write_csv(summary_df, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))
saveRDS(summary_df, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(purrr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Read inputs
#--------------------------------------------------------------------

pknca_data <- read_tsv(
  file.path(in_dir, "pknca_data.tsv"),
  col_types = cols()
)

color_by          <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "color_by.tsv"),          col_types = cols())
facet_by          <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "facet_by.tsv"),          col_types = cols())
filtering_list    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "filtering_list.tsv"),    col_types = cols())
labels_df         <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "labels_df.tsv"),         col_types = cols())
palette_df        <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "palette.tsv"),           col_types = cols())
show_dose         <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "show_dose.tsv"),         col_types = cols())
show_facet_n      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "show_facet_n.tsv"),      col_types = cols())
show_legend       <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "show_legend.tsv"),       col_types = cols())
threshold_value   <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "threshold_value.tsv"),   col_types = cols())
tooltip_vars      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "tooltip_vars.tsv"),      col_types = cols())
use_time_since_ld <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "use_time_since_last_dose.tsv"), col_types = cols())
x_limits_df       <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "x_limits.tsv"),          col_types = cols())
y_limits_df       <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "y_limits.tsv"),          col_types = cols())
ylog_scale_df     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "ylog_scale.tsv"),        col_types = cols())

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Apply filtering_list
#--------------------------------------------------------------------

flt_expr <- filtering_list$filter[1]
if (!is.na(flt_expr) && nzchar(flt_expr)) {
  pknca_flt <- pknca_data %>% filter(!!rlang::parse_expr(flt_expr))
} else {
  pknca_flt <- pknca_data
}

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Basic individual plot object (not saved as image per spec)
# Here we create a ggplot object to be returned in RDS.
#--------------------------------------------------------------------

# Choose x as AVISITN if present, else row number
x_var <- if ("AVISITN" %in% names(pknca_flt)) "AVISITN" else NULL
y_var <- "AVAL"

color_var <- intersect(color_by$color_by, names(pknca_flt))
color_var <- if (length(color_var) > 0) color_var[1] else NULL

facet_vars <- intersect(facet_by$facet_by, names(pknca_flt))
facet_formula <- if (length(facet_vars) >= 2) {
  as.formula(paste(facet_vars[1], "~", facet_vars[2]))
} else if (length(facet_vars) == 1) {
  as.formula(paste(". ~", facet_vars[1]))
} else {
  NULL
}

plt <- ggplot(pknca_flt, aes_string(x = x_var, y = y_var)) +
  geom_line(aes_string(group = "USUBJID"), alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_point(aes_string(color = color_var)) +
  theme_bw()

if (!is.null(facet_formula)) {
  plt <- plt + facet_grid(facet_formula)
}

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Assemble result object
#--------------------------------------------------------------------

result <- list(
  data              = pknca_flt,
  plot              = plt,
  color_by          = color_by,
  facet_by          = facet_by,
  filtering_list    = filtering_list,
  labels_df         = labels_df,
  palette_df        = palette_df,
  show_dose         = show_dose,
  show_facet_n      = show_facet_n,
  show_legend       = show_legend,
  threshold_value   = threshold_value,
  tooltip_vars      = tooltip_vars,
  use_time_since_ld = use_time_since_ld,
  x_limits_df       = x_limits_df,
  y_limits_df       = y_limits_df,
  ylog_scale_df     = ylog_scale_df
)

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Write outputs
#--------------------------------------------------------------------

write_csv(pknca_flt, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))
saveRDS(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(purrr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Read inputs
#--------------------------------------------------------------------

pknca_data <- read_tsv(
  file.path(in_dir, "pknca_data.tsv"),
  col_types = cols()
)

color_by          <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "color_by.tsv"),          col_types = cols())
facet_by          <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "facet_by.tsv"),          col_types = cols())
filtering_list    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "filtering_list.tsv"),    col_types = cols())
labels_df         <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "labels_df.tsv"),         col_types = cols())
palette_df        <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "palette.tsv"),           col_types = cols())
show_dose         <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "show_dose.tsv"),         col_types = cols())
show_facet_n      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "show_facet_n.tsv"),      col_types = cols())
show_legend       <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "show_legend.tsv"),       col_types = cols())
threshold_value   <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "threshold_value.tsv"),   col_types = cols())
tooltip_vars      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "tooltip_vars.tsv"),      col_types = cols())
use_time_since_ld <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "use_time_since_last_dose.tsv"), col_types = cols())
x_limits_df       <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "x_limits.tsv"),          col_types = cols())
y_limits_df       <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "y_limits.tsv"),          col_types = cols())
ylog_scale_df     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "ylog_scale.tsv"),        col_types = cols())

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Apply filtering_list
#--------------------------------------------------------------------

flt_expr <- filtering_list$filter[1]
if (!is.na(flt_expr) && nzchar(flt_expr)) {
  pknca_flt <- pknca_data %>% filter(!!rlang::parse_expr(flt_expr))
} else {
  pknca_flt <- pknca_data
}

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Basic individual plot object (not saved as image per spec)
# Here we create a ggplot object to be returned in RDS.
#--------------------------------------------------------------------

# Choose x as AVISITN if present, else row number
x_var <- if ("AVISITN" %in% names(pknca_flt)) "AVISITN" else NULL
y_var <- "AVAL"

color_var <- intersect(color_by$color_by, names(pknca_flt))
color_var <- if (length(color_var) > 0) color_var[1] else NULL

facet_vars <- intersect(facet_by$facet_by, names(pknca_flt))
facet_formula <- if (length(facet_vars) >= 2) {
  as.formula(paste(facet_vars[1], "~", facet_vars[2]))
} else if (length(facet_vars) == 1) {
  as.formula(paste(". ~", facet_vars[1]))
} else {
  NULL
}

plt <- ggplot(pknca_flt, aes_string(x = x_var, y = y_var)) +
  geom_line(aes_string(group = "USUBJID"), alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_point(aes_string(color = color_var)) +
  theme_bw()

if (!is.null(facet_formula)) {
  plt <- plt + facet_grid(facet_formula)
}

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Assemble result object
#--------------------------------------------------------------------

result <- list(
  data              = pknca_flt,
  plot              = plt,
  color_by          = color_by,
  facet_by          = facet_by,
  filtering_list    = filtering_list,
  labels_df         = labels_df,
  palette_df        = palette_df,
  show_dose         = show_dose,
  show_facet_n      = show_facet_n,
  show_legend       = show_legend,
  threshold_value   = threshold_value,
  tooltip_vars      = tooltip_vars,
  use_time_since_ld = use_time_since_ld,
  x_limits_df       = x_limits_df,
  y_limits_df       = y_limits_df,
  ylog_scale_df     = ylog_scale_df
)

#--------------------------------------------------------------------
# Write outputs
#--------------------------------------------------------------------

write_csv(pknca_flt, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))
saveRDS(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

read_tsv1 <- function(fn) {
  readr::read_tsv(
    file.path(in_dir, fn),
    col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
  )
}

ci      <- read_tsv1("ci.tsv")
color_by <- read_tsv1("color_by.tsv")
plot    <- read_tsv1("plot.tsv")
sd_max  <- read_tsv1("sd_max.tsv")
sd_min  <- read_tsv1("sd_min.tsv")
x_var   <- read_tsv1("x_var.tsv")
y_var   <- read_tsv1("y_var.tsv")

vec_from_single_col <- function(df) {
  nm <- names(df)[1]
  v  <- df[[1]]
  v  <- v[!is.na(v) & v != ""]
  setdiff(v, nm)
}

ci_vars       <- vec_from_single_col(ci)
color_by_vars <- vec_from_single_col(color_by)
plot_vars     <- vec_from_single_col(plot)
sd_min_vars   <- vec_from_single_col(sd_min)
x_vec         <- vec_from_single_col(x_var)
sd_max_vec    <- vec_from_single_col(sd_max)
y_by_vars     <- vec_from_single_col(y_var)

result <- tibble(
  setting = c("ci", "color_by", "plot", "sd_min", "x", "sd_max", "y_by_vars"),
  value   = c(
    paste(ci_vars, collapse = ";"),
    paste(color_by_vars, collapse = ";"),
    paste(plot_vars, collapse = ";"),
    paste(sd_min_vars, collapse = ";"),
    paste(x_vec, collapse = ";"),
    paste(sd_max_vec, collapse = ";"),
    paste(y_by_vars, collapse = ";")
  )
)

write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))
saveRDS(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

read_tsv1 <- function(fn) {
  readr::read_tsv(
    file.path(in_dir, fn),
    col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
  )
}

ci      <- read_tsv1("ci.tsv")
color_by <- read_tsv1("color_by.tsv")
plot    <- read_tsv1("plot.tsv")
sd_max  <- read_tsv1("sd_max.tsv")
sd_min  <- read_tsv1("sd_min.tsv")
x_var   <- read_tsv1("x_var.tsv")
y_var   <- read_tsv1("y_var.tsv")

vec_from_single_col <- function(df) {
  nm <- names(df)[1]
  v  <- df[[1]]
  v  <- v[!is.na(v) & v != ""]
  setdiff(v, nm)
}

ci_vars       <- vec_from_single_col(ci)
color_by_vars <- vec_from_single_col(color_by)
plot_vars     <- vec_from_single_col(plot)
sd_min_vars   <- vec_from_single_col(sd_min)
x_vec         <- vec_from_single_col(x_var)
sd_max_vec    <- vec_from_single_col(sd_max)
y_by_vars     <- vec_from_single_col(y_var)

result <- tibble(
  setting = c("ci", "color_by", "plot", "sd_min", "x", "sd_max", "y_by_vars"),
  value   = c(
    paste(ci_vars, collapse = ";"),
    paste(color_by_vars, collapse = ";"),
    paste(plot_vars, collapse = ";"),
    paste(sd_min_vars, collapse = ";"),
    paste(x_vec, collapse = ";"),
    paste(sd_max_vec, collapse = ";"),
    paste(y_by_vars, collapse = ";")
  )
)

write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))
saveRDS(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(rlang)

# Paths
data_path  <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
filt_path  <- file.path("inputs", "filtering_list.tsv")
out_path   <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read input data
dat <- read_tsv(data_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character())) %>%
  mutate(across(where(~ suppressWarnings(!any(is.na(as.numeric(.x))))),
                ~ as.numeric(.x)))

# Read filter list
flt_tbl <- read_tsv(filt_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
flt_vec <- flt_tbl$filter
flt_vec <- flt_vec[!is.na(flt_vec) & nzchar(flt_vec)]

# Apply filters sequentially
res <- dat
for (expr_str in flt_vec) {
  res <- res %>% filter(!!parse_expr(expr_str))
}

# Write output
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)
write_csv(res, out_path)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(rlang)

# Paths
data_path  <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
filt_path  <- file.path("inputs", "filtering_list.tsv")
out_path   <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read input data
dat <- read_tsv(data_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character())) %>%
  mutate(across(where(~ suppressWarnings(!any(is.na(as.numeric(.x))))),
                ~ as.numeric(.x)))

# Read filter list
flt_tbl <- read_tsv(filt_path, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
flt_vec <- flt_tbl$filter
flt_vec <- flt_vec[!is.na(flt_vec) & nzchar(flt_vec)]

# Apply filters sequentially
res <- dat
for (expr_str in flt_vec) {
  res <- res %>% filter(!!parse_expr(expr_str))
}

# Write output
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)
write_csv(res, out_path)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

# Input paths
keep_interval_cols_path <- file.path("inputs", "keep_interval_cols.tsv")
pknca_conc_path         <- file.path("inputs", "pknca_conc.tsv")
pknca_dose_path         <- file.path("inputs", "pknca_dose.tsv")
start_from_last_dose_path <- file.path("inputs", "start_from_last_dose.tsv")

# Output path
out_path <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read inputs
keep_interval_cols <- read_tsv(keep_interval_cols_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
pknca_conc         <- read_tsv(pknca_conc_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
pknca_dose         <- read_tsv(pknca_dose_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
start_from_last_dose <- read_tsv(start_from_last_dose_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Example formatting of PK NCA intervals using aNCA-style contract:
# This script assumes that all four inputs define variables to be retained or flags
# guiding interval construction, and that the output is a merged specification
# compatible with an aNCA clinical task contract.

# Normalize column names
names(keep_interval_cols)[1]   <- "keep_interval_cols"
names(pknca_conc)[1]           <- "pknca_conc"
names(pknca_dose)[1]           <- "pknca_dose"
names(start_from_last_dose)[1] <- "start_from_last_dose"

# Make long/stacked contract table
keep_long <- keep_interval_cols %>%
  mutate(source = "keep_interval_cols")

conc_long <- pknca_conc %>%
  mutate(source = "pknca_conc")

dose_long <- pknca_dose %>%
  mutate(source = "pknca_dose")

start_long <- start_from_last_dose %>%
  mutate(source = "start_from_last_dose")

result <- bind_rows(
  keep_long,
  conc_long,
  dose_long,
  start_long
)

# Write result
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
write_csv(result, out_path)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

# Input paths
keep_interval_cols_path <- file.path("inputs", "keep_interval_cols.tsv")
pknca_conc_path         <- file.path("inputs", "pknca_conc.tsv")
pknca_dose_path         <- file.path("inputs", "pknca_dose.tsv")
start_from_last_dose_path <- file.path("inputs", "start_from_last_dose.tsv")

# Output path
out_path <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read inputs
keep_interval_cols <- read_tsv(keep_interval_cols_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
pknca_conc         <- read_tsv(pknca_conc_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
pknca_dose         <- read_tsv(pknca_dose_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
start_from_last_dose <- read_tsv(start_from_last_dose_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Example formatting of PK NCA intervals using aNCA-style contract:
# This script assumes that all four inputs define variables to be retained or flags
# guiding interval construction, and that the output is a merged specification
# compatible with an aNCA clinical task contract.

# Normalize column names
names(keep_interval_cols)[1]   <- "keep_interval_cols"
names(pknca_conc)[1]           <- "pknca_conc"
names(pknca_dose)[1]           <- "pknca_dose"
names(start_from_last_dose)[1] <- "start_from_last_dose"

# Make long/stacked contract table
keep_long <- keep_interval_cols %>%
  mutate(source = "keep_interval_cols")

conc_long <- pknca_conc %>%
  mutate(source = "pknca_conc")

dose_long <- pknca_dose %>%
  mutate(source = "pknca_dose")

start_long <- start_from_last_dose %>%
  mutate(source = "start_from_last_dose")

result <- bind_rows(
  keep_long,
  conc_long,
  dose_long,
  start_long
)

# Write result
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
write_csv(result, out_path)

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

# Create outputs directory if it doesn't exist
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

#----------------------------
# Read input
#----------------------------
infile  <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
advs    <- read_tsv(infile, col_types = cols(.default = col_guess()))

#----------------------------
# g pkcg01 log (aNCA clinical task contract)
# Here: derive simple descriptive stats by PARAMCD and AVISIT
#----------------------------

result <- advs %>%
  group_by(STUDYID, PARAMCD, PARAM, AVISITN, AVISIT) %>%
  summarise(
    N      = n(),
    MEAN   = mean(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD     = sd(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    MEDIAN = median(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    MIN    = min(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    MAX    = max(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(STUDYID, PARAMCD, AVISITN, AVISIT)

#----------------------------
# Write outputs
#----------------------------

# CSV
outfile_csv <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
write_csv(result, outfile_csv)

# RDS
outfile_rds <- file.path("outputs", "result.rds")
saveRDS(result, outfile_rds)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

in_file  <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
out_csv  <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
out_rds  <- file.path("outputs", "result.rds")

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

dat <- read_tsv(
  in_file,
  col_types = cols(
    USUBJID = col_character(),
    STUDYID = col_character(),
    PARAMCD = col_character(),
    PARAM   = col_character(),
    AVAL    = col_double(),
    AVISITN = col_double(),
    AVISIT  = col_character(),
    ADT     = col_date(),
    ANL01FL = col_character(),
    BASE    = col_double(),
    CHG     = col_double(),
    PCHG    = col_double(),
    ABLFL   = col_character()
  )
)

res <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    LOG_AVAL = if_else(!is.na(AVAL) & AVAL > 0, log(AVAL), NA_real_),
    LOG_BASE = if_else(!is.na(BASE) & BASE > 0, log(BASE), NA_real_),
    LOG_CHG  = LOG_AVAL - LOG_BASE
  )

write_csv(res, out_csv)
saveRDS(res, out_rds)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

in_file  <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
out_csv  <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
out_rds  <- file.path("outputs", "result.rds")

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

dat <- read_tsv(
  in_file,
  col_types = cols(
    USUBJID = col_character(),
    STUDYID = col_character(),
    PARAMCD = col_character(),
    PARAM   = col_character(),
    AVAL    = col_double(),
    AVISITN = col_double(),
    AVISIT  = col_character(),
    ADT     = col_date(),
    ANL01FL = col_character(),
    BASE    = col_double(),
    CHG     = col_double(),
    PCHG    = col_double(),
    ABLFL   = col_character()
  )
)

res <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    LOG_AVAL = if_else(!is.na(AVAL) & AVAL > 0, log(AVAL), NA_real_),
    LOG_BASE = if_else(!is.na(BASE) & BASE > 0, log(BASE), NA_real_),
    LOG_CHG  = LOG_AVAL - LOG_BASE
  )

write_csv(res, out_csv)
saveRDS(res, out_rds)

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

#----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Paths
#----------------------------------------------------------------------
infile  <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
out_csv <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
out_rds <- file.path("outputs", "result.rds")

if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

#----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Read input
#----------------------------------------------------------------------
dat <- read_tsv(
  infile,
  col_types = cols(
    USUBJID = col_character(),
    STUDYID = col_character(),
    PARAMCD = col_character(),
    PARAM   = col_character(),
    AVAL    = col_double(),
    AVISITN = col_double(),
    AVISIT  = col_character(),
    ADT     = col_date(),
    ANL01FL = col_character(),
    BASE    = col_double(),
    CHG     = col_double(),
    PCHG    = col_double(),
    ABLFL   = col_character()
  )
)

#----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Placeholder implementation of "g pkcg02 lin using the aNCA clinical
# task contract".
#
# Here, implement a per-parameter, per-visit linear model of change
# from baseline over time (AVISITN), and summarize the model fits.
#----------------------------------------------------------------------

# Fit linear model CHG ~ AVISITN within each STUDYID/PARAMCD/USUBJID
fits <- dat %>%
  group_by(STUDYID, PARAMCD, PARAM, USUBJID) %>%
  filter(!is.na(AVISITN), !is.na(CHG)) %>%
  do({
    df <- .
    if (nrow(df) < 2L) {
      tibble(
        n       = nrow(df),
        intercept = NA_real_,
        slope     = NA_real_,
        r2        = NA_real_
      )
    } else {
      m <- lm(CHG ~ AVISITN, data = df)
      s <- summary(m)
      tibble(
        n         = nrow(df),
        intercept = coef(m)[1],
        slope     = coef(m)[2],
        r2        = unname(s$r.squared)
      )
    }
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

# Aggregate to study/parameter level (example summary for contract)
result <- fits %>%
  group_by(STUDYID, PARAMCD, PARAM) %>%
  summarise(
    n_subjects        = n_distinct(USUBJID),
    mean_slope        = mean(slope, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_slope          = sd(slope, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_intercept    = mean(intercept, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_intercept      = sd(intercept, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_r2           = mean(r2, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_r2             = sd(r2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

#----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Write outputs
#----------------------------------------------------------------------
write_csv(result, out_csv)
saveRDS(list(
  per_subject_fits = fits,
  summary          = result
), out_rds)

out_csv <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
out_rds <- file.path("outputs", "result.rds")

if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

#----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Read input
#----------------------------------------------------------------------
dat <- read_tsv(
  infile,
  col_types = cols(
    USUBJID = col_character(),
    STUDYID = col_character(),
    PARAMCD = col_character(),
    PARAM   = col_character(),
    AVAL    = col_double(),
    AVISITN = col_double(),
    AVISIT  = col_character(),
    ADT     = col_date(),
    ANL01FL = col_character(),
    BASE    = col_double(),
    CHG     = col_double(),
    PCHG    = col_double(),
    ABLFL   = col_character()
  )
)

#----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Placeholder implementation of "g pkcg02 lin using the aNCA clinical
# task contract".
#
# Here, implement a per-parameter, per-visit linear model of change
# from baseline over time (AVISITN), and summarize the model fits.
#----------------------------------------------------------------------

# Fit linear model CHG ~ AVISITN within each STUDYID/PARAMCD/USUBJID
fits <- dat %>%
  group_by(STUDYID, PARAMCD, PARAM, USUBJID) %>%
  filter(!is.na(AVISITN), !is.na(CHG)) %>%
  do({
    df <- .
    if (nrow(df) < 2L) {
      tibble(
        n       = nrow(df),
        intercept = NA_real_,
        slope     = NA_real_,
        r2        = NA_real_
      )
    } else {
      m <- lm(CHG ~ AVISITN, data = df)
      s <- summary(m)
      tibble(
        n         = nrow(df),
        intercept = coef(m)[1],
        slope     = coef(m)[2],
        r2        = unname(s$r.squared)
      )
    }
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

# Aggregate to study/parameter level (example summary for contract)
result <- fits %>%
  group_by(STUDYID, PARAMCD, PARAM) %>%
  summarise(
    n_subjects        = n_distinct(USUBJID),
    mean_slope        = mean(slope, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_slope          = sd(slope, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_intercept    = mean(intercept, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_intercept      = sd(intercept, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_r2           = mean(r2, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_r2             = sd(r2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

#----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Write outputs
#----------------------------------------------------------------------
write_csv(result, out_csv)
saveRDS(list(
  per_subject_fits = fits,
  summary          = result
), out_rds)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

in_file  <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
out_csv  <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
out_rds  <- file.path("outputs", "result.rds")

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

dat <- read_tsv(
  in_file,
  col_types = cols(
    USUBJID = col_character(),
    STUDYID = col_character(),
    PARAMCD = col_character(),
    PARAM   = col_character(),
    AVAL    = col_double(),
    AVISITN = col_double(),
    AVISIT  = col_character(),
    ADT     = col_date(),
    ANL01FL = col_character(),
    BASE    = col_double(),
    CHG     = col_double(),
    PCHG    = col_double(),
    ABLFL   = col_character()
  )
)

res <- dat %>%
  filter(ANL01FL == "Y") %>%
  group_by(STUDYID, PARAMCD, PARAM, AVISITN, AVISIT) %>%
  summarise(
    N      = sum(!is.na(AVAL)),
    MEAN   = mean(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD     = sd(AVAL,  na.rm = TRUE),
    MEDIAN = median(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    MIN    = min(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    MAX    = max(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(STUDYID, PARAMCD, AVISITN)

write_csv(res, out_csv)
saveRDS(res, out_rds)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

in_file  <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
out_csv  <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
out_rds  <- file.path("outputs", "result.rds")

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

dat <- read_tsv(
  in_file,
  col_types = cols(
    USUBJID = col_character(),
    STUDYID = col_character(),
    PARAMCD = col_character(),
    PARAM   = col_character(),
    AVAL    = col_double(),
    AVISITN = col_double(),
    AVISIT  = col_character(),
    ADT     = col_date(),
    ANL01FL = col_character(),
    BASE    = col_double(),
    CHG     = col_double(),
    PCHG    = col_double(),
    ABLFL   = col_character()
  )
)

res <- dat %>%
  filter(ANL01FL == "Y") %>%
  group_by(STUDYID, PARAMCD, PARAM, AVISITN, AVISIT) %>%
  summarise(
    N      = sum(!is.na(AVAL)),
    MEAN   = mean(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD     = sd(AVAL,  na.rm = TRUE),
    MEDIAN = median(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    MIN    = min(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    MAX    = max(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(STUDYID, PARAMCD, AVISITN)

write_csv(res, out_csv)
saveRDS(res, out_rds)

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Read configuration tables
color_by      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "color_by.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
color_labels  <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "color_labels.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
facet_by      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "facet_by.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
facet_count_n <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "facet_count_n.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
group_by      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "group_by.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
labels_df     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "labels_df.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
palette_df    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "palette.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
show_legend   <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "show_legend.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
threshold_df  <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "threshold_value.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
tooltip_vars  <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "tooltip_vars.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
vline_var     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "vline_var.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
x_limits      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "x_limits.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
x_unit        <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "x_unit.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
x_var         <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "x_var.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
y_limits      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "y_limits.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
y_unit        <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "y_unit.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
y_var         <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "y_var.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
ylog_scale    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "ylog_scale.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# Read main data
data <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "data.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# Derive x and y variables:
# From the preview, y_var$by_vars = c("PARAMCD","AVISITN")
# Use AVISITN as x-variable and AVAL as y-variable (typical longitudinal plot)
x_col <- "AVISITN"
y_col <- "AVAL"

# Safety: ensure these exist
if (!x_col %in% names(data)) {
  stop("x variable column ", x_col, " not found in data.")
}
if (!y_col %in% names(data)) {
  stop("y variable column ", y_col, " not found in data.")
}

# Prepare basic plot-ready data frame
plot_df <- data %>%
  mutate(
    !!x_col := .data[[x_col]],
    !!y_col := .data[[y_col]]
  )

# Add group/strata information based on group_by configuration if possible
# group_by.tsv appears to contain a column "group_by" listing variable names
group_cols <- intersect(group_by[[1]], names(plot_df))
if (length(group_cols) == 0) {
  group_cols <- character(0)
}

# Add facet variables
facet_cols <- intersect(facet_by[[1]], names(plot_df))
if (length(facet_cols) == 0) {
  facet_cols <- character(0)
}

# Add color_by variable
color_cols <- intersect(color_by[[1]], names(plot_df))
if (length(color_cols) == 0) {
  color_cols <- character(0)
}

# Tooltip variables
tooltip_cols <- intersect(tooltip_vars[[1]], names(plot_df))

# Build a "long" description of settings actually used
config_used <- tibble(
  setting = c(
    "x_var", "y_var",
    "group_by", "facet_by", "color_by",
    "tooltip_vars"
  ),
  value = c(
    x_col,
    y_col,
    paste(group_cols, collapse = ","),
    paste(facet_cols, collapse = ","),
    paste(color_cols, collapse = ","),
    paste(tooltip_cols, collapse = ",")
  )
)

# Attach threshold values by simple row index (no clear key in preview)
threshold_df <- threshold_df %>%
  mutate(threshold_id = row_number())

# Attach x/y units if possible (treat as simple lookup tables)
x_unit_vals <- x_unit[[1]]
y_unit_vals <- y_unit[[1]]

# Summaries per PARAMCD and visit
summary_df <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(PARAMCD, AVISITN) %>%
  summarise(
    n        = n(),
    mean_AVAL = mean(.data[[y_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_AVAL   = sd(.data[[y_col]],  na.rm = TRUE),
    min_AVAL  = min(.data[[y_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
    max_AVAL  = max(.data[[y_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

# Prepare final result object to capture both plot data and config/meta
result_list <- list(
  plot_data    = plot_df,

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Read configuration tables
color_by      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "color_by.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
color_labels  <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "color_labels.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
facet_by      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "facet_by.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
facet_count_n <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "facet_count_n.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
group_by      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "group_by.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
labels_df     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "labels_df.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
palette_df    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "palette.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
show_legend   <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "show_legend.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
threshold_df  <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "threshold_value.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
tooltip_vars  <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "tooltip_vars.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
vline_var     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "vline_var.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
x_limits      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "x_limits.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
x_unit        <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "x_unit.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
x_var         <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "x_var.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
y_limits      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "y_limits.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
y_unit        <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "y_unit.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
y_var         <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "y_var.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
ylog_scale    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "ylog_scale.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# Read main data
data <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "data.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# Derive x and y variables:
# From the preview, y_var$by_vars = c("PARAMCD","AVISITN")
# Use AVISITN as x-variable and AVAL as y-variable (typical longitudinal plot)
x_col <- "AVISITN"
y_col <- "AVAL"

# Safety: ensure these exist
if (!x_col %in% names(data)) {
  stop("x variable column ", x_col, " not found in data.")
}
if (!y_col %in% names(data)) {
  stop("y variable column ", y_col, " not found in data.")
}

# Prepare basic plot-ready data frame
plot_df <- data %>%
  mutate(
    !!x_col := .data[[x_col]],
    !!y_col := .data[[y_col]]
  )

# Add group/strata information based on group_by configuration if possible
# group_by.tsv appears to contain a column "group_by" listing variable names
group_cols <- intersect(group_by[[1]], names(plot_df))
if (length(group_cols) == 0) {
  group_cols <- character(0)
}

# Add facet variables
facet_cols <- intersect(facet_by[[1]], names(plot_df))
if (length(facet_cols) == 0) {
  facet_cols <- character(0)
}

# Add color_by variable
color_cols <- intersect(color_by[[1]], names(plot_df))
if (length(color_cols) == 0) {
  color_cols <- character(0)
}

# Tooltip variables
tooltip_cols <- intersect(tooltip_vars[[1]], names(plot_df))

# Build a "long" description of settings actually used
config_used <- tibble(
  setting = c(
    "x_var", "y_var",
    "group_by", "facet_by", "color_by",
    "tooltip_vars"
  ),
  value = c(
    x_col,
    y_col,
    paste(group_cols, collapse = ","),
    paste(facet_cols, collapse = ","),
    paste(color_cols, collapse = ","),
    paste(tooltip_cols, collapse = ",")
  )
)

# Attach threshold values by simple row index (no clear key in preview)
threshold_df <- threshold_df %>%
  mutate(threshold_id = row_number())

# Attach x/y units if possible (treat as simple lookup tables)
x_unit_vals <- x_unit[[1]]
y_unit_vals <- y_unit[[1]]

# Summaries per PARAMCD and visit
summary_df <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(PARAMCD, AVISITN) %>%
  summarise(
    n        = n(),
    mean_AVAL = mean(.data[[y_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_AVAL   = sd(.data[[y_col]],  na.rm = TRUE),
    min_AVAL  = min(.data[[y_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
    max_AVAL  = max(.data[[y_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

# Prepare final result object to capture both plot data and config/meta
result_list <- list(
  plot_data    = plot_df,
  summary      = summary_df,
  config_used  = config_used,
  threshold    = threshold_df,
  x_limits_raw = x_limits,
  y_limits_raw = y_limits,
  x_unit_raw   = x_unit,
  y_unit_raw   = y_unit,
  ylog_scale   = ylog_scale,
  labels_df    = labels_df,
  palette      = palette_df,
  show_legend  = show_legend,
  vline_var    = vline_var
)

# Export CSV: use the main plot_df plus key config columns flattened
# Add simple index to join with RDS components if needed
plot_df_out <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(.row_id = row_number())

write_csv(plot_df_out, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))

# Export full result object as RDS
saveRDS(result_list, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

# I/O paths
infile  <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
out_csv <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
out_rds <- file.path("outputs", "result.rds")

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Read input
dat <- read_tsv(
  infile,
  col_types = cols(
    USUBJID  = col_character(),
    STUDYID  = col_character(),
    PARAMCD  = col_character(),
    PARAM    = col_character(),
    AVAL     = col_double(),
    AVISITN  = col_double(),
    AVISIT   = col_character(),
    ADT      = col_date(),
    ANL01FL  = col_character(),
    BASE     = col_double(),
    CHG      = col_double(),
    PCHG     = col_double(),
    ABLFL    = col_character()
  )
)

# Example "g pkcg03 lin" style linear model:
# per PARAMCD and AVISITN, fit AVAL ~ 1 (mean) and extract estimate + CI
# (consistent with a simple clinical summary contract)

result <- dat %>%
  group_by(STUDYID, PARAMCD, PARAM, AVISITN, AVISIT) %>%
  summarise(
    n      = sum(!is.na(AVAL)),
    mean   = if (n > 0) mean(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    sd     = if (n > 1) sd(AVAL,  na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    se     = if (n > 1) sd / sqrt(n) else NA_real_,
    lcl    = if (!is.na(se)) mean - qt(0.975, df = n - 1) * se else NA_real_,
    ucl    = if (!is.na(se)) mean + qt(0.975, df = n - 1) * se else NA_real_,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(STUDYID, PARAMCD, AVISITN)

# Write outputs
write_csv(result, out_csv)
saveRDS(result, out_rds)

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

# g pkcg03 log using the aNCA clinical task contract
# Input:  inputs/data.tsv
# Output: outputs/result.csv, outputs/result.rds

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

# I/O --------------------------------------------------------------------------
in_file  <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
out_csv  <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
out_rds  <- file.path("outputs", "result.rds")

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

dat <- read_tsv(in_file, col_types = cols())

# Core derivations (example PKCG03-style log summary on vital signs) ----------
# Per-subject, per-parameter summaries over visits

res <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    ADT = as.Date(ADT),
    AVAL = as.numeric(AVAL),
    BASE = as.numeric(BASE),
    CHG  = as.numeric(CHG),
    PCHG = as.numeric(PCHG)
  ) %>%
  group_by(STUDYID, USUBJID, PARAMCD, PARAM) %>%
  summarise(
    N_AVAL      = sum(!is.na(AVAL)),
    AVISITN_MIN = min(AVISITN, na.rm = TRUE),
    AVISITN_MAX = max(AVISITN, na.rm = TRUE),
    ADT_MIN     = min(ADT, na.rm = TRUE),
    ADT_MAX     = max(ADT, na.rm = TRUE),
    BASE_FIRST  = BASE[which.min(AVISITN)],
    AVAL_BASE   = AVAL[which.min(AVISITN)],
    AVAL_MIN    = min(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    AVAL_MAX    = max(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    AVAL_MEAN   = mean(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    AVAL_SD     = sd(AVAL,  na.rm = TRUE),
    CHG_MIN     = min(CHG,  na.rm = TRUE),
    CHG_MAX     = max(CHG,  na.rm = TRUE),
    CHG_MEAN    = mean(CHG, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCHG_MIN    = min(PCHG, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCHG_MAX    = max(PCHG, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCHG_MEAN   = mean(PCHG, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(STUDYID, USUBJID, PARAMCD)

# Write outputs ----------------------------------------------------------------
write_csv(res, out_csv)
saveRDS(res, out_rds)
```

dat <- read_tsv(in_file, col_types = cols())

# Core derivations (example PKCG03-style log summary on vital signs) ----------
# Per-subject, per-parameter summaries over visits

res <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    ADT = as.Date(ADT),
    AVAL = as.numeric(AVAL),
    BASE = as.numeric(BASE),
    CHG  = as.numeric(CHG),
    PCHG = as.numeric(PCHG)
  ) %>%
  group_by(STUDYID, USUBJID, PARAMCD, PARAM) %>%
  summarise(
    N_AVAL      = sum(!is.na(AVAL)),
    AVISITN_MIN = min(AVISITN, na.rm = TRUE),
    AVISITN_MAX = max(AVISITN, na.rm = TRUE),
    ADT_MIN     = min(ADT, na.rm = TRUE),
    ADT_MAX     = max(ADT, na.rm = TRUE),
    BASE_FIRST  = BASE[which.min(AVISITN)],
    AVAL_BASE   = AVAL[which.min(AVISITN)],
    AVAL_MIN    = min(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    AVAL_MAX    = max(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),

    AVAL_SD     = sd(AVAL,  na.rm = TRUE),
    CHG_MIN     = min(CHG,  na.rm = TRUE),
    CHG_MAX     = max(CHG,  na.rm = TRUE),
    CHG_MEAN    = mean(CHG, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCHG_MIN    = min(PCHG, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCHG_MAX    = max(PCHG, na.rm = TRUE),
    PCHG_MEAN   = mean(PCHG, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(STUDYID, USUBJID, PARAMCD)

# Write outputs ----------------------------------------------------------------
write_csv(res, out_csv)
saveRDS(res, out_rds)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
  library(stringr)
})

#-----------------------------
# Helper: derive variable meta
#-----------------------------
derive_var_specs <- function(df, dataset_name) {
  n_total <- nrow(df)

  df %>%
    summarise(across(
      everything(),
      ~ {
        col <- cur_column()
        x <- .x
        type <- case_when(
          is.numeric(x) ~ "numeric",
          inherits(x, "Date") ~ "date",
          is.logical(x) ~ "logical",
          TRUE ~ "character"
        )

        n_nonmiss <- sum(!is.na(x))
        n_distinct <- n_distinct(x, na.rm = TRUE)

        # simple role heuristic
        role <- case_when(
          col %in% c("USUBJID", "STUDYID") ~ "identifier",
          str_detect(col, "ID$") ~ "identifier",
          col %in% c("PARAMCD") ~ "parameter code",
          col %in% c("PARAM") ~ "parameter label",
          str_detect(col, "VISIT") ~ "visit",
          str_detect(col, "^AVAL") ~ "analysis value",
          str_detect(col, "CHG|PCHG") ~ "derived",
          TRUE ~ "variable"
        )

        tibble(
          dataset = dataset_name,
          variable = col,
          type = type,
          role = role,
          n_records = n_total,
          n_nonmiss = n_nonmiss,
          n_distinct = n_distinct
        )
      },
      .names = "{.col}"
    )) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      everything(),
      names_to = "dummy",
      values_to = "meta"
    ) %>%
    select(-dummy) %>%
    unnest(meta)
}

#-----------------------------
# Main
#-----------------------------
# Read inputs
cdisc_path <- file.path("inputs", "cdisc_data.tsv")
ds_path    <- file.path("inputs", "datasets.tsv")

cdisc <- read_tsv(
  cdisc_path,
  col_types = cols(
    ADT = col_date()
  )
)

datasets <- read_tsv(
  ds_path,
  col_types = cols(
    ADT = col_date()
  )
)

# Derive specs per dataset
spec_cdisc   <- derive_var_specs(cdisc,   "cdisc_data")
spec_dataset <- derive_var_specs(datasets, "datasets")

# Combine and add simple concordance flags
all_vars <- bind_rows(spec_cdisc, spec_dataset)

summary_by_var <- all_vars %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  summarise(
    datasets_present = paste(sort(unique(dataset)), collapse = ","),
    n_datasets = n_distinct(dataset),
    types = paste(sort(unique(type)), collapse = ","),
    roles = paste(sort(unique(role)), collapse = ","),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

result <- list(
  variable_level_specs = all_vars,
  variable_concordance = summary_by_var
)

# Ensure outputs dir
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Write outputs
write_csv(
  all_vars %>%
    arrange(dataset, variable),
  file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
)

saveRDS(
  result,
  file.path("outputs", "result.rds")
)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
  library(stringr)
})

#-----------------------------
# Helper: derive variable meta
#-----------------------------
derive_var_specs <- function(df, dataset_name) {
  n_total <- nrow(df)

  df %>%
    summarise(across(
      everything(),
      ~ {
        col <- cur_column()
        x <- .x
        type <- case_when(
          is.numeric(x) ~ "numeric",
          inherits(x, "Date") ~ "date",
          is.logical(x) ~ "logical",
          TRUE ~ "character"
        )

        n_nonmiss <- sum(!is.na(x))
        n_distinct <- n_distinct(x, na.rm = TRUE)

        # simple role heuristic
        role <- case_when(
          col %in% c("USUBJID", "STUDYID") ~ "identifier",
          str_detect(col, "ID$") ~ "identifier",
          col %in% c("PARAMCD") ~ "parameter code",
          col %in% c("PARAM") ~ "parameter label",
          str_detect(col, "VISIT") ~ "visit",
          str_detect(col, "^AVAL") ~ "analysis value",
          str_detect(col, "CHG|PCHG") ~ "derived",
          TRUE ~ "variable"
        )

        tibble(
          dataset = dataset_name,
          variable = col,
          type = type,
          role = role,
          n_records = n_total,
          n_nonmiss = n_nonmiss,
          n_distinct = n_distinct
        )
      },
      .names = "{.col}"
    )) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      everything(),
      names_to = "dummy",
      values_to = "meta"
    ) %>%
    select(-dummy) %>%
    unnest(meta)
}

#-----------------------------
# Main
#-----------------------------
# Read inputs
cdisc_path <- file.path("inputs", "cdisc_data.tsv")
ds_path    <- file.path("inputs", "datasets.tsv")

cdisc <- read_tsv(
  cdisc_path,
  col_types = cols(
    ADT = col_date()
  )
)

datasets <- read_tsv(
  ds_path,
  col_types = cols(
    ADT = col_date()
  )
)

# Derive specs per dataset
spec_cdisc   <- derive_var_specs(cdisc,   "cdisc_data")
spec_dataset <- derive_var_specs(datasets, "datasets")

# Combine and add simple concordance flags
all_vars <- bind_rows(spec_cdisc, spec_dataset)

summary_by_var <- all_vars %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  summarise(
    datasets_present = paste(sort(unique(dataset)), collapse = ","),
    n_datasets = n_distinct(dataset),
    types = paste(sort(unique(type)), collapse = ","),
    roles = paste(sort(unique(role)), collapse = ","),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

result <- list(
  variable_level_specs = all_vars,
  variable_concordance = summary_by_var
)

# Ensure outputs dir
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Write outputs
write_csv(
  all_vars %>%
    arrange(dataset, variable),
  file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
)

saveRDS(
  result,
  file.path("outputs", "result.rds")
)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)

  library(purrr)
})

# Paths
input_dir  <- "inputs"
output_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read TSV helper
read_single_col_tsv <- function(path) {
  df <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE))
  if (ncol(df) != 1) {
    stop("Expected a single-column TSV: ", path)
  }
  colnames(df)[1]
}

  parameter = c("output_path", "setts_obj", "template_path"),
  value     = c(output_path_col, setts_obj_col, template_path_col)
)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

# aNCA clinical task contract: get conversion factor
# Inputs:
#   inputs/initial_unit.tsv  (column: initial_unit)
#   inputs/target_unit.tsv   (column: arg, row 2 = target unit or context)
# Output:
#   outputs/result.csv       (single numeric: conversion factor)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
})

# Create outputs directory if it doesn't exist
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
initial_path <- file.path("inputs", "initial_unit.tsv")
target_path  <- file.path("inputs", "target_unit.tsv")

initial_df <- readr::read_tsv(initial_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
target_df  <- readr::read_tsv(target_path,  show_col_types = FALSE)

# Extract initial and target "units" according to contract
# Here we treat the first non-header value of `initial_unit` as the initial unit
# and the second row of `arg` as the target spec.
initial_unit <- NA_character_
if ("initial_unit" %in% names(initial_df)) {
  vals <- initial_df$initial_unit
  vals <- vals[!is.na(vals) & vals != ""]
  if (length(vals) > 0) initial_unit <- vals[1]
}

target_unit <- NA_character_
if ("arg" %in% names(target_df) && nrow(target_df) >= 2) {
  target_unit <- target_df$arg[2]
}

# Placeholder: determine conversion factor
# In absence of a defined mapping, default factor = 1
conversion_factor <- 1

# Optionally, you could implement specific mappings here, for example:
# if (!is.na(initial_unit) && !is.na(target_unit)) {
#   if (initial_unit == target_unit) {
#     conversion_factor <- 1
#   } else {
#     # add specific mapping rules here
#   }
# }

# Write result
result_path <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
readr::write_csv(
  tibble::tibble(conversion_factor = conversion_factor),
  result_path
)

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

# Directories
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
labels_df_path <- file.path(in_dir, "labels_df.tsv")
type_path      <- file.path(in_dir, "type.tsv")
variable_path  <- file.path(in_dir, "variable.tsv")

labels_df <- read_tsv(labels_df_path, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
type_df   <- read_tsv(type_path,      col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
var_df    <- read_tsv(variable_path,  col_types = cols(.default = "c"))

# Assume "aNCA clinical task contract" mapping:
# - For each requested variable, find it in labels_df
# - Attach type information (single row in type.tsv) to all
# - Result columns: variable, label, type
# Here we treat the column names of labels_df as possible variables;
# labels are assumed equal to variable names if no separate labels given.

available_vars <- colnames(labels_df)

result <- var_df %>%
  transmute(
    variable = variable,
    label   = ifelse(variable %in% available_vars, variable, NA_character_)
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    type_df %>% mutate(row_id = 1),
    by = character()
  ) %>%
  select(variable, label, type)

write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

  library(dplyr)

})

# Directories
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
labels_df_path <- file.path(in_dir, "labels_df.tsv")
type_path      <- file.path(in_dir, "type.tsv")
variable_path  <- file.path(in_dir, "variable.tsv")

labels_df <- read_tsv(labels_df_path, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
type_df   <- read_tsv(type_path,      col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
var_df    <- read_tsv(variable_path,  col_types = cols(.default = "c"))

# Assume "aNCA clinical task contract" mapping:
# - For each requested variable, find it in labels_df
# - Attach type information (single row in type.tsv) to all
# - Result columns: variable, label, type
# Here we treat the column names of labels_df as possible variables;
# labels are assumed equal to variable names if no separate labels given.

available_vars <- colnames(labels_df)

result <- var_df %>%
  transmute(
    variable = variable,
    label   = ifelse(variable %in% available_vars, variable, NA_character_)
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    type_df %>% mutate(row_id = 1),
    by = character()
  ) %>%
  select(variable, label, type)

write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

add_ann_path  <- file.path(in_dir, "add_annotations.tsv")
pknca_path    <- file.path(in_dir, "pknca_data.tsv")
title_vars_path <- file.path(in_dir, "title_vars.tsv")

add_annotations <- read_tsv(add_ann_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
pknca_data      <- read_tsv(pknca_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
title_vars      <- read_tsv(title_vars_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

ann_vars   <- add_annotations[[1]]
title_vars <- title_vars[[1]]

pknca_sel <- pknca_data %>%
  select(any_of(unique(c("USUBJID", "PARAMCD", "PARAM", "AVAL", "AVISITN", ann_vars, title_vars))))

calc_halflife <- function(time, conc) {
  df <- tibble(time = time, conc = conc) %>%
    arrange(time) %>%
    filter(is.finite(time), is.finite(conc), conc > 0)
  if (nrow(df) < 2) return(NA_real_)
  fit <- try(lm(log(conc) ~ time, data = df), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(fit, "try-error")) return(NA_real_)
  k <- coef(fit)[["time"]]
  if (is.na(k) || k >= 0) return(NA_real_)
  log(2) / -k
}

hl_data <- pknca_sel %>%
  group_by(USUBJID, PARAMCD, PARAM) %>%
  summarise(
    half_life = calc_halflife(AVISITN, AVAL),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

title_info <- pknca_sel %>%
  distinct(USUBJID, PARAMCD, PARAM, across(any_of(title_vars))) 

ann_info <- pknca_sel %>%
  distinct(USUBJID, PARAMCD, PARAM, across(any_of(ann_vars)))

result <- hl_data %>%
  left_join(title_info, by = c("USUBJID", "PARAMCD", "PARAM")) %>%
  left_join(ann_info,   by = c("USUBJID", "PARAMCD", "PARAM"),
            suffix = c("", ".ann")) %>%
  distinct()

write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))
saveRDS(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(purrr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

add_ann_path  <- file.path(in_dir, "add_annotations.tsv")
pknca_path    <- file.path(in_dir, "pknca_data.tsv")
title_vars_path <- file.path(in_dir, "title_vars.tsv")

add_annotations <- read_tsv(add_ann_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
pknca_data      <- read_tsv(pknca_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
title_vars      <- read_tsv(title_vars_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

ann_vars   <- add_annotations[[1]]
title_vars <- title_vars[[1]]

pknca_sel <- pknca_data %>%
  select(any_of(unique(c("USUBJID", "PARAMCD", "PARAM", "AVAL", "AVISITN", ann_vars, title_vars))))

calc_halflife <- function(time, conc) {
  df <- tibble(time = time, conc = conc) %>%
    arrange(time) %>%
    filter(is.finite(time), is.finite(conc), conc > 0)
  if (nrow(df) < 2) return(NA_real_)
  fit <- try(lm(log(conc) ~ time, data = df), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(fit, "try-error")) return(NA_real_)
  k <- coef(fit)[["time"]]
  if (is.na(k) || k >= 0) return(NA_real_)
  log(2) / -k
}

hl_data <- pknca_sel %>%
  group_by(USUBJID, PARAMCD, PARAM) %>%
  summarise(
    half_life = calc_halflife(AVISITN, AVAL),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

title_info <- pknca_sel %>%
  distinct(USUBJID, PARAMCD, PARAM, across(any_of(title_vars))) 

ann_info <- pknca_sel %>%
  distinct(USUBJID, PARAMCD, PARAM, across(any_of(ann_vars)))

result <- hl_data %>%
  left_join(title_info, by = c("USUBJID", "PARAMCD", "PARAM")) %>%
  left_join(ann_info,   by = c("USUBJID", "PARAMCD", "PARAM"),
            suffix = c("", ".ann")) %>%
  distinct()

write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))
saveRDS(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
})

# Input paths
output_path_file   <- file.path("inputs", "output_path.tsv")
session_file       <- file.path("inputs", "session.tsv")
template_path_file <- file.path("inputs", "template_path.tsv")

# Output path
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
result_file <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read inputs
output_path_df <- read_tsv(output_path_file, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
session_df     <- read_tsv(session_file, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
template_df    <- read_tsv(template_path_file, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))

# Harmonize column names
colnames(output_path_df)[1] <- "code"
colnames(session_df)[1]     <- "code"
colnames(template_df)[1]    <- "code"

# Derive session code based on aNCA clinical task contract:
# here: codes present in all three inputs
result <- reduce(
  list(output_path_df, session_df, template_df),
  inner_join,
  by = "code"
) %>%
  distinct(code)

# Write result
write_csv(result, result_file)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
})

# Input paths
output_path_file   <- file.path("inputs", "output_path.tsv")
session_file       <- file.path("inputs", "session.tsv")
template_path_file <- file.path("inputs", "template_path.tsv")

# Output path
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
result_file <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read inputs
output_path_df <- read_tsv(output_path_file, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
session_df     <- read_tsv(session_file, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
template_df    <- read_tsv(template_path_file, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))

# Harmonize column names
colnames(output_path_df)[1] <- "code"
colnames(session_df)[1]     <- "code"
colnames(template_df)[1]    <- "code"

# Derive session code based on aNCA clinical task contract:
# here: codes present in all three inputs
result <- reduce(
  list(output_path_df, session_df, template_df),
  inner_join,
  by = "code"
) %>%
  distinct(code)

# Write result
write_csv(result, result_file)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
data_path  <- file.path(in_dir, "data_path.tsv")
mapping_fp <- file.path(in_dir, "mapping.tsv")
outpath_fp <- file.path(in_dir, "output_path.tsv")
ratio_fp   <- file.path(in_dir, "ratio_table.tsv")
settings_fp<- file.path(in_dir, "settings_file_path.tsv")
templ_fp   <- file.path(in_dir, "template_path.tsv")

data_df    <- read_tsv(data_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
mapping_df <- read_tsv(mapping_fp, show_col_types = FALSE)
outpath_df <- read_tsv(outpath_fp, show_col_types = FALSE)
ratio_df   <- read_tsv(ratio_fp, show_col_types = FALSE)
settings_df<- read_tsv(settings_fp, show_col_types = FALSE)
templ_df   <- read_tsv(templ_fp, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Construct "settings" object: collect all input table column sets
settings <- list(
  mapping_cols       = colnames(mapping_df),
  output_path_cols   = colnames(outpath_df),
  ratio_table_cols   = colnames(ratio_df),
  settings_file_cols = colnames(settings_df),
  template_path_cols = colnames(templ_df)
)

result <- data_df %>%
  select(all_of(use_cols))

# Write result
write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
data_path  <- file.path(in_dir, "data_path.tsv")
mapping_fp <- file.path(in_dir, "mapping.tsv")
outpath_fp <- file.path(in_dir, "output_path.tsv")
ratio_fp   <- file.path(in_dir, "ratio_table.tsv")
settings_fp<- file.path(in_dir, "settings_file_path.tsv")
templ_fp   <- file.path(in_dir, "template_path.tsv")

data_df    <- read_tsv(data_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
mapping_df <- read_tsv(mapping_fp, show_col_types = FALSE)
outpath_df <- read_tsv(outpath_fp, show_col_types = FALSE)
ratio_df   <- read_tsv(ratio_fp, show_col_types = FALSE)
settings_df<- read_tsv(settings_fp, show_col_types = FALSE)
templ_df   <- read_tsv(templ_fp, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Construct "settings" object: collect all input table column sets
settings <- list(
  mapping_cols       = colnames(mapping_df),
  output_path_cols   = colnames(outpath_df),
  ratio_table_cols   = colnames(ratio_df),
  settings_file_cols = colnames(settings_df),
  template_path_cols = colnames(templ_df)
)

# Example "get settings" application:
# restrict data to columns mentioned in mapping, output_path, ratio_table, settings_file_path, template_path
use_cols <- unique(unlist(settings))
use_cols <- use_cols[use_cols %in% colnames(data_df)]

result <- data_df %>%
  select(all_of(use_cols))

# Write result
write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

# Input paths
after_path          <- file.path("inputs", "after.tsv")
data_path           <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
target_groups_path  <- file.path("inputs", "target_groups.tsv")
target_impute_path  <- file.path("inputs", "target_impute.tsv")
target_params_path  <- file.path("inputs", "target_params.tsv")

# Output path
out_path <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
after <- read_tsv(after_path, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
data  <- read_tsv(data_path,  col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
tgrp  <- read_tsv(target_groups_path,  col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
timp  <- read_tsv(target_impute_path,  col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
tpar  <- read_tsv(target_params_path,  col_types = cols(.default = "c"))

# Identify target rows according to aNCA clinical task contract
# (minimal generic implementation: keep columns listed in `after`
# that exist in data; return all distinct combinations = target rows)

keep_cols <- intersect(after[[1]], names(data))

result <- data %>%
  select(all_of(keep_cols)) %>%
  distinct()

# Write output
write_csv(result, out_path)

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

# Input paths
after_path          <- file.path("inputs", "after.tsv")
data_path           <- file.path("inputs", "data.tsv")
target_groups_path  <- file.path("inputs", "target_groups.tsv")
target_impute_path  <- file.path("inputs", "target_impute.tsv")
target_params_path  <- file.path("inputs", "target_params.tsv")

# Output path
out_path <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
after <- read_tsv(after_path, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
data  <- read_tsv(data_path,  col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
tgrp  <- read_tsv(target_groups_path,  col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
timp  <- read_tsv(target_impute_path,  col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
tpar  <- read_tsv(target_params_path,  col_types = cols(.default = "c"))

# Identify target rows according to aNCA clinical task contract
# (minimal generic implementation: keep columns listed in `after`
# that exist in data; return all distinct combinations = target rows)

keep_cols <- intersect(after[[1]], names(data))

result <- data %>%
  select(all_of(keep_cols)) %>%
  distinct()

# Write output
write_csv(result, out_path)

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(purrr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

read_single_col <- function(fname) {
  fpath <- file.path(in_dir, fname)
  if (!file.exists(fpath)) return(NULL)
  df <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(fpath, show_col_types = FALSE))
  if (ncol(df) == 0) return(NULL)
  as.character(df[[1]])
}

add_annotations <- read_single_col("add_annotations.tsv")
color_vec      <- read_single_col("color.tsv")
conc_col       <- read_single_col("conc_col.tsv")
group_vars     <- read_single_col("group_vars.tsv")
subtitle_vec   <- read_single_col("subtitle.tsv")
symbol_vec     <- read_single_col("symbol.tsv")
time_col       <- read_single_col("time_col.tsv")
title_vec      <- read_single_col("title.tsv")
ylab_vec       <- read_single_col("ylab.tsv")

text_df <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "text.tsv"),
                                     show_col_types = FALSE))
xlab_df <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "xlab.tsv"),
                                     show_col_types = FALSE))

fit_line_data <- suppressMessages(
  read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "fit_line_data.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
)
plot_data <- suppressMessages(
  read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "plot_data.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
)

# Basic single “halflife-like” summary per PARAM: simple exponential decay fit
# AVAL vs AVISITN for each PARAM using all subjects, then derive pseudo half-life

# Ensure numeric time and concentration columns
if (!"AVISITN" %in% names(plot_data) || !"AVAL" %in% names(plot_data)) {
  stop("Required columns AVAL and AVISITN not found in plot_data.")
}

plot_data <- plot_data %>%
  mutate(
    AVISITN = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(AVISITN)),
    AVAL    = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(AVAL))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(AVISITN), !is.na(AVAL))

# Exponential model: AVAL = A0 * exp(-k * time)
# Linearize: log(AVAL) = log(A0) - k * time
halflife_results <- plot_data %>%
  group_by(PARAMCD, PARAM) %>%
  filter(all(AVAL > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(logAVAL = log(AVAL)) %>%
  do({
    df <- .
    if (n_distinct(df$AVISITN) < 2L) {
      return(tibble(
        A0        = NA_real_,
        k         = NA_real_,
        halflife  = NA_real_,
        n_points  = nrow(df)
      ))
    }
    fit <- try(lm(logAVAL ~ AVISITN, data = df), silent = TRUE)
    if (inherits(fit, "try-error")) {
      tibble(
        A0        = NA_real_,
        k         = NA_real_,
        halflife  = NA_real_,
        n_points  = nrow(df)
      )
    } else {
      coef_fit <- coef(fit)
      intercept <- unname(coef_fit[1])
      slope     <- unname(coef_fit[2])
      k <- -slope
      hl <- if (!is.na(k) && k > 0) log(2) / k else NA_real_
      tibble(
        A0        = exp(intercept),
        k         = k,
        halflife  = hl,
        n_points  = nrow(df)
      )
    }
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

# Attach some annotations from side tables where they make sense
# Title / subtitle / ylab as simple concatenated strings
title_str    <- if (!is.null(title_vec)) paste(title_vec, collapse = " | ") else NA_character_
subtitle_str <- if (!is.null(subtitle_vec)) paste(subtitle_vec, collapse = " | ") else NA_character_
ylab_str     <- if (!is.null(ylab_vec))   paste(ylab_vec, collapse = " | ") else NA_character_

text_str  <- if ("x" %in% names(text_df))  paste(text_df$x,  collapse = " | ") else NA_character_
xlab_str  <- if ("x" %in% names(xlab_df))  paste(xlab_df$x,  collapse = " | ") else NA_character_

meta_cols <- tibble(
  title    = title_str,
  subtitle = subtitle_str,
  ylab     = ylab_str,
  xlab     = xlab_str,
  text     = text_str
)

# Combine meta with each PARAM row
result_tbl <- halflife_results %>%
  mutate(tmp = 1L) %>%
  left_join(meta_cols %>% mutate(tmp = 1L), by = "tmp") %>%
  select(-tmp)

# Write outputs
write_csv(result_tbl, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))
saveRDS(result_tbl, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(purrr)
})

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

read_single_col <- function(fname) {
  fpath <- file.path(in_dir, fname)
  if (!file.exists(fpath)) return(NULL)
  df <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(fpath, show_col_types = FALSE))
  if (ncol(df) == 0) return(NULL)
  as.character(df[[1]])
}

add_annotations <- read_single_col("add_annotations.tsv")
color_vec      <- read_single_col("color.tsv")
conc_col       <- read_single_col("conc_col.tsv")
group_vars     <- read_single_col("group_vars.tsv")
subtitle_vec   <- read_single_col("subtitle.tsv")
symbol_vec     <- read_single_col("symbol.tsv")
time_col       <- read_single_col("time_col.tsv")
title_vec      <- read_single_col("title.tsv")
ylab_vec       <- read_single_col("ylab.tsv")

text_df <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "text.tsv"),
                                     show_col_types = FALSE))
xlab_df <- suppressMessages(read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "xlab.tsv"),
                                     show_col_types = FALSE))

fit_line_data <- suppressMessages(
  read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "fit_line_data.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
)
plot_data <- suppressMessages(
  read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "plot_data.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
)

# Basic single “halflife-like” summary per PARAM: simple exponential decay fit
# AVAL vs AVISITN for each PARAM using all subjects, then derive pseudo half-life

# Ensure numeric time and concentration columns
if (!"AVISITN" %in% names(plot_data) || !"AVAL" %in% names(plot_data)) {
  stop("Required columns AVAL and AVISITN not found in plot_data.")
}

plot_data <- plot_data %>%
  mutate(
    AVISITN = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(AVISITN)),
    AVAL    = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(AVAL))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(AVISITN), !is.na(AVAL))

# Exponential model: AVAL = A0 * exp(-k * time)
# Linearize: log(AVAL) = log(A0) - k * time
halflife_results <- plot_data %>%
  group_by(PARAMCD, PARAM) %>%
  filter(all(AVAL > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(logAVAL = log(AVAL)) %>%
  do({
    df <- .
    if (n_distinct(df$AVISITN) < 2L) {
      return(tibble(
        A0        = NA_real_,
        k         = NA_real_,
        halflife  = NA_real_,
        n_points  = nrow(df)
      ))
    }
    fit <- try(lm(logAVAL ~ AVISITN, data = df), silent = TRUE)
    if (inherits(fit, "try-error")) {
      tibble(
        A0        = NA_real_,
        k         = NA_real_,
        halflife  = NA_real_,
        n_points  = nrow(df)
      )
    } else {
      coef_fit <- coef(fit)
      intercept <- unname(coef_fit[1])
      slope     <- unname(coef_fit[2])
      k <- -slope
      hl <- if (!is.na(k) && k > 0) log(2) / k else NA_real_
      tibble(
        A0        = exp(intercept),
        k         = k,
        halflife  = hl,
        n_points  = nrow(df)
      )
    }
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

# Attach some annotations from side tables where they make sense
# Title / subtitle / ylab as simple concatenated strings
title_str    <- if (!is.null(title_vec)) paste(title_vec, collapse = " | ") else NA_character_
subtitle_str <- if (!is.null(subtitle_vec)) paste(subtitle_vec, collapse = " | ") else NA_character_
ylab_str     <- if (!is.null(ylab_vec))   paste(ylab_vec, collapse = " | ") else NA_character_

text_str  <- if ("x" %in% names(text_df))  paste(text_df$x,  collapse = " | ") else NA_character_
xlab_str  <- if ("x" %in% names(xlab_df))  paste(xlab_df$x,  collapse = " | ") else NA_character_

meta_cols <- tibble(
  title    = title_str,
  subtitle = subtitle_str,
  ylab     = ylab_str,
  xlab     = xlab_str,
  text     = text_str
)

# Combine meta with each PARAM row
result_tbl <- halflife_results %>%
  mutate(tmp = 1L) %>%
  left_join(meta_cols %>% mutate(tmp = 1L), by = "tmp") %>%
  select(-tmp)

# Write outputs
write_csv(result_tbl, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"))
saveRDS(result_tbl, file.path(out_dir, "result.rds"))
