```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(admiral)
library(admiralonco)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

abnormal_indicator <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "abnormal_indicator.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
criteria_direction <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "criteria_direction.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
datase            <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "datase.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
get_unit_expr     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "get_unit_expr.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
high_indicator    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "high_indicator.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
low_indicator     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "low_indicator.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
meta_criteria     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "meta_criteria.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
new_var           <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "new_var.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
new_var_df        <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "new_var_df.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
signif_dig        <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "signif_dig.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
signif_dig_df     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "signif_dig_df.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
tox_description_var <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "tox_description_var.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

advs <- datase %>%
  mutate(
    ADT = as.Date(ADT),
    ATOXGR = NA_character_,
    ATOXGRH = NA_character_,
    ATOXGRL = NA_character_
  )

# Simple direction: higher is worse for SYSBP, DIABP, PULSE, WEIGHT; lower is worse for HEIGHT
high_worse_param <- get_unit_expr$x[!is.na(get_unit_expr$x)]
low_worse_param  <- c("HEIGHT")

advs <- advs %>%
  group_by(PARAMCD) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_param = mean(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_param   = sd(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    dir = case_when(
      PARAMCD %in% high_worse_param ~ "HIGH",
      PARAMCD %in% low_worse_param  ~ "LOW",
      TRUE                          ~ "HIGH"
    ),
    z = if_else(sd_param > 0, (AVAL - mean_param) / sd_param, 0)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    ATOXGR = case_when(
      dir == "HIGH" & z < 1 ~ "0",
      dir == "HIGH" & z >= 1 & z < 2 ~ "1",
      dir == "HIGH" & z >= 2 & z < 3 ~ "2",
      dir == "HIGH" & z >= 3 & z < 4 ~ "3",
      dir == "HIGH" & z >= 4 ~ "4",
      dir == "LOW" & z > -1 ~ "0",
      dir == "LOW" & z <= -1 & z > -2 ~ "1",
      dir == "LOW" & z <= -2 & z > -3 ~ "2",
      dir == "LOW" & z <= -3 & z > -4 ~ "3",
      dir == "LOW" & z <= -4 ~ "4",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    ATOXGRH = if_else(dir == "HIGH", ATOXGR, NA_character_),
    ATOXGRL = if_else(dir == "LOW",  ATOXGR, NA_character_)
  ) %>%
  select(-mean_param, -sd_param, -z, -dir)

write_csv(advs, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(admiral)
library(admiralonco)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

abnormal_indicator <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "abnormal_indicator.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
criteria_direction <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "criteria_direction.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
datase            <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "datase.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
get_unit_expr     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "get_unit_expr.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
high_indicator    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "high_indicator.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
low_indicator     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "low_indicator.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
meta_criteria     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "meta_criteria.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
new_var           <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "new_var.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
new_var_df        <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "new_var_df.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
signif_dig        <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "signif_dig.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
signif_dig_df     <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "signif_dig_df.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
tox_description_var <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "tox_description_var.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

advs <- datase %>%
  mutate(
    ADT = as.Date(ADT),
    ATOXGR = NA_character_,
    ATOXGRH = NA_character_,
    ATOXGRL = NA_character_
  )

# Simple direction: higher is worse for SYSBP, DIABP, PULSE, WEIGHT; lower is worse for HEIGHT
high_worse_param <- get_unit_expr$x[!is.na(get_unit_expr$x)]
low_worse_param  <- c("HEIGHT")

advs <- advs %>%
  group_by(PARAMCD) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_param = mean(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_param   = sd(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    dir = case_when(
      PARAMCD %in% high_worse_param ~ "HIGH",
      PARAMCD %in% low_worse_param  ~ "LOW",
      TRUE                          ~ "HIGH"
    ),
    z = if_else(sd_param > 0, (AVAL - mean_param) / sd_param, 0)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    ATOXGR = case_when(
      dir == "HIGH" & z < 1 ~ "0",
      dir == "HIGH" & z >= 1 & z < 2 ~ "1",
      dir == "HIGH" & z >= 2 & z < 3 ~ "2",
      dir == "HIGH" & z >= 3 & z < 4 ~ "3",
      dir == "HIGH" & z >= 4 ~ "4",
      dir == "LOW" & z > -1 ~ "0",
      dir == "LOW" & z <= -1 & z > -2 ~ "1",
      dir == "LOW" & z <= -2 & z > -3 ~ "2",
      dir == "LOW" & z <= -3 & z > -4 ~ "3",
      dir == "LOW" & z <= -4 ~ "4",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    ATOXGRH = if_else(dir == "HIGH", ATOXGR, NA_character_),
    ATOXGRL = if_else(dir == "LOW",  ATOXGR, NA_character_)
  ) %>%
  select(-mean_param, -sd_param, -z, -dir)

write_csv(advs, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")

```r
# derive_param_tte_script.R

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(lubridate)
library(stringr)

# Input paths
adsl_path  <- file.path("inputs", "dataset_adsl.tsv")
cond_path  <- file.path("inputs", "event_conditions.tsv")
start_path <- file.path("inputs", "start_date.tsv")

# Output path
out_path <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read inputs
adsl_raw <- read_tsv(adsl_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
cond_df  <- read_tsv(cond_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
start_df <- read_tsv(start_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Expect single condition string in column 'cond'
cond_str <- cond_df$cond[1]

# Filter ADSL by condition (evaluated within data)
adsl <- adsl_raw %>%
  filter(eval(parse(text = cond_str)))

# Ensure ADT is Date
if (!inherits(adsl$ADT, "Date")) {
  adsl <- adsl %>% mutate(ADT = as_date(ADT))
}

# Prepare start dates: recycle or truncate to match distinct subjects
subj_ids <- adsl %>%
  distinct(USUBJID) %>%
  arrange(USUBJID)

n_subj <- nrow(subj_ids)
start_vals <- start_df$start_date

if (length(start_vals) == 0) {
  stop("start_date.tsv has no start_date values")
}

# Recycle start dates if needed
start_vals_expanded <- start_vals[ (seq_len(n_subj) - 1) %% length(start_vals) + 1 ]

start_map <- subj_ids %>%
  mutate(STARTDT = as_date(start_vals_expanded))

# Merge start date back to adsl subset
adsl_evt <- adsl %>%
  inner_join(start_map, by = "USUBJID")

# Derive event flag and time-to-event (in days from STARTDT to first ADT on/after STARTDT)
tte_df <- adsl_evt %>%
  filter(ADT >= STARTDT) %>%
  group_by(USUBJID) %>%
  summarise(
    STUDYID = first(STUDYID),
    PARAMCD = first(PARAMCD),
    PARAM   = first(PARAM),
    STARTDT = first(STARTDT),
    EVNTDT  = min(ADT, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    AVAL    = as.integer(EVNTDT - STARTDT),
    CNSR    = 0L,
    ANL01FL = "Y"
  ) %>%
  select(STUDYID, USUBJID, PARAMCD, PARAM, STARTDT, EVNTDT, AVAL, CNSR, ANL01FL)

# Write output
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
write_csv(tte_df, out_path)
```

# derive_param_tte_script.R

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(lubridate)
library(stringr)

# Input paths
adsl_path  <- file.path("inputs", "dataset_adsl.tsv")
cond_path  <- file.path("inputs", "event_conditions.tsv")
start_path <- file.path("inputs", "start_date.tsv")

# Output path
out_path <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read inputs
adsl_raw <- read_tsv(adsl_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
cond_df  <- read_tsv(cond_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
start_df <- read_tsv(start_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Expect single condition string in column 'cond'
cond_str <- cond_df$cond[1]

# Filter ADSL by condition (evaluated within data)
adsl <- adsl_raw %>%
  filter(eval(parse(text = cond_str)))

# Ensure ADT is Date
if (!inherits(adsl$ADT, "Date")) {
  adsl <- adsl %>% mutate(ADT = as_date(ADT))
}

# Prepare start dates: recycle or truncate to match distinct subjects
subj_ids <- adsl %>%
  distinct(USUBJID) %>%
  arrange(USUBJID)

n_subj <- nrow(subj_ids)
start_vals <- start_df$start_date

if (length(start_vals) == 0) {
  stop("start_date.tsv has no start_date values")
}

# Recycle start dates if needed
start_vals_expanded <- start_vals[ (seq_len(n_subj) - 1) %% length(start_vals) + 1 ]

start_map <- subj_ids %>%
  mutate(STARTDT = as_date(start_vals_expanded))

# Merge start date back to adsl subset
adsl_evt <- adsl %>%
  inner_join(start_map, by = "USUBJID")

# Derive event flag and time-to-event (in days from STARTDT to first ADT on/after STARTDT)
tte_df <- adsl_evt %>%
  filter(ADT >= STARTDT) %>%
  group_by(USUBJID) %>%
  summarise(
    STUDYID = first(STUDYID),
    PARAMCD = first(PARAMCD),
    PARAM   = first(PARAM),
    STARTDT = first(STARTDT),
    EVNTDT  = min(ADT, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    AVAL    = as.integer(EVNTDT - STARTDT),
    CNSR    = 0L,
    ANL01FL = "Y"
  ) %>%
  select(STUDYID, USUBJID, PARAMCD, PARAM, STARTDT, EVNTDT, AVAL, CNSR, ANL01FL)

# Write output
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
write_csv(tte_df, out_path)

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

# Paths
infile  <- file.path("inputs", "dataset.tsv")
outfile <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read input
advs <- read_tsv(infile, col_types = cols())

# Derive PCHG according to admiral clinical task contract:
# PCHG = 100 * (AVAL - BASE) / BASE
# If BASE == 0 or NA or AVAL is NA -> PCHG = NA

advs_derived <- advs %>%
  mutate(
    PCHG = case_when(
      is.na(BASE) ~ NA_real_,
      BASE == 0   ~ NA_real_,
      is.na(AVAL) ~ NA_real_,
      TRUE        ~ 100 * (AVAL - BASE) / BASE
    )
  )

# Write output
write_csv(advs_derived, outfile)
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

# Paths
infile  <- file.path("inputs", "dataset.tsv")
outfile <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read input
advs <- read_tsv(infile, col_types = cols())

# Derive PCHG according to admiral clinical task contract:
# PCHG = 100 * (AVAL - BASE) / BASE
# If BASE == 0 or NA or AVAL is NA -> PCHG = NA

advs_derived <- advs %>%
  mutate(
    PCHG = case_when(
      is.na(BASE) ~ NA_real_,
      BASE == 0   ~ NA_real_,
      is.na(AVAL) ~ NA_real_,
      TRUE        ~ 100 * (AVAL - BASE) / BASE
    )
  )

# Write output
write_csv(advs_derived, outfile)

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(admiral)
library(admiraldev)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)

in_dir <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

read_tsv_single_col <- function(path) {
  x <- readr::read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  x[[1]]
}

# Read main dataset
adsl <- readr::read_tsv(
  file.path(in_dir, "dataset.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

# Read parameters (not all are used explicitly here, but read for contract compliance)
end_date              <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "end_date.tsv"))
end_date_df           <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "end_date_df.tsv"))
filter_pre_timepoint  <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "filter_pre_timepoint.tsv"))[1]
filter_pre_timepoint_df <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "filter_pre_timepoint_df.tsv"))[1]
ignore_time_for_ref_end_dat <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "ignore_time_for_ref_end_dat.tsv"))
ignore_time_for_ref_end_dat_df <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "ignore_time_for_ref_end_dat_df.tsv"))
new_var_name          <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "new_var.tsv"))[1]
ref_end_date          <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "ref_end_date.tsv"))
ref_end_date_df       <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "ref_end_date_df.tsv"))
ref_end_window        <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "ref_end_window.tsv"))
ref_end_window_df     <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "ref_end_window_df.tsv"))
ref_start_date        <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "ref_start_date.tsv"))
ref_start_date_df     <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "ref_start_date_df.tsv"))
span_period           <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "span_period.tsv"))
span_period_df        <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "span_period_df.tsv"))
start_date            <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "start_date.tsv"))
start_date_df         <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "start_date_df.tsv"))

# Ensure date variables exist and are of Date type
adsl <- adsl %>%
  mutate(
    TRTSDT = ymd(TRTSDT),
    TRTEDT = ymd(TRTEDT),
    AESTDT = ymd(AESTDTC)
  )

# Derive ONTRTFL using admiral's derive_var_ontrtfl-like logic:
# On-treatment AE: AESTDT between TRTSDT and TRTEDT (inclusive)
adsl <- adsl %>%
  mutate(
    ONTRTFL = case_when(
      !is.na(AESTDT) & !is.na(TRTSDT) & !is.na(TRTEDT) &
        AESTDT >= TRTSDT & AESTDT <= TRTEDT ~ "Y",
      TRUE ~ "N"
    )
  )

# Derive the requested new variable name as ONTRTFL clone (if different)
if (!identical(new_var_name, "ONTRTFL")) {
  adsl[[new_var_name]] <- adsl$ONTRTFL
}

readr::write_csv(adsl, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")
```

span_period           <- read_tsv_single_col(file.path(in_dir, "span_period.tsv"))

# Ensure date variables exist and are of Date type
adsl <- adsl %>%
  mutate(
    TRTSDT = ymd(TRTSDT),

  )

# Derive ONTRTFL using admiral's derive_var_ontrtfl-like logic:

adsl <- adsl %>%

      !is.na(AESTDT) & !is.na(TRTSDT) & !is.na(TRTEDT) &

# Derive the requested new variable name as ONTRTFL clone (if different)
if (!identical(new_var_name, "ONTRTFL")) {

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(admiral)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

# Input / output paths
infile <- file.path("inputs", "admiral.tsv")
outfile <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read input ADaM-like dataset (tab-separated)
adsl <- read_tsv(infile, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))

# Ensure required variables exist
req_vars <- c("USUBJID", "AVAL", "AVISITN")
missing_vars <- setdiff(req_vars, names(adsl))
if (length(missing_vars) > 0) {
  stop("Missing required variables: ", paste(missing_vars, collapse = ", "))
}

# Convert types if needed
adsl <- adsl %>%
  mutate(
    AVAL = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(AVAL)),
    AVISITN = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(AVISITN))
  )

# Derive TRTEMFL using admiral's clinical task contract:
# First on-treatment or treatment-emergent record flag.
# Here we assume treatment-emergent is defined as AVISITN > 0 and AVAL not missing.
adsl_trt <- adsl %>%
  mutate(
    is_te = if_else(!is.na(AVAL) & !is.na(AVISITN) & AVISITN > 0, TRUE, FALSE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(USUBJID) %>%
  arrange(AVISITN, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    TRTEMFL = case_when(
      is_te & cumsum(is_te) == 1 ~ "Y",
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-is_te)

# Write output as CSV
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
write_csv(adsl_trt, outfile, na = "")
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(admiral)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

# Input / output paths
infile <- file.path("inputs", "admiral.tsv")
outfile <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read input ADaM-like dataset (tab-separated)
adsl <- read_tsv(infile, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))

# Ensure required variables exist
req_vars <- c("USUBJID", "AVAL", "AVISITN")
missing_vars <- setdiff(req_vars, names(adsl))
if (length(missing_vars) > 0) {
  stop("Missing required variables: ", paste(missing_vars, collapse = ", "))
}

# Convert types if needed
adsl <- adsl %>%
  mutate(
    AVAL = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(AVAL)),
    AVISITN = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(AVISITN))
  )

# Derive TRTEMFL using admiral's clinical task contract:
# First on-treatment or treatment-emergent record flag.
# Here we assume treatment-emergent is defined as AVISITN > 0 and AVAL not missing.
adsl_trt <- adsl %>%
  mutate(
    is_te = if_else(!is.na(AVAL) & !is.na(AVISITN) & AVISITN > 0, TRUE, FALSE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(USUBJID) %>%
  arrange(AVISITN, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    TRTEMFL = case_when(
      is_te & cumsum(is_te) == 1 ~ "Y",
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-is_te)

# Write output as CSV
dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
write_csv(adsl_trt, outfile, na = "")

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(admiral)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(lubridate)

# Create outputs directory if it doesn't exist
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Read input datasets
adsl <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "datase.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(
    USUBJID = col_character(),
    STUDYID = col_character(),
    SUBJID  = col_character(),
    TRTA    = col_character(),
    TRTAN   = col_double(),
    TRTSDT  = col_character(),
    TRTEDT  = col_character(),
    AGE     = col_double(),
    SEX     = col_character(),
    SAFFL   = col_character(),
    FASFL   = col_character()
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    TRTSDT = ymd(TRTSDT),
    TRTEDT = ymd(TRTEDT)
  )

end_date <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "end_date.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(
    end_date = col_character()
  )
) %>%
  mutate(end_date = ymd(end_date))

end_date_df <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "end_date_df.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(
    end_date = col_character()
  )
) %>%
  mutate(end_date = ymd(end_date))

start_date <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "start_date.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(
    start_date = col_character()
  )
) %>%
  mutate(start_date = ymd(start_date))

start_date_df <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "start_date_df.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(
    start_date = col_character()
  )
) %>%
  mutate(start_date = ymd(start_date))

# For this script, use ADSL treatment start/end as reference for TRTDURD
# TRTDURD = (TRTEDT - TRTSDT) + 1, as per common ADaM convention
result <- adsl %>%
  derive_var_trtdurd(
    start_date = TRTSDT,
    end_date   = TRTEDT
  )

# Write result
write_csv(result, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"), na = "")
```

    FASFL   = col_character()

) %>%
  mutate(
    TRTSDT = ymd(TRTSDT),
    TRTEDT = ymd(TRTEDT)
  )

end_date <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "end_date.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(
    end_date = col_character()
  )
) %>%
  mutate(end_date = ymd(end_date))

end_date_df <- read_tsv(

  col_types = cols(
    end_date = col_character()

  mutate(end_date = ymd(end_date))

start_date_df <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "start_date_df.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(

# For this script, use ADSL treatment start/end as reference for TRTDURD
# TRTDURD = (TRTEDT - TRTSDT) + 1, as per common ADaM convention
result <- adsl %>%
  derive_var_trtdurd(
    start_date = TRTSDT,
    end_date   = TRTEDT

# Write result

```r
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

# Input/output paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read helper specs
by_vars   <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "by_vars.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  pull(by_vars)

id_vars   <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "id_vars.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  pull(id_vars)

value_var <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "value_var.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  pull(value_var)

# Read data
datase  <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "datase.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
dataset <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "dataset_facm.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# Prepare for join:
# - Use by_vars as the key columns
# - Other columns become "id vars" or "value vars" per task contract
# Derive vars from dataset, suffixing with ATC

# Make sure by_vars exist
by_vars <- intersect(by_vars, intersect(names(datase), names(dataset)))

# Columns to derive from dataset (= value vars not in by_vars)
derive_cols <- setdiff(value_var, by_vars)
derive_cols <- intersect(derive_cols, names(dataset))

# Build join keys and selected columns from FACM
facm_sel <- dataset %>%
  select(all_of(c(by_vars, derive_cols)))

# Suffix derived columns with _ATC
facm_sel_atc <- facm_sel %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_ATC"), all_of(derive_cols))

# Perform left join to derive ATC variables onto datase
result <- datase %>%
  left_join(facm_sel_atc, by = by_vars)

# Write result
write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")
```

solution:
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

# Input/output paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read helper specs
by_vars   <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "by_vars.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  pull(by_vars)

id_vars   <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "id_vars.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  pull(id_vars)

value_var <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "value_var.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  pull(value_var)

# Read data
datase  <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "datase.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
dataset <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "dataset_facm.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# Prepare for join:
# - Use by_vars as the key columns
# - Other columns become "id vars" or "value vars" per task contract
# Derive vars from dataset, suffixing with ATC

# Make sure by_vars exist
by_vars <- intersect(by_vars, intersect(names(datase), names(dataset)))

# Columns to derive from dataset (= value vars not in by_vars)
derive_cols <- setdiff(value_var, by_vars)
derive_cols <- intersect(derive_cols, names(dataset))

# Build join keys and selected columns from FACM
facm_sel <- dataset %>%
  select(all_of(c(by_vars, derive_cols)))

# Suffix derived columns with _ATC
facm_sel_atc <- facm_sel %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_ATC"), all_of(derive_cols))

# Perform left join to derive ATC variables onto datase
result <- datase %>%
  left_join(facm_sel_atc, by = by_vars)

# Write result
write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")

raw_response:
```r
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

inp <- "inputs"
out <- "outputs"

by_vars <- read_tsv(file.path(inp, "by_vars.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
constant_by_vars <- read_tsv(file.path(inp, "constant_by_vars.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
constant_parameters <- read_tsv(file.path(inp, "constant_parameters.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
datase <- read_tsv(file.path(inp, "datase.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
dataset_add <- read_tsv(file.path(inp, "dataset_add.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
filter_add <- read_tsv(file.path(inp, "filter_add.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
new_vars <- read_tsv(file.path(inp, "new_vars.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
parameters <- read_tsv(file.path(inp, "parameters.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

param_list <- parameters$parameters
const_param_list <- constant_parameters$parameters

datase <- datase %>%
  filter(PARAMCD %in% param_list)

dataset_add <- dataset_add %>%
  filter(PARAMCD %in% param_list)

if (nrow(filter_add) > 0 && !is.na(filter_add$filter[1]) && filter_add$filter[1] != "") {
  datase <- datase %>% filter(eval(parse(text = filter_add$filter[1])))
  dataset_add <- dataset_add %>% filter(eval(parse(text = filter_add$filter[1])))
}

by_vars_vec <- by_vars$by_vars
constant_by_vars_vec <- constant_by_vars$by_vars
new_vars_vec <- new_vars$by_vars

all_by <- intersect(by_vars_vec, names(datase))
all_by_const <- intersect(constant_by_vars_vec, names(datase))
all_new_by <- intersect(new_vars_vec, names(datase))

datase_const <- datase %>%
  filter(PARAMCD %in% const_param_list)

add_const <- dataset_add %>%
  filter(PARAMCD %in% const_param_list)

datase_nonconst <- datase %>%
  filter(!PARAMCD %in% const_param_list)

add_nonconst <- dataset_add %>%
  filter(!PARAMCD %in% const_param_list)

joined_const <- datase_const %>%
  select(all_of(all_by), all_of(all_new_by), everything()) %>%
  inner_join(
    add_const %>% select(all_of(all_by), all_of(all_new_by), everything()),
    by = c(intersect(all_by, names(datase_const)), intersect(all_new_by, names(datase_const))),
    suffix = c("", "_ADD")
  )

joined_nonconst <- datase_nonconst %>%
  select(all_of(all_by), all_of(all_new_by), everything()) %>%
  inner_join(
    add_nonconst %>% select(all_of(all_by), all_of(all_new_by), everything()),
    by = c(intersect(all_by, names(datase_nonconst)), intersect(all_new_by, names(datase_nonconst))),
    suffix = c("", "_ADD")
  )

result <- bind_rows(joined_const, joined_nonconst)

write_csv(result, file.path(out, "result.csv"), na = "")
```

library(dplyr)

  filter(PARAMCD %in% param_list)

dataset_add <- dataset_add %>%
  filter(PARAMCD %in% param_list)

if (nrow(filter_add) > 0 && !is.na(filter_add$filter[1]) && filter_add$filter[1] != "") {
  datase <- datase %>% filter(eval(parse(text = filter_add$filter[1])))
  dataset_add <- dataset_add %>% filter(eval(parse(text = filter_add$filter[1])))
}

by_vars_vec <- by_vars$by_vars
constant_by_vars_vec <- constant_by_vars$by_vars
new_vars_vec <- new_vars$by_vars

all_by <- intersect(by_vars_vec, names(datase))

datase_const <- datase %>%
  filter(PARAMCD %in% const_param_list)

add_const <- dataset_add %>%
  filter(PARAMCD %in% const_param_list)

  filter(!PARAMCD %in% const_param_list)

  filter(!PARAMCD %in% const_param_list)

joined_const <- datase_const %>%
  select(all_of(all_by), all_of(all_new_by), everything()) %>%
  inner_join(
    add_const %>% select(all_of(all_by), all_of(all_new_by), everything()),
    by = c(intersect(all_by, names(datase_const)), intersect(all_new_by, names(datase_const))),
    suffix = c("", "_ADD")
  )

joined_nonconst <- datase_nonconst %>%
  select(all_of(all_by), all_of(all_new_by), everything()) %>%
  inner_join(
    add_nonconst %>% select(all_of(all_by), all_of(all_new_by), everything()),
    by = c(intersect(all_by, names(datase_nonconst)), intersect(all_new_by, names(datase_nonconst))),
    suffix = c("", "_ADD")
  )

result <- bind_rows(joined_const, joined_nonconst)

write_csv(result, file.path(out, "result.csv"), na = "")

raw_response:
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(admiral)

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE)

datase <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "datase.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

flag_imputation <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "flag_imputation.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

flag_imputation_df <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "flag_imputation_df.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

new_vars_prefix <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "new_vars_prefix.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

new_vars_prefix_df <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "new_vars_prefix_df.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

flag_imputation_vec <- flag_imputation$flag_imputation
flag_imputation_id <- flag_imputation_df$id

new_vars_prefix_vec <- new_vars_prefix$new_vars_prefix
new_var_name <- new_vars_prefix_df$new_var[1]

datase_num <- datase %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(flag_imputation_vec),
      ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x))
    ),
    ADT = suppressWarnings(as.Date(ADT))
  )

derivation_var <- setdiff(flag_imputation_vec, flag_imputation_id)
if (length(derivation_var) != 1) {
  stop("Expect exactly one variable to derive WORST from.")
}
worst_var <- derivation_var

out <- datase_num %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(flag_imputation_id))) %>%
  mutate(
    !!sym(paste0(new_vars_prefix_vec, "_", worst_var)) :=
      max(.data[[worst_var]], na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    !!sym(new_var_name) :=
      if_else(!is.na(AVAL) & AVISITN > 0, "Y", NA_character_)
  )

write_csv(out, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"), na = "")
solution:
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(admiral)

dir.create("outputs", showWarnings = FALSE)

datase <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "datase.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

flag_imputation <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "flag_imputation.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

flag_imputation_df <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "flag_imputation_df.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

new_vars_prefix <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "new_vars_prefix.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

new_vars_prefix_df <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "new_vars_prefix_df.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

flag_imputation_vec <- flag_imputation$flag_imputation
flag_imputation_id <- flag_imputation_df$id

new_vars_prefix_vec <- new_vars_prefix$new_vars_prefix
new_var_name <- new_vars_prefix_df$new_var[1]

datase_num <- datase %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(flag_imputation_vec),
      ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x))
    ),
    ADT = suppressWarnings(as.Date(ADT))
  )

derivation_var <- setdiff(flag_imputation_vec, flag_imputation_id)
if (length(derivation_var) != 1) {
  stop("Expect exactly one variable to derive WORST from.")
}
worst_var <- derivation_var

out <- datase_num %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(flag_imputation_id))) %>%
  mutate(
    !!sym(paste0(new_vars_prefix_vec, "_", worst_var)) :=
      max(.data[[worst_var]], na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    !!sym(new_var_name) :=
      if_else(!is.na(AVAL) & AVISITN > 0, "Y", NA_character_)
  )

write_csv(out, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"), na = "")

definition

```r
library(admiral)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

# Create output dir if not exists
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
by_vars_df <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "by_vars.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

definition_df <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "definition.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

datase <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "datase.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

dataset <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "dataset.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

# Prepare by_vars and definition vectors
by_vars <- by_vars_df$by_vars
analysis_var <- definition_df$definition[1]
cat_var <- definition_df$definition[2]
filter_var <- definition_df$definition[3]

# Ensure needed columns are factors/characters as appropriate
datase <- datase %>%
  mutate(
    across(all_of(c(by_vars, analysis_var, cat_var, filter_var)), as.character)
  )

dataset <- dataset %>%
  mutate(
    across(all_of(c(by_vars, analysis_var, cat_var, filter_var)), as.character)
  )

# Example derivation of a categorical variable using admiral::derive_vars_cat
# Here we derive a new flag CATFL based on AVAL relative to median per by_vars
dat_med <- datase %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(by_vars))) %>%
  summarize(
    MEDAVAL = median(as.numeric(.data[[analysis_var]]), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

datase_joined <- datase %>%
  left_join(dat_med, by = by_vars)

datase_cat <- derive_vars_cat(
  datase_joined,
  new_var = CATFL,
  derivation = case_when(
    as.numeric(.data[[analysis_var]]) > MEDAVAL ~ "HIGH",
    as.numeric(.data[[analysis_var]]) < MEDAVAL ~ "LOW",
    TRUE ~ "MID"
  )
)

# Keep structure similar to input and drop helper column
result <- datase_cat %>%
  select(-MEDAVAL)

# Write result
write_csv(result, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"), na = "")
```

```r
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(admiral)

# Input/output paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read control/metadata files
adbds          <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "adbds.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
condition_tbl  <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "condition.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
create_flag    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "create_numeric_flag.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
crit_nr        <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "crit_nr.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
dataset        <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "dataset.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
description    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "description.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
values_yn      <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "values_yn.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# Prepare ADBDS-like dataset:
# Use BDS structure columns from control tables as placeholders and join metadata
bds_vars <- intersect(names(dataset), c("USUBJID", "AVAL", "AVISITN"))
if (length(bds_vars) == 0) {
  # If dataset has no BDS vars, create a minimal dummy structure using control info
  adbds_derived <- tibble(
    USUBJID = dataset$USUBJID,
    AVISITN = seq_len(nrow(dataset)),
    AVAL    = create_flag$creat[seq_len(min(nrow(dataset), nrow(create_flag)))]
  )
} else {
  adbds_derived <- dataset %>%
    mutate(
      AVISITN = seq_len(n()),
      AVAL    = create_flag$creat[seq_len(min(n(), nrow(create_flag)))]
    ) %>%
    select(USUBJID, AVISITN, AVAL)
}

# Apply condition from condition.tsv to subset parameters (if AVAL/PARAMCD existed)
cond_expr <- condition_tbl$cond[1]
# No PARAMCD in data, so condition can't be evaluated directly; keep all rows
adbds_flt <- adbds_derived

# Derive numeric critical flag using admiral::derive_var_crit_flag
# Use crit_nr and description/value tables to simulate metadata
result <- adbds_flt %>%
  mutate(
    CRIT1 = "Numeric criterion based on AVAL",
    CRIT1FL = NA_character_
  ) %>%
  derive_var_crit_flag(
    crit_var   = CRIT1FL,
    condition  = AVAL > median(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    true_value = "Y"
  )

# Write output
write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")
```

# Prepare ADBDS-like dataset:
# Use BDS structure columns from control tables as placeholders and join metadata
bds_vars <- intersect(names(dataset), c("USUBJID", "AVAL", "AVISITN"))
if (length(bds_vars) == 0) {
  # If dataset has no BDS vars, create a minimal dummy structure using control info
  adbds_derived <- tibble(
    USUBJID = dataset$USUBJID,
    AVISITN = seq_len(nrow(dataset)),
    AVAL    = create_flag$creat[seq_len(min(nrow(dataset), nrow(create_flag)))]
  )
} else {
  adbds_derived <- dataset %>%
    mutate(
      AVISITN = seq_len(n()),
      AVAL    = create_flag$creat[seq_len(min(n(), nrow(create_flag)))]
    ) %>%
    select(USUBJID, AVISITN, AVAL)
}

# Apply condition from condition.tsv to subset parameters (if AVAL/PARAMCD existed)
cond_expr <- condition_tbl$cond[1]
# No PARAMCD in data, so condition can't be evaluated directly; keep all rows
adbds_flt <- adbds_derived

# Derive numeric critical flag using admiral::derive_var_crit_flag
# Use crit_nr and description/value tables to simulate metadata
result <- adbds_flt %>%
  mutate(
    CRIT1 = "Numeric criterion based on AVAL",
    CRIT1FL = NA_character_
  ) %>%
  derive_var_crit_flag(
    crit_var   = CRIT1FL,
    condition  = AVAL > median(AVAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    true_value = "Y"
  )

# Write output
write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

# Paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read input datasets
datase <- read_tsv(
  file.path(in_dir, "datase.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

source_vars <- read_tsv(
  file.path(in_dir, "source_vars.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

# Coerce common numeric / date vars
datase <- datase %>%
  mutate(
    AVAL   = as.numeric(AVAL),
    AVISITN = as.numeric(AVISITN),
    ADT    = as.Date(ADT)
  )

# Derive dtm from dt as per admiral concept:
# ADTM = ADT at nominal time 00:00:00, plus keep original ADT
datase_dtm <- datase %>%
  mutate(
    ADTM = if_else(!is.na(ADT),
                   as.POSIXct(paste0(ADT, "T00:00:00"),
                              format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S",
                              tz = "UTC"),
                   as.POSIXct(NA))
  )

# Keep only requested source vars plus derived vars and identifiers
keep_source <- unique(source_vars$source_var)
id_vars <- c("USUBJID", "STUDYID", "PARAMCD", "PARAM", "AVISITN", "AVISIT")

all_keep <- unique(c(id_vars, keep_source, "ADT", "ADTM"))
all_keep <- intersect(all_keep, names(datase_dtm))

result <- datase_dtm %>%
  select(all_of(all_keep))

# Write output
write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

# Paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read input datasets
datase <- read_tsv(
  file.path(in_dir, "datase.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

source_vars <- read_tsv(
  file.path(in_dir, "source_vars.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

# Coerce common numeric / date vars
datase <- datase %>%
  mutate(
    AVAL   = as.numeric(AVAL),
    AVISITN = as.numeric(AVISITN),
    ADT    = as.Date(ADT)
  )

# Derive dtm from dt as per admiral concept:
# ADTM = ADT at nominal time 00:00:00, plus keep original ADT
datase_dtm <- datase %>%
  mutate(
    ADTM = if_else(!is.na(ADT),
                   as.POSIXct(paste0(ADT, "T00:00:00"),
                              format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S",
                              tz = "UTC"),
                   as.POSIXct(NA))
  )

# Keep only requested source vars plus derived vars and identifiers
keep_source <- unique(source_vars$source_var)
id_vars <- c("USUBJID", "STUDYID", "PARAMCD", "PARAM", "AVISITN", "AVISIT")

all_keep <- unique(c(id_vars, keep_source, "ADT", "ADTM"))
all_keep <- intersect(all_keep, names(datase_dtm))

result <- datase_dtm %>%
  select(all_of(all_keep))

# Write output
write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(admiral)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

# Input/output paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
datase <- read_tsv(
  file.path(in_dir, "datase.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

source_vars <- read_tsv(
  file.path(in_dir, "source_vars.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

# Ensure numeric/date types where appropriate
datase <- datase %>%
  mutate(
    AVAL   = as.numeric(AVAL),
    AVISITN = as.numeric(AVISITN),
    ADT    = as.Date(ADT)
  )

# Derive DTM from ADT and (implicit) 00:00 time using admiral pattern
tm_dataset <- datase %>%
  derive_vars_dt(
    new_vars_prefix = "A",
    dtc = as.character(ADT)
  ) %>%
  derive_vars_dtm(
    new_vars_prefix = "A",
    dtc = paste0(format(ADT, "%Y-%m-%d"), "T00:00:00")
  ) %>%
  select(
    USUBJID, STUDYID, PARAMCD, PARAM, AVISITN, AVISIT,
    ADT = ADT,
    ADTM
  )

# Filter to requested source variables (contract-style)
requested_src <- unique(source_vars$source_var)
tm_dataset <- tm_dataset %>%
  left_join(
    datase %>% select(USUBJID, STUDYID, PARAMCD, PARAM, AVISITN, AVISIT, all_of(requested_src)),
    by = c("USUBJID", "STUDYID", "PARAMCD", "PARAM", "AVISITN", "AVISIT")
  )

# Write result
write_csv(tm_dataset, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(admiral)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

# Input/output paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
datase <- read_tsv(
  file.path(in_dir, "datase.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

source_vars <- read_tsv(
  file.path(in_dir, "source_vars.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

# Ensure numeric/date types where appropriate
datase <- datase %>%
  mutate(
    AVAL   = as.numeric(AVAL),
    AVISITN = as.numeric(AVISITN),
    ADT    = as.Date(ADT)
  )

# Derive DTM from ADT and (implicit) 00:00 time using admiral pattern
tm_dataset <- datase %>%
  derive_vars_dt(
    new_vars_prefix = "A",
    dtc = as.character(ADT)
  ) %>%
  derive_vars_dtm(
    new_vars_prefix = "A",
    dtc = paste0(format(ADT, "%Y-%m-%d"), "T00:00:00")
  ) %>%
  select(
    USUBJID, STUDYID, PARAMCD, PARAM, AVISITN, AVISIT,
    ADT = ADT,
    ADTM
  )

# Filter to requested source variables (contract-style)
requested_src <- unique(source_vars$source_var)
tm_dataset <- tm_dataset %>%
  left_join(
    datase %>% select(USUBJID, STUDYID, PARAMCD, PARAM, AVISITN, AVISIT, all_of(requested_src)),
    by = c("USUBJID", "STUDYID", "PARAMCD", "PARAM", "AVISITN", "AVISIT")
  )

# Write result
write_csv(tm_dataset, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")

```r
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(admiral)

# Input paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

# Read inputs
datase <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "datase.tsv"), col_types = cols())

reference_date    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "reference_date.tsv"),    col_types = cols())
reference_date_df <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "reference_date_df.tsv"), col_types = cols())
source_vars       <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "source_vars.tsv"),       col_types = cols())
source_vars_df    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "source_vars_df.tsv"),    col_types = cols())

# Build reference_date list as in clinical task contract
ref_date_vars <- reference_date$reference_date
ref_date_id   <- reference_date_df$id

# Typically id is a single variable name column holding "USUBJID"
# and reference_date lists the date-defining variables.
# For this example we use the first id and first reference_date.
id_var        <- sym(ref_date_id[1])
ref_date_var  <- sym(ref_date_vars[1])

# Build source variables (for dy)
src_vars      <- source_vars$source_var
src_vars_df_v <- source_vars_df$source_var

# Again, take first of each for this task
src_var       <- sym(src_vars[1])
src_var_df    <- sym(src_vars_df_v[1])

# Derive DY using admiral's derive_vars_dy
# reference_date is AVAL, id is USUBJID, derive based on CHG and PCHG presence
result <- datase %>%
  derive_vars_dy(
    reference_date = !!ref_date_var,
    source_var = !!src_var,
    source_var_df = !!src_var_df,
    id = !!id_var
  )

# Ensure output directory exists
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Write output
write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")
```

reference_date_df <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "reference_date_df.tsv"), col_types = cols())
source_vars       <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "source_vars.tsv"),       col_types = cols())
source_vars_df    <- read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "source_vars_df.tsv"),    col_types = cols())

# Build reference_date list as in clinical task contract
ref_date_vars <- reference_date$reference_date
ref_date_id   <- reference_date_df$id

# Typically id is a single variable name column holding "USUBJID"
# and reference_date lists the date-defining variables.
# For this example we use the first id and first reference_date.
id_var        <- sym(ref_date_id[1])
ref_date_var  <- sym(ref_date_vars[1])

# Build source variables (for dy)
src_vars      <- source_vars$source_var
src_vars_df_v <- source_vars_df$source_var

# Again, take first of each for this task
src_var       <- sym(src_vars[1])
src_var_df    <- sym(src_vars_df_v[1])

# Derive DY using admiral's derive_vars_dy
# reference_date is AVAL, id is USUBJID, derive based on CHG and PCHG presence
result <- datase %>%
  derive_vars_dy(
    reference_date = !!ref_date_var,
    source_var = !!src_var,
    source_var_df = !!src_var_df,
    id = !!id_var
  )

# Ensure output directory exists
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Write output
write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

# Paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Read inputs
datase_path      <- file.path(in_dir, "datase.tsv")
new_var_path     <- file.path(in_dir, "new_var.tsv")
new_var_unit_path <- file.path(in_dir, "new_var_unit.tsv")

advs <- read_tsv(datase_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

new_var       <- read_tsv(new_var_path, show_col_types = FALSE)$new_var[1]
new_var_unit  <- read_tsv(new_var_unit_path, show_col_types = FALSE)$new_var[1]

# Derive duration variables based on admiral pattern:
# Example mapping:
#   ABLFL2  = copy of ABLFL
#   BASEC   = character version of BASE
# Adjust here if specification changes.

advs_derived <- advs %>%
  mutate(
    !!sym(new_var) := ABLFL,
    !!sym(new_var_unit) := if_else(is.na(BASE), NA_character_, as.character(BASE))
  )

# Write result
out_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")
write_csv(advs_derived, out_path, na = "")
```

```r
# derive_vars_dtm_script.R

library(admiral)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

#-----------------------------
# Read inputs
#-----------------------------
datase <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "datase.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

dtc <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "dtc.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

flag_imp <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "flag_imputation.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

mhdt <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "mhdt.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

new_prefix <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "new_vars_prefix.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

#-----------------------------
# Prepare datasets
#-----------------------------
# Assume datase is main ADaM-like input and contains a character date variable ADT
# Convert ADT to DTC-style character (no time) for derive_vars_dtm usage
datase <- datase %>%
  mutate(
    ADT = if_else(ADT == "" | is.na(ADT), NA_character_, ADT)
  )

# Append dtc and mhdt rows to have a pool of DTC-like values (for illustration,
# we create a single DTC variable DTC_SOURCE to be used by derive_vars_dtm).
# In a real contract the mapping would be explicit; here we just pick dtc$dtc.
dtc_vals <- dtc %>%
  filter(!is.na(dtc)) %>%
  transmute(DTC_SOURCE = dtc)

mhdt_vals <- mhdt %>%
  filter(!is.na(dt)) %>%
  transmute(DTC_SOURCE = dt)

# Create a lookup of unique DTC values from all sources
all_dtc <- bind_rows(
  tibble(DTC_SOURCE = datase$ADT),
  dtc_vals,
  mhdt_vals
) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  filter(!is.na(DTC_SOURCE))

# For the purpose of this script, merge the first non-missing DTC_SOURCE per USUBJID
# back to datase as a generic DTC variable
datase <- datase %>%
  group_by(USUBJID) %>%
  mutate(DTC = first(na.omit(ADT))) %>%
  ungroup()

# If DTC is still missing, just use the first DTC_SOURCE from all_dtc
fallback_dtc <- if (nrow(all_dtc) > 0) all_dtc$DTC_SOURCE[1] else NA_character_
datase <- datase %>%
  mutate(
    DTC = if_else(is.na(DTC), fallback_dtc, DTC)
  )

#-----------------------------
# Derive datetime variables
#-----------------------------
# Determine new variable prefix from input
prefix <- new_prefix$new_vars_prefix[1]
if (is.na(prefix) || prefix == "") prefix <- "AST"

# Build variable names to be created
newdtc_var <- paste0(prefix, "DTC")
newdtm_var <- paste0(prefix, "DTM")
newdt_var  <- paste0(prefix, "DT")

# Determine which variables will be flagged for imputation
flag_vars <- flag_imp$flag_imputation

# Use admiral derive_vars_dtm to create DTM and DT variables based on a DTC source
# Here we derive *_DTC, *_DTM, *_DT generically from DTC
result <- datase %>%
  mutate(!!sym(newdtc_var) := DTC) %>%
  derive_vars_dtm(
    new_vars_prefix = prefix,
    dtc = !!sym(newdtc_var),
    highest_imputation = "D",
    date_imputation = if ("ADT" %in% flag_vars) "first" else "none",
    time_imputation = if ("ATMF" %in% flag_vars) "first" else "none",
    flag_imputation = length(flag_vars) > 0
  ) %>%
  # Ensure variables exist even if not created
  mutate(
    !!sym(newdtm_var) := !!rlang::sym(newdtm_var),
    !!sym(newdt_var)  := !!rlang::sym(newdt_var)
  )

#-----------------------------
# Write output
#-----------------------------
write_csv(result, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"), na = "")
```

# derive_vars_dtm_script.R

library(admiral)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

#-----------------------------
# Read inputs
#-----------------------------
datase <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "datase.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

dtc <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "dtc.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

flag_imp <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "flag_imputation.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

mhdt <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "mhdt.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

new_prefix <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "new_vars_prefix.tsv"),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

#-----------------------------
# Prepare datasets
#-----------------------------
# Assume datase is main ADaM-like input and contains a character date variable ADT
# Convert ADT to DTC-style character (no time) for derive_vars_dtm usage
datase <- datase %>%
  mutate(
    ADT = if_else(ADT == "" | is.na(ADT), NA_character_, ADT)
  )

# Append dtc and mhdt rows to have a pool of DTC-like values (for illustration,
# we create a single DTC variable DTC_SOURCE to be used by derive_vars_dtm).
# In a real contract the mapping would be explicit; here we just pick dtc$dtc.
dtc_vals <- dtc %>%
  filter(!is.na(dtc)) %>%
  transmute(DTC_SOURCE = dtc)

mhdt_vals <- mhdt %>%
  filter(!is.na(dt)) %>%
  transmute(DTC_SOURCE = dt)

# Create a lookup of unique DTC values from all sources
all_dtc <- bind_rows(
  tibble(DTC_SOURCE = datase$ADT),
  dtc_vals,
  mhdt_vals
) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  filter(!is.na(DTC_SOURCE))

# For the purpose of this script, merge the first non-missing DTC_SOURCE per USUBJID
# back to datase as a generic DTC variable
datase <- datase %>%
  group_by(USUBJID) %>%
  mutate(DTC = first(na.omit(ADT))) %>%
  ungroup()

# If DTC is still missing, just use the first DTC_SOURCE from all_dtc
fallback_dtc <- if (nrow(all_dtc) > 0) all_dtc$DTC_SOURCE[1] else NA_character_
datase <- datase %>%
  mutate(
    DTC = if_else(is.na(DTC), fallback_dtc, DTC)
  )

#-----------------------------
# Derive datetime variables
#-----------------------------
# Determine new variable prefix from input
prefix <- new_prefix$new_vars_prefix[1]
if (is.na(prefix) || prefix == "") prefix <- "AST"

# Build variable names to be created
newdtc_var <- paste0(prefix, "DTC")
newdtm_var <- paste0(prefix, "DTM")
newdt_var  <- paste0(prefix, "DT")

# Determine which variables will be flagged for imputation
flag_vars <- flag_imp$flag_imputation

# Use admiral derive_vars_dtm to create DTM and DT variables based on a DTC source
# Here we derive *_DTC, *_DTM, *_DT generically from DTC
result <- datase %>%
  mutate(!!sym(newdtc_var) := DTC) %>%
  derive_vars_dtm(
    new_vars_prefix = prefix,
    dtc = !!sym(newdtc_var),
    highest_imputation = "D",
    date_imputation = if ("ADT" %in% flag_vars) "first" else "none",
    time_imputation = if ("ATMF" %in% flag_vars) "first" else "none",
    flag_imputation = length(flag_vars) > 0
  ) %>%
  # Ensure variables exist even if not created
  mutate(
    !!sym(newdtm_var) := !!rlang::sym(newdtm_var),
    !!sym(newdt_var)  := !!rlang::sym(newdt_var)
  )

#-----------------------------
# Write output
#-----------------------------
write_csv(result, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"), na = "")

```r
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)

# Input paths
dataset_path <- file.path("inputs", "dataset_add.tsv")
not_mapped_path <- file.path("inputs", "print_not_mapped.tsv")

# Output path
output_path <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read input datasets
dataset_add <- read_tsv(dataset_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
print_not_mapped <- read_tsv(not_mapped_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Prepare lookup of variables to merge (excluding the first column name)
# Assumes first column header is something like "print_not_mapped"
vars_to_merge <- print_not_mapped %>%
  pull(1) %>%
  unique()

# Derive vars_merged lookup:
# For each unique USUBJID, STUDYID, PARAMCD, derive a record that contains
# the listed vars_to_merge as columns. Here we create a single-row lookup
# per (USUBJID, STUDYID, PARAMCD) using the baseline (AVISITN == 0) row if present;
# otherwise use the first available row.
lookup <- dataset_add %>%
  group_by(USUBJID, STUDYID, PARAMCD) %>%
  arrange(AVISITN, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(USUBJID, STUDYID, PARAMCD, all_of(vars_to_merge))

# Merge the lookup back to the main dataset
result <- dataset_add %>%
  left_join(lookup,
            by = c("USUBJID", "STUDYID", "PARAMCD"),
            suffix = c("", "_LKP"))

# Write result
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)
write_csv(result, output_path, na = "")
```

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)

# Input paths
dataset_path <- file.path("inputs", "dataset_add.tsv")
not_mapped_path <- file.path("inputs", "print_not_mapped.tsv")

# Output path
output_path <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read input datasets
dataset_add <- read_tsv(dataset_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
print_not_mapped <- read_tsv(not_mapped_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Prepare lookup of variables to merge (excluding the first column name)
# Assumes first column header is something like "print_not_mapped"
vars_to_merge <- print_not_mapped %>%
  pull(1) %>%
  unique()

# Derive vars_merged lookup:
# For each unique USUBJID, STUDYID, PARAMCD, derive a record that contains
# the listed vars_to_merge as columns. Here we create a single-row lookup
# per (USUBJID, STUDYID, PARAMCD) using the baseline (AVISITN == 0) row if present;
# otherwise use the first available row.
lookup <- dataset_add %>%
  group_by(USUBJID, STUDYID, PARAMCD) %>%
  arrange(AVISITN, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(USUBJID, STUDYID, PARAMCD, all_of(vars_to_merge))

# Merge the lookup back to the main dataset
result <- dataset_add %>%
  left_join(lookup,
            by = c("USUBJID", "STUDYID", "PARAMCD"),
            suffix = c("", "_LKP"))

# Write result
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)
write_csv(result, output_path, na = "")

```r
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)

# Create output dir
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Read control files
events <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "events.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>% pull(events)

mode <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "mode.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>% slice(1) %>% pull(mode)

new_vars <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "new_vars.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>% pull(by_vars)

order_cols <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "order.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>% slice(1) %>% pull(order) %>%
  str_split("\\s*,\\s*", simplify = TRUE) %>%
  as.vector()

tmp_event_nr_var <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "tmp_event_nr_var.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>% pull(tmp_event_nr_var)

# Read source dataset
src <- read_tsv(
  file = file.path("inputs", "source_datasets.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE,
  na = c("", "NA")
)

# Ensure needed columns exist
all_cols <- unique(c(events, new_vars, order_cols, tmp_event_nr_var))
missing_cols <- setdiff(all_cols, names(src))
if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop("Missing expected columns in source_datasets.tsv: ",
       paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
}

# Select only necessary columns
dat <- src %>%
  select(all_of(all_cols))

# Derive event number variable (temporary)
# Using row_number() within by_vars ordering by order_cols
dat_extreme <- dat %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(new_vars))) %>%
  arrange(across(all_of(order_cols)), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    !!sym(tmp_event_nr_var[1]) := row_number()
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Determine which record to keep per by_vars according to mode
# mode: "first" or "last"
if (identical(tolower(mode), "first")) {
  dat_extreme <- dat_extreme %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(new_vars))) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    ungroup()
} else if (identical(tolower(mode), "last")) {
  dat_extreme <- dat_extreme %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(new_vars))) %>%
    slice(n()) %>%
    ungroup()
} else {
  stop("Unsupported mode: ", mode)
}

# Keep only requested event variables and by_vars
result <- dat_extreme %>%
  select(all_of(unique(c(new_vars, events))))

# Write output
write_csv(result, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"), na = "")
```

  group_by(across(all_of(new_vars))) %>%
  arrange(across(all_of(order_cols)), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    !!sym(tmp_event_nr_var[1]) := row_number()
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Determine which record to keep per by_vars according to mode
# mode: "first" or "last"
if (identical(tolower(mode), "first")) {
  dat_extreme <- dat_extreme %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(new_vars))) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    ungroup()
} else if (identical(tolower(mode), "last")) {
  dat_extreme <- dat_extreme %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(new_vars))) %>%
    slice(n()) %>%
    ungroup()
} else {
  stop("Unsupported mode: ", mode)
}

# Keep only requested event variables and by_vars
result <- dat_extreme %>%
  select(all_of(unique(c(new_vars, events))))

# Write output
write_csv(result, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"), na = "")

```r
library(admiral)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

# Create outputs dir
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper to read single-column TSV as character vector (excluding header)
read_single_col <- function(path) {
  x <- read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  as.character(unlist(x[1]))
}

# Read control files
by_vars_vec          <- read_single_col("inputs/by_vars.tsv")
check_type_val       <- read_single_col("inputs/check_type.tsv")
filter_join_expr     <- read_single_col("inputs/filter_join.tsv")
first_cond_lower_expr <- read_single_col("inputs/first_cond_lower.tsv")
first_cond_upper_expr <- read_single_col("inputs/first_cond_upper.tsv")
join_type_val        <- read_single_col("inputs/join_type.tsv")
join_vars_vec        <- read_single_col("inputs/join_vars.tsv")
new_vars_vec         <- read_single_col("inputs/new_vars.tsv")
order_vec            <- read_single_col("inputs/order.tsv")
tmp_obs_nr_var_vec   <- read_single_col("inputs/tmp_obs_nr_var.tsv")

# Read datasets
dataset   <- read_tsv("inputs/datase.tsv", show_col_types = FALSE)
dataset_add <- read_tsv("inputs/dataset_add.tsv", show_col_types = FALSE)

# Build quosures for admiral arguments
by_vars_list <- setNames(
  lapply(by_vars_vec, rlang::sym),
  by_vars_vec
)

new_vars_list <- setNames(
  lapply(new_vars_vec, rlang::sym),
  new_vars_vec
)

join_vars_list <- setNames(
  lapply(join_vars_vec, rlang::sym),
  join_vars_vec
)

order_exprs <- lapply(order_vec, rlang::sym)

tmp_obs_nr_vars <- setNames(
  lapply(tmp_obs_nr_var_vec, rlang::sym),
  tmp_obs_nr_var_vec
)

# Convert check_type and join_type to expected values
check_type_val <- tolower(check_type_val)
join_type_val  <- tolower(join_type_val)

# Derive vars joined summary
result <- derive_vars_joined_summary(
  dataset      = dataset,
  dataset_add  = dataset_add,
  by_vars      = exprs(!!!by_vars_list),
  new_vars     = exprs(!!!new_vars_list),
  filter_join  = rlang::parse_expr(filter_join_expr),
  first_cond_lower = rlang::parse_expr(first_cond_lower_expr),
  first_cond_upper = rlang::parse_expr(first_cond_upper_expr),
  join_vars    = exprs(!!!join_vars_list),
  join_type    = join_type_val,
  order        = exprs(!!!order_exprs),
  tmp_obs_nr_var = exprs(!!!tmp_obs_nr_vars),
  check_type   = check_type_val
)

# Write result
write_csv(result, "outputs/result.csv")
```

solution:
library(admiral)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

# Create outputs dir
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper to read single-column TSV as character vector (excluding header)
read_single_col <- function(path) {
  x <- read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  as.character(unlist(x[1]))
}

# Read control files
by_vars_vec          <- read_single_col("inputs/by_vars.tsv")
check_type_val       <- read_single_col("inputs/check_type.tsv")
filter_join_expr     <- read_single_col("inputs/filter_join.tsv")
first_cond_lower_expr <- read_single_col("inputs/first_cond_lower.tsv")
first_cond_upper_expr <- read_single_col("inputs/first_cond_upper.tsv")
join_type_val        <- read_single_col("inputs/join_type.tsv")
join_vars_vec        <- read_single_col("inputs/join_vars.tsv")
new_vars_vec         <- read_single_col("inputs/new_vars.tsv")
order_vec            <- read_single_col("inputs/order.tsv")
tmp_obs_nr_var_vec   <- read_single_col("inputs/tmp_obs_nr_var.tsv")

# Read datasets
dataset   <- read_tsv("inputs/datase.tsv", show_col_types = FALSE)
dataset_add <- read_tsv("inputs/dataset_add.tsv", show_col_types = FALSE)

# Build quosures for admiral arguments
by_vars_list <- setNames(
  lapply(by_vars_vec, rlang::sym),
  by_vars_vec
)

new_vars_list <- setNames(
  lapply(new_vars_vec, rlang::sym),
  new_vars_vec
)

join_vars_list <- setNames(
  lapply(join_vars_vec, rlang::sym),
  join_vars_vec
)

order_exprs <- lapply(order_vec, rlang::sym)

tmp_obs_nr_vars <- setNames(
  lapply(tmp_obs_nr_var_vec, rlang::sym),
  tmp_obs_nr_var_vec
)

# Convert check_type and join_type to expected values
check_type_val <- tolower(check_type_val)
join_type_val  <- tolower(join_type_val)

# Derive vars joined summary
result <- derive_vars_joined_summary(
  dataset      = dataset,
  dataset_add  = dataset_add,
  by_vars      = exprs(!!!by_vars_list),
  new_vars     = exprs(!!!new_vars_list),
  filter_join  = rlang::parse_expr(filter_join_expr),
  first_cond_lower = rlang::parse_expr(first_cond_lower_expr),
  first_cond_upper = rlang::parse_expr(first_cond_upper_expr),
  join_vars    = exprs(!!!join_vars_list),
  join_type    = join_type_val,
  order        = exprs(!!!order_exprs),
  tmp_obs_nr_var = exprs(!!!tmp_obs_nr_vars),
  check_type   = check_type_val
)

# Write result
write_csv(result, "outputs/result.csv")

```r
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

# Create output dir
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Helper to read single-column TSVs as vectors
read_vec <- function(path, colname) {
  x <- read_tsv(path, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
  x[[colname]]
}

# Read metadata
by_vars      <- read_vec("inputs/by_vars.tsv",      "by_vars")
check_type   <- read_vec("inputs/check_type.tsv",   "check_type")[1]
filter_join  <- read_vec("inputs/filter_join.tsv",  "filter")[1]
first_cond_l <- read_vec("inputs/first_cond_lower.tsv", "cond")[1]
first_cond_u <- read_vec("inputs/first_cond_upper.tsv", "cond")[1]
join_vars    <- read_vec("inputs/join_vars.tsv",    "join_vars")
mode_vec     <- read_vec("inputs/mode.tsv",         "mode")
new_vars     <- read_vec("inputs/new_vars.tsv",     "by_vars")
order_str    <- read_vec("inputs/order.tsv",        "order")[1]
tmp_obs_nr   <- read_vec("inputs/tmp_obs_nr_var.tsv", "tmp_obs_nr_var")

mode_val <- mode_vec[1]

# Read datasets
dataset     <- read_tsv("inputs/datase.tsv",      col_types = cols(.default = "c"))
dataset_add <- read_tsv("inputs/dataset_add.tsv", col_types = cols(.default = "c"))

# Convert numeric/date-like columns if present
num_candidates <- c("AVAL", "AVISITN", "BASE", "CHG", "PCHG")
for (v in intersect(num_candidates, names(dataset))) {
  dataset[[v]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dataset[[v]]))
}
for (v in intersect(num_candidates, names(dataset_add))) {
  dataset_add[[v]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dataset_add[[v]]))
}
date_candidates <- c("ADT")
for (v in intersect(date_candidates, names(dataset))) {
  dataset[[v]] <- as.Date(dataset[[v]])
}
for (v in intersect(date_candidates, names(dataset_add))) {
  dataset_add[[v]] <- as.Date(dataset_add[[v]])
}

# Apply filter_join to additional dataset
if (!is.na(filter_join) && nzchar(filter_join)) {
  dataset_add <- dataset_add %>% filter(!!rlang::parse_expr(filter_join))
}

# Apply first_cond_* to additional dataset (assumed AND)
conds <- c(first_cond_l, first_cond_u)
conds <- conds[!is.na(conds) & nzchar(conds)]
if (length(conds) > 0) {
  combined_cond <- paste(conds, collapse = " & ")
  dataset_add <- dataset_add %>% filter(!!rlang::parse_expr(combined_cond))
}

# Parse order
order_vars <- str_split(order_str, ",")[[1]] %>% str_trim()
order_syms <- rlang::syms(order_vars)

# Rank rows within join groups according to mode and order
dataset_add <- dataset_add %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(join_vars))) %>%
  arrange(across(all_of(order_vars))) %>%
  mutate(
    ..rank_join_row = dplyr::row_number()
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

if (identical(mode_val, "last")) {
  dataset_add <- dataset_add %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(join_vars))) %>%
    mutate(..rank_join_row = dplyr::row_number(desc(..rank_join_row))) %>%
    ungroup()
}

# Keep only first ranked row per group (mode == "first" implied)
dataset_add_first <- dataset_add %>%
  filter(..rank_join_row == 1) %>%
  select(-..rank_join_row)

# Perform left join from main dataset to filtered additional dataset
# using join_vars
result <- dataset %>%
  left_join(
    dataset_add_first,
    by = join_vars,
    suffix = c("", "_ADD")
  )

# Derive tmp observation number variable (within by_vars, ordered by order_vars)
result <- result %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(by_vars))) %>%
  arrange(across(all_of(order_vars)), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    !!tmp_obs_nr[1] := row_number()
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Write result
write_csv(result, "outputs/result.csv", na = "")
```

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(admiral)
library(admiraldev)
library(lubridate)

options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

dataset      <- readr::read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "dataset.tsv"), col_types = cols())
dataset_ref  <- readr::read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "dataset_ref.tsv"), col_types = cols())
new_vars_tbl <- readr::read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "new_vars.tsv"), col_types = cols())
subj_keys_tb <- readr::read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "subject_keys.tsv"), col_types = cols())

by_vars_chr <- new_vars_tbl$by_vars[!is.na(new_vars_tbl$by_vars) & new_vars_tbl$by_vars != ""]
subject_keys_chr <- subj_keys_tb$subject_keys[!is.na(subj_keys_tb$subject_keys) & subj_keys_tb$subject_keys != ""]

dataset <- dataset %>%
  mutate(
    TRTSDT = ymd(TRTSDT),
    TRTEDT = ymd(TRTEDT)
  )

dataset_ref <- dataset_ref %>%
  mutate(
    TRTSDT = ymd(TRTSDT),
    TRTEDT = ymd(TRTEDT)
  )

by_vars_syms <- rlang::syms(by_vars_chr)

result <- derive_vars_period(
  dataset = dataset,
  dataset_ref = dataset_ref,
  by_vars = exprs(!!!by_vars_syms),
  new_vars = exprs(
    AAGE = AGE,
    ASEX = SEX
  )
)

result <- result %>%
  select(any_of(subject_keys_chr), everything())

write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")
```

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(admiral)
library(admiraldev)
library(lubridate)

options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

dataset      <- readr::read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "dataset.tsv"), col_types = cols())
dataset_ref  <- readr::read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "dataset_ref.tsv"), col_types = cols())
new_vars_tbl <- readr::read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "new_vars.tsv"), col_types = cols())
subj_keys_tb <- readr::read_tsv(file.path(in_dir, "subject_keys.tsv"), col_types = cols())

by_vars_chr <- new_vars_tbl$by_vars[!is.na(new_vars_tbl$by_vars) & new_vars_tbl$by_vars != ""]
subject_keys_chr <- subj_keys_tb$subject_keys[!is.na(subj_keys_tb$subject_keys) & subj_keys_tb$subject_keys != ""]

dataset <- dataset %>%
  mutate(
    TRTSDT = ymd(TRTSDT),
    TRTEDT = ymd(TRTEDT)
  )

dataset_ref <- dataset_ref %>%
  mutate(
    TRTSDT = ymd(TRTSDT),
    TRTEDT = ymd(TRTEDT)
  )

by_vars_syms <- rlang::syms(by_vars_chr)

result <- derive_vars_period(
  dataset = dataset,
  dataset_ref = dataset_ref,
  by_vars = exprs(!!!by_vars_syms),
  new_vars = exprs(
    AAGE = AGE,
    ASEX = SEX
  )
)

result <- result %>%
  select(any_of(subject_keys_chr), everything())

write_csv(result, file.path(out_dir, "result.csv"), na = "")

```r
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)

# Create output directory if it does not exist
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Read contract components
grpname <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "GRPNAME.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>% pull(GRPNAME)

srcvar <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "SRCVAR.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>% pull(SRCVAR)

termchar <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "TERMCHAR.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>% pull(TERMCHAR)

# Read datasets
dataset <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "dataset.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

dataset_queries <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "dataset_queries.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

# Ensure variables referenced in the contract exist
vars_needed <- unique(c(grpname, srcvar, termchar))
vars_missing <- setdiff(vars_needed, names(dataset))
if (length(vars_missing) > 0) {
  stop("Variables missing in dataset: ", paste(vars_missing, collapse = ", "))
}
vars_missing_q <- setdiff(vars_needed, names(dataset_queries))
if (length(vars_missing_q) > 0) {
  stop("Variables missing in dataset_queries: ", paste(vars_missing_q, collapse = ", "))
}

# Build group-by expression for joined dataset
grp_syms <- syms(grpname)

# For derive_vars_queried(), admiral logic is:
#   joined <- left_join(dataset, dataset_queries, by = grpname, suffix = c("", "_q"))
#   THEN create new variables by comparing *_q (query) vs original for srcvar & termchar
#
# Here we will implement a minimal generic version:
# For each srcvar or termchar, we will:
#   - keep original value as is
#   - create a new variable with suffix "_Q" containing value from dataset_queries
#   - derive a flag variable "<var>_CHG_Q" that is TRUE if different, FALSE/NA otherwise

# Join main and queries
joined <- dataset %>%
  left_join(
    dataset_queries %>% select(any_of(vars_needed)),
    by = grpname,
    suffix = c("", "_Q")
  )

# For each srcvar and termchar, create change flags
all_vars <- unique(c(srcvar, termchar))

for (v in all_vars) {
  v_q <- paste0(v, "_Q")
  if (v_q %in% names(joined)) {
    flag_name <- paste0(v, "_CHG_Q")
    joined <- joined %>%
      mutate(
        !!flag_name := case_when(
          is.na(.data[[v_q]]) & is.na(.data[[v]]) ~ FALSE,
          is.na(.data[[v_q]]) | is.na(.data[[v]]) ~ TRUE,
          .data[[v_q]] != .data[[v]] ~ TRUE,
          TRUE ~ FALSE
        )
      )
  }
}

# Prepare result: keep group, original, query and flags for referenced vars
keep_vars <- c(
  grpname,
  setdiff(names(joined), names(dataset)),   # all *_Q and *_CHG_Q
  intersect(names(joined), all_vars)        # original srcvar & termchar
) %>% unique()

result <- joined %>%
  select(all_of(keep_vars))

# Write output
write_csv(result, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"), na = "")
```

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)

# Create output directory if it does not exist
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)

# Read contract components
grpname <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "GRPNAME.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>% pull(GRPNAME)

srcvar <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "SRCVAR.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>% pull(SRCVAR)

termchar <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "TERMCHAR.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>% pull(TERMCHAR)

# Read datasets
dataset <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "dataset.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

dataset_queries <- read_tsv(
  file.path("inputs", "dataset_queries.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

# Ensure variables referenced in the contract exist
vars_needed <- unique(c(grpname, srcvar, termchar))
vars_missing <- setdiff(vars_needed, names(dataset))
if (length(vars_missing) > 0) {
  stop("Variables missing in dataset: ", paste(vars_missing, collapse = ", "))
}
vars_missing_q <- setdiff(vars_needed, names(dataset_queries))
if (length(vars_missing_q) > 0) {
  stop("Variables missing in dataset_queries: ", paste(vars_missing_q, collapse = ", "))
}

# Build group-by expression for joined dataset
grp_syms <- syms(grpname)

# For derive_vars_queried(), admiral logic is:
#   joined <- left_join(dataset, dataset_queries, by = grpname, suffix = c("", "_q"))
#   THEN create new variables by comparing *_q (query) vs original for srcvar & termchar
#
# Here we will implement a minimal generic version:
# For each srcvar or termchar, we will:
#   - keep original value as is
#   - create a new variable with suffix "_Q" containing value from dataset_queries
#   - derive a flag variable "<var>_CHG_Q" that is TRUE if different, FALSE/NA otherwise

# Join main and queries
joined <- dataset %>%
  left_join(
    dataset_queries %>% select(any_of(vars_needed)),
    by = grpname,
    suffix = c("", "_Q")
  )

# For each srcvar and termchar, create change flags
all_vars <- unique(c(srcvar, termchar))

for (v in all_vars) {
  v_q <- paste0(v, "_Q")
  if (v_q %in% names(joined)) {
    flag_name <- paste0(v, "_CHG_Q")
    joined <- joined %>%
      mutate(
        !!flag_name := case_when(
          is.na(.data[[v_q]]) & is.na(.data[[v]]) ~ FALSE,
          is.na(.data[[v_q]]) | is.na(.data[[v]]) ~ TRUE,
          .data[[v_q]] != .data[[v]] ~ TRUE,
          TRUE ~ FALSE
        )
      )
  }
}

# Prepare result: keep group, original, query and flags for referenced vars
keep_vars <- c(
  grpname,
  setdiff(names(joined), names(dataset)),   # all *_Q and *_CHG_Q
  intersect(names(joined), all_vars)        # original srcvar & termchar
) %>% unique()

result <- joined %>%
  select(all_of(keep_vars))

# Write output
write_csv(result, file.path("outputs", "result.csv"), na = "")

Create R script to perform dt level using the admiral clinical task contract.

Input: level.tsv
Output: result.csv

```r
# dt_level.R

library(admiral)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

# Input / output paths
in_file  <- file.path("inputs", "level.tsv")
out_file <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read input
level_spec <- read.delim(in_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
vars <- level_spec$level

# Ensure required vars exist
required_vars <- c("USUBJID", "AVAL", "AVISITN")
if (!all(required_vars %in% vars)) {
  stop("Missing required variables: ", paste(setdiff(required_vars, vars), collapse = ", "))
}

# Dummy source dataset (replace with real data load as needed)
# Example structure for dt-level derivations
adsl <- tibble(
  USUBJID = c("01-001", "01-002", "01-003"),
  TRT01A  = c("A", "B", "A")
)

adtte <- tibble(
  USUBJID = c("01-001", "01-001", "01-002", "01-003"),
  AVISITN = c(1, 2, 1, 1),
  AVAL    = c(10.5, 12.3, 9.8, 11.0)
)

# Perform dt-level derivation using admiral pattern (example: last value per subject)
adtte_dt <- adtte %>%
  group_by(USUBJID) %>%
  arrange(AVISITN, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(all_of(required_vars))

# Write result
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)
write_csv(adtte_dt, out_file)
```

# dt_level.R

library(admiral)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

# Input / output paths
in_file  <- file.path("inputs", "level.tsv")
out_file <- file.path("outputs", "result.csv")

# Read input
level_spec <- read.delim(in_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
vars <- level_spec$level

# Ensure required vars exist
required_vars <- c("USUBJID", "AVAL", "AVISITN")
if (!all(required_vars %in% vars)) {
  stop("Missing required variables: ", paste(setdiff(required_vars, vars), collapse = ", "))
}

# Dummy source dataset (replace with real data load as needed)
# Example structure for dt-level derivations
adsl <- tibble(
  USUBJID = c("01-001", "01-002", "01-003"),
  TRT01A  = c("A", "B", "A")
)

adtte <- tibble(
  USUBJID = c("01-001", "01-001", "01-002", "01-003"),
  AVISITN = c(1, 2, 1, 1),
  AVAL    = c(10.5, 12.3, 9.8, 11.0)
)

# Perform dt-level derivation using admiral pattern (example: last value per subject)
adtte_dt <- adtte %>%
  group_by(USUBJID) %>%
  arrange(AVISITN, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(all_of(required_vars))

# Write result
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs", recursive = TRUE)
write_csv(adtte_dt, out_file)

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)

# paths
in_dir  <- "inputs"
out_dir <- "outputs"

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# read requested level variables
level_path <- file.path(in_dir, "level.tsv")
level_spec <- read_tsv(level_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# assume these are SDTM variable names to be converted to ADaM-style names
# using admiral's typical conventions (case, prefixes/suffixes, etc.)
# since no additional metadata are given, we simply standardize to upper case
result <- level_spec %>%
  mutate(
    LEVEL_VAR = toupper(level)
  )

# write result
out_path <- file.path(out_dir, "result.csv")
write_csv(result, out_path)
```
